name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0cc61acae76d4eac84d020ce43bbc07b&_e=5lPo4N_U-amca8UY-AJm-gOElxXICL012xOcJfjWo-9G_IcBSjvYwHyGkBYOwTCPBE3-tGa1q4zMj3os_Wqd1eK7JRUdiXdWkZenG3kRGU9u6yLjnOeOr3DAhj0xpn8XESAonuIUeerRYqahfl6dltyPTlBkcKAc4lBcc7Mycri6ta3jPtK4X2MIIi8ia70q_89RF-PxmpWLuuqVr4SG1L4pz0Fj6FzK-5EZGHOmKPn8WrW4zZS0738lVsulBgfsquBR7yHCEwrql6gNV_rPz3jDktjnOWRl39yfv21tGgrpmoa4YKy6_rk_7I44GQm9OLiyYdG-7PNAHTcefn37sUu_WY9hUEaSVTses94gJWpTpmwklGCs1wMBabKD7RQgDbAAQM_rLyXuPhUXaAoaEw%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0cc61acae76d4eac84d020ce43bbc07b&_e=5lPo4N_U-amca8UY-AJm-gOElxXICL012xOcJfjWo-9G_IcBSjvYwHyGkBYOwTCPBE3-tGa1q4zMj3os_Wqd1eK7JRUdiXdWkZenG3kRGU9u6yLjnOeOr3DAhj0xpn8XESAonuIUeerRYqahfl6dltyPTlBkcKAc4lBcc7Mycri6ta3jPtK4X2MIIi8ia70q_89RF-PxmpWLuuqVr4SG1L4pz0Fj6FzK-5EZGHOmKPn8WrW4zZS0738lVsulBgfsFLSndKD8RBQBhAnjNiDrIuSGd3wK23Txnp4_QSveq1wC-QSNNT-yrMm9eOVT0dFThDdsgmoq6m5GriJYx2Hs37IYnGORezYW4L1P0DJHKhh8P92O7qMFbMZEnRRmqQmcWzGG3x8vakKpW0qcSvKSig%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0cc61acae76d4eac84d020ce43bbc07b&_e=5lPo4N_U-amca8UY-AJm-gOElxXICL012xOcJfjWo-9G_IcBSjvYwHyGkBYOwTCPBE3-tGa1q4zMj3os_Wqd1eK7JRUdiXdWkZenG3kRGU9u6yLjnOeOr3DAhj0xpn8XESAonuIUeerRYqahfl6dltyPTlBkcKAc4lBcc7Mycri6ta3jPtK4X2MIIi8ia70q_89RF-PxmpWLuuqVr4SG1L4pz0Fj6FzK-5EZGHOmKPn8WrW4zZS0738lVsulBgfsCiRsqOd2lkv1VHePH7Sr9HGVJ02FhY5irP1WRD0AQ1CrsPvHzH5hNDFw5rQcqNDZjE8zJVDHQX8qFZ3vGWvhSGLIlAFJ3d96-ztb1koCYoeR2pETG46bu09spDlrgVGzSxbxDXrNZFvwSW72kKGlmw%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0cc61acae76d4eac84d020ce43bbc07b&_e=5lPo4N_U-amca8UY-AJm-gOElxXICL012xOcJfjWo-9G_IcBSjvYwHyGkBYOwTCPBE3-tGa1q4zMj3os_Wqd1eK7JRUdiXdWkZenG3kRGU9u6yLjnOeOr3DAhj0xpn8XESAonuIUeerRYqahfl6dltyPTlBkcKAc4lBcc7Mycri6ta3jPtK4X2MIIi8ia70q_89RF-PxmpWLuuqVr4SG1L4pz0Fj6FzK-5EZGHOmKPn8WrW4zZS0738lVsulBgfscFM3Dx5NUQXS4Ap8P43GO9qP9R1Zq_r-Z_kBFmLwKn2ghlcLMdDHiOzhvZBytQV2a30oZeSA4ZZmVFFisqecFJ8HOvTZcJ5bofHEcMrS9-Fha8tLGw1FlTZ4Of3BxDst5WJ5PaIgu155g0QoPxKJTA%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

## **_I have a big announcement to share with Friend!_**

Your support helped me win the election, and now I’ve officially assembled my cabinet.
With Inauguration day right around the corner, I would like to thank you for everything by appointing you as an **_Official Cabinet-Level Advisor._**

### **Will you please accept this honorable position?**

subject: Reverse engineering the minimum wage
body:
The CPI is already adjusted for inflation. But does the picture really change?

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..8wICr4Uu7uPpiCZGjkI80f3rXnVxmFZSeJGsO-WkImw?) for more
---
NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Reverse engineering the minimum wage](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153959655&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzOTU5NjU1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzU3OTY3OTksImV4cCI6MTczODM4ODc5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dEr_YdS-GBDz6ATY41FzqILGfmICYZuzSZME9ifi6QE)
### The CPI is already adjusted for inflation. But does the picture really change?
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Jan 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153959655&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzOTU5NjU1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNTc5Njc5OSwiZXhwIjoxNzM4Mzg4Nzk5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.S0Co-QOnEoWWUg1mAD2IzQfFjXlCIUInIeGzc6HZIxw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153959655&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzOTU5NjU1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzU3OTY3OTksImV4cCI6MTczODM4ODc5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dEr_YdS-GBDz6ATY41FzqILGfmICYZuzSZME9ifi6QE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153959655&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzOTU5NjU1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzU3OTY3OTksImV4cCI6MTczODM4ODc5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dEr_YdS-GBDz6ATY41FzqILGfmICYZuzSZME9ifi6QE)
---
| | [](https://substack..tbSBx_4jpuuWTbngsgJ_gB-aNGs1KWGiBOyp1Fi4dIM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/reverse-engineering-the-minimum-wage?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7c1c9a38-b963-451b-a371-dbb7f4df16bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Image by CrizzyStudio. Person calculating figures.
Thank you to all who commented on the Jan 1, 2025 column [A Bold and Courageous Plan for the Middle Class](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/a-bold-courageous-plan-for-the-middle?r=3g6fcu&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=true). In general, people were very supportive of my concept of a comprehensive plan for the middle class.
### The CPI is already adjusted for inflation
A reader wisely pointed out that the Consumer Price index (CPI) is already adjusted for inflation. Thus, I was incorrect by both adjusting the CPI for inflation plus converting 1976 dollars to 2024 dollars. I multiplied the 1976 figures by 6. I would like to address those figures and further defend my position.
### The minimum wage goes back to 1938
My figures in the Jan 1 [bold and courageous plan](https://substack.com/redirect/175ebb9f-86aa-48c3-95fd-b80f87bc68fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) were based on Jimmy Carter's economy, since Carter is rightly on our minds at the moment.
The Fair Labor Standards Act (FLSA) of 1938 established the federal minimum wage at 25 cents an hour. [President Roosevelt warned:](https://substack.com/redirect/3d10d0dc-bd25-4c87-a67f-d2a52a0177b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "Do not let any calamity-howling executive with an income of $1,000 a day, ...tell you...that a wage of $11 a week is going to have a disastrous effect on all American industry."
The minimum wage was not intended for entry-level workers. [It was intended as a wage sufficient to support the average worker.](https://substack.com/redirect/7a7deaf6-d3ba-4c76-9d30-283a3dd1e585?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) In 1938, that meant a 1 person household, since 2 paycheck households were rare in 1938.
[The value of the federal minimum wage was at its strongest in 1968, when it was at $1.60 an hour. ](https://substack.com/redirect/1f36e08d-4df3-42fe-b895-4d4cf3cb100b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Adjusted for today's dollars, the value of our 2024 minimum wage has fallen by 46%.
In 2022, the [Economic Policy Institute posted](https://substack.com/redirect/afd092e9-f62c-4c32-b465-faeb17a58342?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) an article that declared that the federal minimum wage, which was $7.25 at the time, was at its lowest value since 1956.
[The value of the federal minimum wage was at its strongest in 1968, when it was at $1.60 an hour. ](https://substack.com/redirect/1f36e08d-4df3-42fe-b895-4d4cf3cb100b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Adjusted for today's dollars, the value of the minimum wage in 2024 was down by 46% in comparison with the value in 1968.
### Let's reverse engineer what a living wage needs to cover
The Internal Revenue Service (IRS) publishes national standards for expenses. Their current allowance for [groceries](https://substack.com/redirect/4d19e9aa-235e-44b0-b468-2dbcc1d23e47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for a family of four is $1,143. Note that they also have allowances for other basic items, such as clothing and personal care products. That figure is at $2,027 for a family of four.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/913301c2-4ba5-4bf2-9bbc-cabf35c1e128?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
IRS Standards for Basic Expenses (2024)
The IRS also publishes [allowable living expenses](https://substack.com/redirect/0da4a60c-45c7-4bb2-90fa-30bea0cdf767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including housing (mortgage or rent), utilities, property taxes, interest, insurance, maintenance, repairs, gas, electric, water, heating oil, garbage collection, residential telephone service, cell phone service, cable television, and Internet service. For a family of four that number in Clinton County, NY that figure is $2,280.
The IRS allowance for [out-of-pocket health expenses](https://substack.com/redirect/13c121e0-5c9e-46be-911e-475cad8b4c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a joke: $83. Good luck. That might buy you some band-aids and Tylenol at WalMart. Let's figure a nice round number of $500 for healthcare. That's low. Many people with a family of four would sign up right now for a healthcare policy that was at $500 because they are paying double that.
IRS standards for [ownership of two cars](https://substack.com/redirect/b064e3ff-9e76-4a4b-a33d-0e894f0e45ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (generally required for two working parents) is $1,238. The operating cost for those two cars is $570.
We still haven't included anything for child care. Let's set $1,000 for the two children, which is low if the child is in full-time daycare, but high if the child is in after school care.
**Our total comes to $7,615**
Food and Personal Items $2,027
Living Expenses $2,280
Car Ownership $1,238
Operating Cars $570
Day Care $1,000
Health Care $500
TOTAL $7,615
ANNUALIZED: $91,380
To get to a take-home pay that equals $7,615, a worker has to earn an hourly wage of $68 per hour to have the same ability to support a family as the original intent of the federal minimum wage. See this [paycheck calculator](https://substack.com/redirect/90f6a08c-8a2f-4b49-a1d8-4bb4081a1ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Admittedly, my figure of $76.56 was higher than that.
### What did I leave out?
At $68 an hour there is no room for savings. There is no room for illness. And remember, my figure of $500 for health care was low.
And then there is the issue of college tuition. If you think daycare expenses of $1,000 a month are high, check out the cost of SUNY Plattsburgh is around $8,812. Then factor in the cost of books, fees, and transportation to and from. If the student is commuting, there's probably a need for another car, plus insurance, plus gas.
### So my math was fuzzy, but it wasn't entirely off
My suggestion of $76.56 for the minimum wage that would support a family of four, as was originally intended, was off in that I multiplied the CPI by 6. I should not have done that.
Curiously, though, I come within ballpark range if I reverse engineer by looking at IRS standards for basic expenses.
### My call for a comprehensive plan for the middle class
I'm not so naive as to think that Congress will leap on my suggestion and get us to $76.56 in the next four years.
But unless and until we begin to address the multiple prongs of what is pushing the middle class down, we won't ever be able to get back up.
Wages are too low.
Housing is not affordable.
Childcare is unavailable and not affordable.
Groceries and personal care items have skyrocketed.
Transportation costs Americans more than houses cost in the 1960s.
Health insurance and prescription drugs are inconceivable expenses in our peer nations. We need Medicare for all.
Public education is not equipping our students with adequate skills, and college tuition has increased at a faster rate than the rest of our expenses.
### Shoot for $76.56 an hour and maybe we can get it to $20 an hour
The art of the deal (someone famous wrote a book by that name) is such that we will never boost the minimum wage to $20 an hour if we don't show our lawmakers how impractical the current minimum wage is.
It wasn't that long ago that we couldn't get a Democratic candidate to seriously talk about Medicare for all. By having these conversations, we build an appetite and knowledge necessary to take on the tough battles to preserve the middle class.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..gHiElawYFKNEJErshQRwvQmx0eIiPEu3IR-vcm4cZBo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153959655)

---
| | [Comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153959655&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzOTU5NjU1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzU3OTY3OTksImV4cCI6MTczODM4ODc5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dEr_YdS-GBDz6ATY41FzqILGfmICYZuzSZME9ifi6QE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

name: Goldco
subject: LAST CHANCE? Jump on this IRS loophole now
body:
But this isn’t a nightmare scenario... This already happened, and it’s getting WORSE.
If you have $50,000 or more in savings, you’re going to love this!

| |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z48idmsdf8od27jnl1hrpecfij8br3ainqmge8tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3i6aor6chh2bs)
---
| | **If you have $50,000 or more in savings, you’re going to love this! ** When Trump was elected in 2016, retirees had a chance of a lifetime. # [Rediscovering the present](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=153966372&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzOTY2MzcyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzU4MDU3NDYsImV4cCI6MTczODM5Nzc0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tb96ARf0k5ecN1GDUI6tL0od8MZSBv_abfSaMtVYo2E)
### A night shredding a dance floor offered some reminders about priorities and perspective
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Jan 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=153966372&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzOTY2MzcyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNTgwNTc0NiwiZXhwIjoxNzM4Mzk3NzQ2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FdleGkk0_cEgcdswN2swuVbdBQMF6w93dFHVu0H4aVs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=153966372&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzOTY2MzcyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzU4MDU3NDYsImV4cCI6MTczODM5Nzc0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tb96ARf0k5ecN1GDUI6tL0od8MZSBv_abfSaMtVYo2E&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=153966372&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzOTY2MzcyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzU4MDU3NDYsImV4cCI6MTczODM5Nzc0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tb96ARf0k5ecN1GDUI6tL0od8MZSBv_abfSaMtVYo2E)
---
| | [](https://substack..hKFfLtx1wnXs0-E-fJ74LeWSW2YjWQEcfHpwrKyW1Bs?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/rediscovering-the-present?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Most of my posts are more or less laments about the state of our country, this world, and the painful experience of watching (whatever passes for) western civilization strangle itself in slow motion. This one, however, takes a different arc.
I feel compelled today to share a reminder to find whatever comfort you can in this fleeting life in the care of people who love you.
I found myself ringing in the new year last night with a crew of phenomenally talented artist-athletes raging on a dance floor so maniacally that it left my legs feeling like jelly by the end of the night. We had the chance to see the [Funk Hunters](https://substack.com/redirect/4372e37a-c6b1-4e85-9bca-3d2db3e75450?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a Canadian DJ duo whose beats remixed entire genres as much as individual songs.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..kF3qGjwweAAPx-z3446kpBn-q1vXP5wVpItNA9iD4ek?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153966372)
It was by far my favorite show in recent memory, due in retrospect more to the connection among my friends than the music or the party itself.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eb6f68b6-e1e7-4f71-9813-946d94244457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Giving thanks at midnight
In moments of disillusion and despair, I often find myself trapped in observing [cycles of history rhyme](https://substack.com/redirect/fea5f92d-d51f-4a71-a96e-51aac75e039a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into an indefinite and nightmarish abyss of a future. Evenings like this one remind me of the limitless presents--and presence--from which the future emerges.
Community and connection are priceless. Last night reminded me how they flourish all around us in all directions at all times. It also wrecked my legs, but that was more or less the point so I'm not salty about it.
Celebration in community plays a crucial role in making this life tolerable. It helps me reconnect to joy and feel connected, rather than isolated.
I hope that you've had an opportunity this holiday season to find your way to some celebrations of your own.
In the company of loves ones, we can cultivate solace and joy under any circumstances. Beyond our individual selves, those feelings are paving stones we can lay to create pathways to peace and beauty in a world seemingly engineered to destroy them.
My screeds about the threats to the future will no doubt continue, but I feel compelled today to share a reminder to find whatever comfort you can in this fleeting life in the care of people who love you.
There is no greater gift. And in the coming days and years, we will all need as much comfort, care, and community as we can find and create.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! This post is public and freely available, so feel free to share it._

Because this new boresighter will let you zero in on your target with pinpoint accuracy, all without firing a single shot!

In fact, you can achieve sniper precision without wasting a single round of ammo or even leaving your home!

Introducing...

Codename: **The Boar**

Once reserved for military sharpshooters, this advanced sighting technology is now available for civilian use.

Take a look: The Boar is compatible with all calibers from .17 HMR to .50 Cal, requires no live fire, and gives you a perfect zero in just 10 seconds!

Thanks to an exclusive deal, I’m able to offer The Boar to you at an insane [**36% OFF discount...**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19567/6374453/a301da9073f24c7d0d412b5298cb7f8a7053def8/a629900a613dfb212a0c8a9072fad04e5458d875)

While supplies last, I’m throwing in free adapters and free shipping!

[**Grab your MCG Boar Laser Boresighter before I run out.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19567/6374453/a301da9073f24c7d0d412b5298cb7f8a7053def8/a629900a613dfb212a0c8a9072fad04e5458d875)

In Liberty, Oli Fischer

P.S. Imagine getting the best zero or your entire shooting life... without firing a single round.

**Zero ammo. Zero range trips. Zero frustration.**

This little device allows you to get a sub-MOA zero on any rifle, carbine, handgun or even shotgun -- 100% safely and from the comfort of your own home.

[**Get your MCG Boar 37% OFF here (Free S &H)**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19567/6374453/a301da9073f24c7d0d412b5298cb7f8a7053def8/a629900a613dfb212a0c8a9072fad04e5458d875)

subject: New Orleans Attack, Arctic Air, and Keanu Reeves' Watches
body:
An early New Year’s Day [attack in New Orleans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuKyEQheGnYTssGMBcFxS32c5pU64Gz2ATYbCA2Nq3j5w-9Sedo__zvJ0xl1yvH3jnMFPbQIGTSksFG2Eu-2YXCokZ2CwctDfun_Yn65dbILQuUjI-kUZ2no6kDZDS1qSINi45vNeUVqA1GOcOmE4ayTnACxxPJgmrmPJs_fDVcp03TmVvT-6HS7svJdzmfAxh_gtYBaz4qPwabxKwlvxkAWvll2y9MNYhY_vusVU5ZmeeMsUs37wz9iEJ96UHerxyKXkcvbDqesdcfp_mX-XPAD8BAAD__zX7XJU), Louisiana that left 15 dead and at least 30 injured is being investigated as an act of terrorism, authorities said.

# Thursday, January 2, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1788, [Georgia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7Fu6yAUxvGngQ0LjiHEA8NdvOWuHS0cDuZUBCJMY_ntq1RdO_-k79P_47bcPGUq23__QNdjXUCCEVIJCUvwlM9F8-AiIuDI0Sk7mquyk7Y8uRUuFuK6ol21NFe_Kj1Z1NEouE_GaE7uvSaVBKVgNGbwcVI-GAP-DpdpjExLDNRrGz4rlZ4w5rO-sA33-uDZpd6fOxv_MZgZzMdxDIn2Xtv5dgZzT7SL4E9BRfwKg3nD2jbyAkvHtoueUHwVqoU3F54H5Uz7xTItt4en_PPU_yp_OfgOAAD__6CiXAM) ratified the U.S. Constitution, becoming the fourth state admitted to the Union. This is a friendly reminder that a blast of arctic air is expected to drop temperatures by up to 30 degrees this month. Check the [national weather forecast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2P8yAQhH-N3WHBYkxcULxNurztldYKL_He4Q8BCZd_f_KlvnJGo9Gj5-M23ZAjb_f_uJIrYZ9AghFSCQnTjBxfU9_OLhAB6ZacstpclB172y7ODgp9IClH7dXFopaEF-t1bzSYwWPL7nyTSoJSoI3pMIwKZ2MAPQyjDk0vaeayp-5z560sFOJrf1Lq_L620S2lHLnR_xq4NnCttXZh_66EZXlPzvKdxEY1N3BNj7wITL6wF8hJHPGx3UkUWg9KWB6JsgicchGV6CuLk69Nbj4qx8h5sE0v7yty_CUofxl5OvgJAAD__-gEZKA) below, and stay warm! Today's issue is abbreviated as we return from the holiday break. We'll resume our regular _Flyover_ coverage on Friday. Today's sponsor is [Dr. Steven Gundry, MD](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAUheGnsbeg62sb48FDpYgOLQxdMiIXXwe3JkTgBuXtK7p3Pkef9F-6ofMpp9u19zO5EpcBAfUJxAlwCD7l56B4cJEISXJywkjdCGOV4ZMLBDqORnmkYJQFANvUtYWGRoqCkCd3aCAAhUCpdeWjFT5ojX7E2srIFFBIZVmrryXdykQxP5cHrdW4zDy7qZT7xuQLw5Zhu-97lcd1Kuv3sTNsP15N358ZtvL9ou1bd_xku_18CibPumkMX1247ynntNWGKbjOPuU_vPwX-3D4GwAA___kqFMV), sharing expert health and nutrition advice.

## 15 Dead in Suspected ISIS Plot in New Orleans
An early New Year’s Day attack in New Orleans, Louisiana that left 15 dead and at least 30 injured is being investigated as an act of terrorism, authorities said. The number of victims may change. [Follow the live updates here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuKyEQheGnYTssGMBcFxS32c5pU64Gz2ATYbCA2Nq3j5w-9Sedo__zvJ0xl1yvH3jnMFPbQIGTSksFG2Eu-2YXCokZ2CwctDfun_Yn65dbILQuUjI-kUZ2no6kDZDS1qSINi45vNeUVqA1GOcOmE4ayTnACxxPJgmrmPJs_fDVcp03TmVvT-6HS7svJdzmfAxh_gtYBaz4qPwabxKwlvxkAWvll2y9MNYhY_vusVU5ZmeeMsUs37wz9iEJ96UHerxyKXkcvbDqesdcfp_mX-XPAD8BAAD__zX7XJU). Police and FBI officials said a man, identified as Shamsud-Din Jabbar, 42, a U.S. citizen from Texas and an Army veteran, intentionally [drove a pickup truck into a crowded area](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOozAQxvGngc7IHmMIhYtr6HLtlWjwjINPjp0zDihvf0q0W273k_7SaPT9uS5XDDGk22-8s60-LyDBCKmEhIUwxNfSt2Q9M7Bu2apRm4sap35sN-t4GmFweiS6DAOp1U8rGgLUDgipb4N9X5NKglKgjenQTwrJGEAHw6R900umUHPp_uaQ6sY-vvLBpXP53ka71frYG_2rgbmB-TzPLq0u8bm_ewPzmw3Mz118KYaDxRrz7dvPB2HlTxe5RMa0C4dFUAkH7yKkmoUr-SThCye3iX9PLJWLKC6huphJmbZYepwhxrAPY9PL2x1D_DxYfxrssPA_AAD__5v1b_A) of Bourbon Street in New Orleans' French Quarter, killing and injuring bystanders. Following the incident, he [engaged in a gun battle](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX8N3rDgMHYyMHTxlq4drTMc8VXEREBi5d9XaedO70lPevr0fV2WC3Li_fqJN3It5gUUWKm0VLAE5PRahi64SARkOnJ6Mvakp_MwdZujGAc9Rh8sBq2sH7WJJ6OnKfhx9dZ27N5vSivQGoy1PcazxmAtoIfxbKIYFAVuufTfmfe2UUyv_KTS-3zrkttau1dhPgTMAubjOHq_1p2O-t4FzO_6FzKXRLhX-aSNfSLpC9ZNrvlR1rzL2gpRk77kI0iP9YGpMVVZt5wb71cBc1dcuB-cEtdxEoO63pDTL0f7z8vTwU8AAAD___8QZ-Q) with the police, who ultimately shot him dead at the scene. Police found multiple explosive devices at the scene, and an ISIS flag was recovered from the suspect's vehicle. The FBI believes the suspect wasn't acting alone. This is a friendly reminder that a blast of arctic air is expected to drop temperatures by up to 30 degrees this month. Check the below, and stay warm! Today's issue is abbreviated as we return from the holiday break. We'll resume our regular Flyover coverage on Friday. Today's sponsor is , sharing expert health and nutrition advice. | 15 Dead in Suspected ISIS Plot in New Orleans An early New Year’s Day attack in New Orleans, Louisiana that left 15 dead and at least 30 injured is being investigated as an act of terrorism, authorities said. The number of victims may change. . Police and FBI officials said a man, identified as Shamsud-Din Jabbar, 42, a U.S. citizen from Texas and an Army veteran, intentionally of Bourbon Street in New Orleans' French Quarter, killing and injuring bystanders. Following the incident, he with the police, who ultimately shot him dead at the scene. Police found multiple explosive devices at the scene, and an ISIS flag was recovered from the suspect's vehicle. The FBI believes the suspect wasn't acting alone. Wednesday's Sugar Bowl has been at 3 p.m. CT. U.S. Sanctions Iran and Russia The White House announced against Russia and Iran on Tuesday, alleging both countries attempted to influence the 2024 election. Officials claim with Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps and a Russian intelligence agency targeted the election process through disinformation campaigns designed to divide the American people. U.S. Russia favored President-elect Trump and pushed numerous false videos, while Iran backed Vice President Harris and pushed disinformation in Spanish. Both Russia and Iran the allegations, with one Iranian official calling them “unfounded.” College Football Quarterfinals Yesterday's College Football Playoff schedule began the day with three planned quarterfinal matchups, but the Sugar Bowl showdown between 2-seed Georgia and 7-seed Notre Dame due to the deadly terror attack in New Orleans. As of last night, the game was scheduled for today at 4 ET. In the Peach Bowl, 5-seed Texas to beat 4-seed Arizona State in a double-overtime thriller, 39-31. Texas had a commanding lead in the 4th quarter, but RB Cam Skattebo helped the Sun Devils erase the lead with several big plays. In OT, the Longhorns on a 4th down and then quickly scored the game's last TD on their next possession. Later, 8-seed Ohio State top-seeded Oregon in the Rose Bowl, 41-21. name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Musk's Plan to Undercut American Workers
body:
Billionaires’ Greed at the Expense of the Middle Class
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vy2ih-r6rb1t-kyd76rh8/)
---
# **Standing Up for Opportunity, Not Billionaire Greed**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vy2ih-r6rb1u-kyd76rh9/)
---
| | | | folks, We believe in the American dream—a land of opportunity for those willing to work hard and contribute. That’s why we support immigration policies that welcome talented individuals from around the world. But we must call out billionaires like Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy for exploiting these systems to cut costs and sell out American workers. This debate is not a new one. In 2007, **Bernie Sanders and Bill Gates****** had public disagreements over a key immigration bill. Gates supported expanding the guest worker program, while Sanders opposed it—not to block immigration, but to prevent billionaires from exploiting the system to suppress wages and maximize profits. Sanders focused on protecting both American workers and immigrants, pushing for a system that ensures opportunity for all. Now, Musk and Ramaswamy are pushing a policy to bring more "high-skilled" labor into the U.S., but their motives aren’t about strengthening our workforce. Musk is hiring foreign engineers for $400,000–$500,000 jobs, but paying them less than 20% of what an American worker would earn. It’s a calculated move to slash labor costs and boost profits, all while using political clout to game the system. And who’s cheering them on? Donald Trump. After years of claiming to fight for American workers, Trump has flipped, now praising the very visa programs billionaires use to undercut wages. He even admits to using them in his own businesses. This isn’t about “America First”—it’s about billionaires first. [**_We can support an immigration system that uplifts everyone—allowing Americans to thrive while welcoming those who want to contribute to this great land. But we cannot give billionaires free reign to abuse this system for personal gain. It’s time to fight back against corporate greed. Stand with us as we hold Musk, Trump, and their allies accountable for undermining American workers._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vy2ih-r6rb1v-kyd76rh0/)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Longhorns Advance, a 400-Year-Old Tree, and a Courageous SWAT Officer
body:
The Texas Longhorns are moving on to the College Football Playoff Semifinal next week after winning a thrilling contest against Arizona State University in the Peach Bowl yesterday, surviving an impressive comeback by the No. 4 Sun Devils to earn the 39-31 double-overtime victory.

## Longhorns Advance to CFP Semifinal
The Texas Longhorns are moving on to the College Football Playoff Semifinal next week after [winning a thrilling contest](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOqzAQAL_GdEG7a8CmcPEaS6_ItVciG6_BkokRWCH5-1Ouv3qkGc33fbq7lNNj-XIbm_qKZSKg_gZ4A5qCS_k9dU0wHsKIDRtUsteoBsBmNcpDH0nqgX1EHBWM0dM8ajU49q7XTTIfGSAQopSoW0nRk5MQedbz2LPogEOq5WjrypVf7oz5XZ58tHPZmmzWWvdTyH-CrCB7XVfL5_74QEF2LjnzwrdYSvUuZ0H24NntguwkyC5u4_9BkO0AB6VQU3OYsF8p53QOSnSwbC7l31L9c_1p6CcAAP__oONZwA) against Arizona State University in the Peach Bowl yesterday, surviving an impressive comeback by the No. 4 Sun Devils to earn the 39-31 double-overtime victory. The Longhorns led 24-8 in the fourth quarter before Arizona State scored two quick touchdowns and 2-point conversions, one of which came off of a Quinn Ewers interception deep in Arizona State territory. Texas had the chance to win the game with a field goal as time expired, but the 38-yard attempt by kicker Bert Auburn [hit the left upright](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7Fu7CAQheGngW5XMwMYKChu425vm9LCgNdIOFiGbLxvHzl9uqNTfNL_8ZgePpf8-fzvt-T6udSJgNQN8AY0RZ_Le5I8uhmiRZ4caqEM6gGQry6QHihJb6zVxssokIS1JpAVKgxS8uwuDBAIUQg0d0HLTF7AkoIJViUmIcXc63Hva-rp9G0p7_pKxz3UjRe39r43Jv4xGhmN5_UyGmd_tF5raXs9emM0tu771zXQaKm0MGA1CASpQfHDxf07l5LboJmE5-Zz-eX7n70vRz8BAAD__9v5VIM). After Arizona State scored a touchdown on the first possession of overtime, Texas converted on 4th and 13 with a [28-yard touchdown pass](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS3R3QHGDAxd2NKpUkcLhyNBwiWyaeq8feXuXf_69JO-z8t0iaWWr9t7XNj3PbeJgMwJ8AQ0pVjqa9Iy-RmSQ8kerTIj2gFQ3o8Yh-Rs1slFpwFMdMyMaDXkWSVZ_IEBAiEqheNZUZ4pKsh8Ha_OsNDAqfS2nvudO-9xy_XVnryer22R1d97f2xCvQkKgsJ-VEHh4xiG1vocaxUUth779yYo4Gi1sc4NboDRoQWDcvXp8VNqLdtghYbbEkv90_u_d5-efgMAAP__UBBU9w) by Ewers to Matthew Golden. Auburn kicked the point after to even the score. The Longhorns scored on the first play of the second overtime and went up 39-31 with the required 2-point conversion. On the next possession, they intercepted Arizona State quarterback Sam Leavitt to [seal the win](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngS3R3QE2Hhi6eEvXjhaYI0bCsWVo6rx9le5d_-GT_q_bdPO55Mf906_s2pm2iYDMBfACNEWfy2vSMroAcUDJDntlLPYdoFzczHHgIRgVZhvQDAyJ2FLEkKINIcjs3hggEKJSaK-KUiCvIPFs58Gw0MAxt-24toUbn76m8tqefFznbZXFLa3tVagPQaOg8XxXQSPX_SForM237ypoRNtrYxEUKt1ppVEbebi4_-RScu16oeG--lz-0Pbv5dPRbwAAAP__pRVSHQ). Arizona State led Texas in time of possession, first downs, and total yards, but the Longhorns [executed when it mattered most](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLvO4yAQhZ8Gd1gwxJcUFNu4y7ZbWmMYbCIMkRnFyT79KpG2_NtzdC76_tzmG8YU8_obd7L8CmUGBZ1UWiqYPcb0ni-Nt4vyV92Q1YPpRj30SjebJW98h6PDLrgl9KDJkO7D0g_UgdPYRPspU1qB1sbosTUQFkCjArnRXTsSF0U-cjla3ojphTWkd3nS0bqyN8luzI8qzC8Bk4DpPM-2xo8lYHIlJVpJwPTNCZhCKbxgSv8lmUpet3LkKtE_MTuSXKQLD1lpjyFmTFWekTdZWJ4xy8-wxCP-LRllZWSSSt_XjXe4v7qlOax_nDGlWPtBXNS6Y0zfo_wjuaeFfwEAAP__nmd0rw) and are moving on to the next round.
## Texas Congressmen Cleared of Campaign Finance Violations
U.S. Reps. Wesley Hunt (R-Houston) and Ronny Jackson (R-Amarillio) were [cleared of wrongdoing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2vtCAQRn8NdpiZwc-C4m3s9m1vaVAGJUHYCFnXf3-z29_6yXNOcn4e88P44OP23xysy9ulmYBaCSiBZmt8uOemsnoBO2LFGnvVDth3gNWuybbo1DCascWlNx2B6xtlFlqaXrHDyusPDBAIUSkcakVuIaPA8TqsY8uiAba-pLMuOxd-m-zCnV581ms6qqD3Up5ZqH-CJkHTdV31bfaUPqugKfKVBU3fn1xT3E7O-eAo18DmZCu57H7N0scX5-I3U3yKEkfoYMQO670coTq1fV4-BJ-7XjSwHcaHr738meOl6TcAAP__zM9jHw) by the House Ethics Committee on Monday after being investigated for violations of campaign finance law by allegedly spending campaign money for personal use. The investigation [began in March](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMRvo7gzYHjx0YUvXjuhiH8GSgRTckLx9le7df_o-6f91GS-cclpvn7yIL89pGwmoqwFroDFyyq-xraK_QnRYiUejO4umB6xmjxYcCV57MAjUm05bG3ECNBKJxVTJv8cAgRC1Rttomq7EGiYJNrhOVAsSU9n2psxS5MnHlF_bQ_YmbEuV_VzK_VD6Q9GgaDjP8-2CrEX24_uHd3k7RcPKJW0rZ0UD7yWFLGOkvtXacR2MoxpRptqxhNrozvWGqWOxzVyWXO0-3s-Uczp6o1q4LZzy33_5N8jD028AAAD__z7RYKE) when staffers at the Office of Congressional Ethics accused the two representatives of using campaign funds for private memberships. Jackson had spent nearly $12,000 on membership fees at the Amarillo Club since 2020, and Hunt had spent over $74,000 at the Post Oak Hotel since 2022. Although the committee found that the lawmakers “did not fully comply” with reporting requirements or restrictions on campaign fund expenditures, “there was no evidence that any Member intentionally misused campaign funds for their personal benefit.” Jackson and Hunt both [maintained their innocence](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_OozAQxJ8GOiPvmr-FizRIV-R03ZXImCWsZDDCm5C8_SfSf9XuaKTfjOb_fbg7Drw9_rqVrLznOKDGSmlQGofJcfgMZT7ZUU8d5GShMVULTa0hX2wFM1Rz27VgvKcOTAUay6bRk6vHGjFne8E0aAQwBtrC4DyiM3om3_quoqzUNLHEo5CFhN4uzeETX3QUPq55sIvInjJzy7DPsD_Ps1jTdnkZ9rSpZ8qw3-i8zh4DC_vrXeIzkSJZ2Cfl47qyCJHyISZKircXJeGHE47bJSUqVN9wddD-HAN7t10cd6jbDc4__5o1P-y0nxwCp7rJSv1YHYdvSfl1tZfFnwAAAP__23RxFQ) throughout the investigation.

The Longhorns led 24-8 in the fourth quarter before Arizona State scored two quick touchdowns and 2-point conversions, one of which came off of a Quinn Ewers interception deep in Arizona State territory. Texas had the chance to win the game with a field goal as time expired, but the 38-yard attempt by kicker Bert Auburn . After Arizona State scored a touchdown on the first possession of overtime, Texas converted on 4th and 13 with a by Ewers to Matthew Golden. Auburn kicked the point after to even the score. The Longhorns scored on the first play of the second overtime and went up 39-31 with the required 2-point conversion. On the next possession, they intercepted Arizona State quarterback Sam Leavitt to . Arizona State led Texas in time of possession, first downs, and total yards, but the Longhorns and are moving on to the next round. Texas Congressmen Cleared of Campaign Finance Violations U.S. Reps. Wesley Hunt (R-Houston) and Ronny Jackson (R-Amarillio) were by the House Ethics Committee on Monday after being investigated for violations of campaign finance law by allegedly spending campaign money for personal use. The investigation when staffers at the Office of Congressional Ethics accused the two representatives of using campaign funds for private memberships. Jackson had spent nearly $12,000 on membership fees at the Amarillo Club since 2020, and Hunt had spent over $74,000 at the Post Oak Hotel since 2022. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgbqdqocivat72q24dk11eehf12ju5nk7fet45ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j6aob4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrqgfahp0rrs6v6ri24fheph5nbu1utt459772f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j6aob4c3h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqku23q13rfmmh91mfs75cd87f8jjio6lbrdjtj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j6aob4c3h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeak91gd8k0hca8i8m037brduv1sotq9nph80dio_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j6aob4c3h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2t4u3u2nrh2kddsnlmj9ifqv545r6vj3n2rq2ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j6aob4c3h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbh2v1e7eas8v2dhughukb3gplfde37bhfb9sri0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j6aob4c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

Now they must have the guts to do more. **[Add your name, and tell the senate to reject them.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae8d3c75-9ca1-4c70-a45d-2069e642e2c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** These are not candidates who simply have different political opinions, they are unhinged lunatics who would literally put our national security in jeopardy. name: History Facts
subject: This president used to be governor of Cuba
body:
Plenty of presidents were governors before ascending to the White House, but most of them oversaw states within the U.S. One exception was William Howard Taft, who served as governor of the Philippines and Cuba. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68ceh72f19ae0jipolb3s8ci5qmn8sxt6u468tavin4xr0hh7k3431n9d8evaqovrfl2qm0e5s6suqd9ug64x761zzeno5swx9xdo4x6ev5nxpli6wjxk1wfau46l509ggywf2yin2fynrjb9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spgmuw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [William Howard Taft served as governor of the Philippines and Cuba.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spgmuw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spgmuw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spgmuw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| P lenty of presidents were governors before ascending to the White House, but most of them oversaw states within the U.S. One exception was William Howard Taft, [who served as governor of the Philippines and Cuba](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spgmuw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Taft’s political aspirations were matched (if not surpassed) by those of his wife, Helen “Nellie” Herron Taft, who vowed as a young woman to become first lady; when President William McKinley asked William Howard Taft to establish a civilian government in the Philippines, which was then a U.S. protectorate, Nellie was considerably more pleased than her husband was. Taft served as governor-general from July 4, 1901, until December 23, 1903, twice turning down what in many ways was his true lifelong ambition: a spot on the Supreme Court.
---
His foreign service didn’t end there. While serving as secretary of war under Theodore Roosevelt from 1904 to 1908, Taft traveled to Cuba after the island's president, Tomás Estrada Palma, asked the U.S. to intervene in ongoing conflicts over its recent election following the country’s 1902 independence. The terms of the 1903 Cuban–American Treaty of Relations allowed the U.S. to intervene militarily in order to preserve Cuba’s independence, and Palma resigned when he realized Taft wasn’t going to do so on his behalf. The following day, September 29, 1906, Taft established a provisional government in Cuba and made himself its provisional governor, a post he held for two weeks before being succeeded by Charles Edward Magoon. Taft went on to serve as president of the United States from 1909 until 1913 and as chief justice of the United States from 1921 until 1930.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spgmuw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spgmuw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Taft never got stuck in the White House bathtub.
While it’s true that William Howard Taft was a heavyweight of both the literal and figurative variety — he was nearly 350 pounds and a wrestler while at Yale — the story of President Taft getting stuck in a White House bathtub and needing to be helped out by several aides [isn’t true](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spgmuw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). In fact, the myth didn’t even surface until Taft’s longtime usher Irwin Hoover published his dishy 1934 memoir, _42 Years in the White House_. According to _Dead Presidents_ author Brady Carlson, “The funny part is that while Taft was president, the White House got a tub that was so big a president couldn’t possibly get stuck in it.” There’s even a [photo](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spgmuw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of the 7-foot-long, 41-inch-wide tub, which literally weighed a ton.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znm7h7026ei1qfh562sf58po2k9a65r5g1upc2v0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j61p34c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm0etagbtnbllq5ivui9evtav375l5727jbndl5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j61p34c9h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoilnr9qmgct24vp4hno9fot6bbnp5jr7ensgmjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j61p34c9h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4ptn1erjt9llgsbr7nqqa0unku8gplsgf3u67n0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j61p34c9h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpj1prsi371kd9gvl574d94o9cj1r4kvcrgutbk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j61p34c9h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkn8tgc5t7patajqb4h7gaotib63vsbevn4a53h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j61p34c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znvusldg7m3lkk4mctkqdu4otdfmictnprvvjhl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zad4aqks3c0a22lee8v2ucs8ku9p14pgnehduue8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3o4algqie4o9lp242nn7l49gvdmf9gdsu374re0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg3cq6gooromjpradv0hjci4lk6nr0livjg7nbuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmi9898ers837g0m0gq6lfnbjtj4ghaqjh8q8eao_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpgecpb0sdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zoqqronei0mhfegjcgdhq6o0ra3epbtq3tc7kv1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs)_

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6s3oicunf0219f64f1h4pqh2sjhi84o446nmlmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4uu06l4rgfhc5joejo8fvkbsvq3b5hmvu7cf5q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zonusd435t7hll9jijsucalca7k8ic9u99ceurlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zch0mija72jq45o2khu2kjkivm7so749162m13ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvo78fj5qnpfoj67818apsj3ph6l07mlt93ag700_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z56n0e8n0a8q3uhqbjbf7880s3iaq66ipsifmu7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf76spvr9sj2q8bdfo911jaeljbttuo108qqsh90_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmcl61t1so230r6mnggd2vgvkob25spvql3084i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69o31chh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 1/2/2025
body:
In tight vote for Speaker, Johnson could potentially sweep four GOP votes from Colorado
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Welcome to our first Mountain Minute of 2025! Here's a summary of today's newsletter:
🏔️**Here in Colorado...** In a pivotal political shift, U.S. Representative-elect Mike Johnson might [secure Colorado's GOP votes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in the close race for Speaker of the House. Meanwhile, authorities are investigating a shocking New Year's attack at the Trump Hotel in Las Vegas that has [connections to Colorado Springs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Colorado also sees debates heating up as [new cage-free egg laws](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) come into effect, raising concerns over potential increases in food prices in the new year .
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** The suspect who allegedly drove into a joyous crowd at a [New Year’s celebration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in New Orleans, Louisiana, killing at least 10 people and injuring dozens, has been identified as Shamsud Din Jabbar by the FBI.
🗣️**Commentary Spotlight...** Columnist Brian C. Joondeph critiques the [operational dynamics of Biden’s White House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), raising questions about leadership transparency. Elsewhere, Don Sweeting delves into the awe-inspiring legacy of [Hubble's discoveries](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), suggesting they point to intelligent design in the cosmos .
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, January 2, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[In tight vote for Speaker, Johnson could potentially sweep four GOP votes from Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
A slight Republican margin in the U.S. House will make Speaker Mike Johnson’s re-election bid later this week potentially a must-see.
Republicans hold a 220-215 seat advantage in the U.S. House, but one Republican has resigned, and two other Republicans have indicated their opposition to Johnson. It takes 218 votes to win the Speaker vote. If Johnson is unable to swing either of the defectors, he doesn’t win the Speaker vote — assuming Democratic members don’t lend their support.
U.S. Rep. Chip Roy, R-Texas, is at least one who has withheld his support for Johnson thus far and told Fox News there were others. He has suggested alternative Speaker options of Rep. Byron Donalds, R-Fla., or Rep. Jim Jordan, R-Ohio, both of whom have previously made unsuccessful bids for the post. Democrats are expected to put Rep. Hakeem Jeffries, D-New York, up for the post.
The U.S. House is set to convene Friday to consider the election of a Speaker. President-elect Donald J. Trump has led the effort to ensure that is Johnson, but his “total endorsement” hasn’t seemed to sway everyone.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Man who drove Cybertruck into Trump Hotel in Las Vegas may have come from Colorado Springs, ABC News confirms](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [KRDO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A Tesla Cybertruck exploded outside the Trump Hotel in Las Vegas, killing the driver and injuring seven others; the incident is being treated as a possible act of terrorism.
* Investigators confirmed that the driver rented the truck in Colorado Springs before driving to Las Vegas on December 30, raising questions about local links to the attack.
* Authorities discovered fireworks, a gas tank, and fuel in the truck, further supporting suspicions of a deliberate explosion.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Will Colorado’s cage-free egg law increase egg prices in the new year?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* As of January 1, 2025, all eggs sold in Colorado must come from cage-free facilities, with farms required to allow hens unrestricted movement and natural behaviors.
* While cage-free requirements increase production costs by about 15-17%, these impacts have already been absorbed over the past few years as farms transitioned to compliance.
* The ongoing nationwide egg shortage, driven by avian flu outbreaks that decimated flocks, is the primary reason for elevated egg prices and empty shelves, rather than the new cage-free regulations.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[10 dead, dozens injured in New Orleans after driver plowed car into New Year’s crowd on Bourbon Street](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Shamsub Din Jabbar, a U.S.-born Army veteran from Texas, was identified as the suspect behind the New Orleans New Year’s Day attack that killed 15 people and injured dozens.
* Jabbar drove a rented truck into a crowd on Bourbon Street before opening fire on police. He was killed at the scene by law enforcement.
* The FBI is investigating the incident as a terrorist attack and is exploring whether Jabbar acted alone or was part of a coordinated effort.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Joondeph: Who the hell is running the country?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [AMERICAN THINKER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_In name, Joe Biden is America’s 46th president. His “signature” is on official documents. He is photographed periodically, whether in the Oval Office, wandering in foreign lands or inappropriately sniffing or nibbling young children._
_But he is the president in name only._
_Is Joe Biden even real? As this tweet illustrates, his height varies. In one photo, Donald Trump and Barack Obama are the same height. In another, Obama is taller than Biden, and in another photo, Biden is taller than Trump. Like an Escher print, this optical illusion begs the question of whether there is more than one “Joe Biden.”_
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Sweeting: A century after Hubble’s discovery, our neighbor galaxies suggest a creator’s mind](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DONSWEETING.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_When you look into the night sky, the naked eye can only make out 2,500-3,000 stars, five planets and maybe one to three galaxies, and that’s assuming ideal atmospheric conditions and the right location. That has been enough in human history to dazzle us with the immensity and wonder of what we can see._
_But 100 years ago, astronomer Edwin P. Hubble (1889-1953), working at the Mount Wilson Observatory in California, made a stunning discovery: He calculated that a spiral nebula called Andromeda was about 860,000 light years away — more than eight times further than the most distant stars in our galaxy. He came to realize that what we thought was a gas or star cluster in the Milky Way was actually another galaxy, and that the Milky Way was just one of many galaxies in the universe._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Top Stories of 2024: Elections, password leaks, Tren de Aragua, Trump visit and more](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV STAFF | STATE | DECEMBER 31** _There’s one thing to say for 2024 in reflection — it wasn’t boring on the political front. Along the way there were a dozen candidates for one highly coveted seat in the U.S. House, a once in three-decades special selection committee, a Secretary of State failing to keep passwords secure, the trial of Tina Peters, members of the GOP’s central committee unable to agree on leadership, a visit to the state from Donald J. Trump, gang violence in Aurora, Republican gains and much more.___
__**[Boebert’s Fish Recovery Act saves endangered fish, secures water for future generations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | DECEMBER 30** _Last week, Rep. Lauren Boebert’s Fish Recovery Act passed, protecting four endangered fish species and empowering water use and development._ __
[**Garbo: Sheriffs must always be elected to defend liberty and preserve the Constitution**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY C.J. GARBO****| COMMENTARY |****DECEMBER 30** _Few offices in American governance embody the spirit of freedom and self-governance as profoundly as that of the county sheriff. Rooted in centuries of tradition and safeguarded by constitutional principles, the elected sheriff stands as one of the most powerful and accountable defenders of liberty in the United States._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**✅ DID YOU KNOW?** The tradition of making **New Year's resolutions** dates back to the ancient Babylonians, who made promises to their gods at the start of the year. About 30% of Americans make resolutions, but fewer than 10% keep them.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “And now we welcome the new year. Full of things that have never been.” — Rainer Maria Rilke
|

That has been enough in human history to dazzle us with the immensity and wonder of what we can see. But 100 years ago, astronomer Edwin P. Hubble (1889-1953), working at the Mount Wilson Observatory in California, made a stunning discovery: He calculated that a spiral nebula called Andromeda was about 860,000 light years away — more than eight times further than the most distant stars in our galaxy. He came to realize that what we thought was a gas or star cluster in the Milky Way was actually another galaxy, and that the Milky Way was just one of many galaxies in the universe. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ RMV STAFF | STATE | DECEMBER 31 There’s one thing to say for 2024 in reflection — it wasn’t boring on the political front. Along the way there were a dozen candidates for one highly coveted seat in the U.S. House, a once in three-decades special selection committee, a Secretary of State failing to keep passwords secure, the trial of Tina Peters, members of the GOP’s central committee unable to agree on leadership, a visit to the state from Donald J. Trump, gang violence in Aurora, Republican gains and much more. JEN SCHUMANN| STATE | DECEMBER 30 Last week, Rep. Lauren Boebert’s Fish Recovery Act passed, protecting four endangered fish species and empowering water use and development. C.J. GARBO| COMMENTARY |DECEMBER 30 Few offices in American governance embody the spirit of freedom and self-governance as profoundly as that of the county sheriff. Rooted in centuries of tradition and safeguarded by constitutional principles, the elected sheriff stands as one of the most powerful and accountable defenders of liberty in the United States._ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | ✅ DID YOU KNOW? The tradition of making New Year's resolutions dates back to the ancient Babylonians, who made promises to their gods at the start of the year. About 30% of Americans make resolutions, but fewer than 10% keep them. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY “And now we welcome the new year. Full of things that have never been.” — Rainer Maria Rilke | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()
