name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zboa4kvmluknu1v42eapcrrl5esk1bhijoqdk0fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69p74c3h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zt8oggva49gnlmo04ttuqfbn4b88ufuf778erjp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69p74c3h2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zf4ot83muujrq71nauf97o7t5fetkagr5vfuvptg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69p74c3h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zs3n2noogg1eafflibfktkuf5u9jbu2hdl3vh2m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69p74c3h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zhnl9fen30c7plf4ipjpktnohu47o79fsio85288_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69p74c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq4t9k66q3bd9ieir38ctieko7fcjheiprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6co76clie1oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zj4qkht89fr9kta8d9b2ps3glt2aco25vu6oi1cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3j69p74c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zjvon1vejuo64itq3e5l78aaqb1j9bo1qcsmrvqg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6clgecp74shge49fg)

subject: Time-Sensitive Update from President-Elect Trump: Act Now to Win NC in 2026

body:
You won't believe what RNC Chair Michael Whatley just revealed about President-elect Trump's plan to support our GOP candidates in 2026...

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqaq55jh52h1hqqdnbo2dvog0gcec8ejltu051ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3gm4or2cph2bs) Fellow Conservative, As Executive Director of the NCGOP, I'm writing to you today with an **[urgent update](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhtrmf66v89l6sh3l30aca9ad2d3uq0nqp1mcr1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3gm4or2cph2bs)** on our efforts to support President-elect Trump and our Republican candidates in the 2026 midterms. With [RNC Chair Michael Whatley](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za4gihkq7esjkoesmimtk1onajfbcs7bbk0n6np8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3gm4or2cph2bs) recently revealing that President-elect Trump will play a "**[significant](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z28c0e1p9k389hsp1nu7qs0qk31rbi5nal8botgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3gm4or2cph2bs)** " role in supporting our GOP candidates in the upcoming elections, we need your help now more than ever. There's an [_important message_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpgt1670eqbs8j8f5q4m27uj48oeic07seu7f7k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3gm4or2cph2bs) about the midterms that you need to see - it's critical that you read it before it expires. This message is too **[important](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlg9n5e72oefqa3loeg1s4geb293aqg0op2vi2d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3gm4or2cph2bs)** to wait - every minute counts in our fight to win your community for President Trump and our Republican candidates. I **[urge](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpil3439av20tkni541auqnifnn111smflnuffho_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3gm4or2cph2bs)** you to take action today. Thank you for your continued support, Fellow Conservative. **Sincerely,**
_Matt Judge_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh3inbl87uea4mp74gju0qj413nog43372aak5ao_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3gm4or2cph2bs)

GOP lawmaker and former Navy Seal Morgan Luttrell tore think tank analyst Alex Nowrasteh **[apart for saying something truly outrageous](https://substack.com/redirect/9a46fb0a-6358-4d20-b55f-ccf1648b1ae1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
"Have you ever been in a gun fight?" Luttrell asked Nowrasteh abruptly, in the middle of a hearing about terrorism threats coming across Biden's open southern border.
The open borders advocate paused before answering, "I've had a gun pointed at me..."
**[Watch Luttrell give this guy a much needed reality check](https://substack.com/redirect/9a46fb0a-6358-4d20-b55f-ccf1648b1ae1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in front of the whole country.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9a46fb0a-6358-4d20-b55f-ccf1648b1ae1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9a46fb0a-6358-4d20-b55f-ccf1648b1ae1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Luttrell pointed at the analyst and said it's time to take full action to prevent terrosist from entering the southern border NOW, even if just 1 person can be saved by doing so. "Is that clear?!"
"Yes sir, it is," Nowresteh answered. "I'm not saying do nothing, I'm just saying we can't do everything (to prevent terrorist entry.) We have lot's of different security threats!"
Luttrell was not buying it, and fired back, "I don't know it you know my background or not,... our job was to do everything, period!"
* * *
# Help our Navy SEALS reenter society: Beyond the Brotherhood
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d2bc62ac-bdde-4753-8968-3a0a51ef2f5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Navy SEALs have a vast array of marketable skillsets and expertise, **[there is little to no guidance, support or network](https://substack.com/redirect/d2bc62ac-bdde-4753-8968-3a0a51ef2f5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when they transition out of the SEAL Teams and into the private sector.
For SEALs with entrepreneurial aspirations, there is even less guidance. The operational tempo and clandestine nature of their work prevents them from building the social fabric that most of the world enjoys.
Navy SEALs are forged in a crucible of service, their exceptional skills honed for a unique mission. As they transition to civilian life, a new chapter beckons - a chance to leverage their strengths in a supportive community.
**Through personalized career guidance and mentorship,[we help SEALs](https://substack.com/redirect/d2bc62ac-bdde-4753-8968-3a0a51ef2f5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** translate their remarkable experiences into fulfilling goals. BTB empowers them to find purpose and camaraderie beyond the battlefield.
Even a small donation goes a long way to helping those who gave everything for us.
[Help our heroes today](https://substack.com/redirect/d2bc62ac-bdde-4753-8968-3a0a51ef2f5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# _**Resurfaced:**_**Matt Walsh gets BRUTALLY HONEST with trans student, he doesn't hold back ...**
Conservative speaker Matt Walsh **[unleashed brutal honesty](https://substack.com/redirect/b325b296-fdf3-466f-aed9-c138ba35fd2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when confronted by a transgender student during a campus speech - the whole room went silent.
"People could probably shout out the question I'm going to ask you right now," Walsh told the student. "If you know that you're a woman... What is a woman?"
The student's answer says it all... **[Watch what happens next:](https://substack.com/redirect/b325b296-fdf3-466f-aed9-c138ba35fd2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b325b296-fdf3-466f-aed9-c138ba35fd2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

## Biden Should Not Pardon Fauci
It seems President Joe Biden won’t stop at letting his convicted son Hunter off the hook. The White House staff is reportedly pondering an unprecedented, preemptive set of presidential pardons for numerous officials who haven’t been formally charged or convicted of federal crimes but may be liable for indictment or conviction under the incoming Trump administration. Prominent on that list is [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=9ba36646f19443a2bbc00f2f25cc8899&_e=xcAYH3nh3j32I1a2wofVJ-UHmiefPHrUE8LtpfjkHmUKz0KhF_62uMeN4n01OD_jzkU9t8hqG1IIq0GIf4VbfBSz0tdCth2jPG-SmURWm5s1TVfziM31lXrewkRYtsDqkA2rcQq2dOhd8hxTI5YWa1qKuO8LaZ9J0zqpbTRbuBm0_bOZ8F3JihzSdArSG6cEPj5sL7Sjj3QZYlw_Eu0pTCYs1a8DutEvhbncV19W-Z8rcnpvIlZo9_5au06mtoEr)

## Las Vegas Cybertruck Explosion Suspect Identified, Army Vet Served at Same Base As Bourbon St. Attacker – RedState
The New Year’s Day attacks in Las Vegas and New Orleans have shocked the nation, leaving investigators scrambling to understand the connections, if any, between two U.S. Army veterans responsible for the carnage. Matthew Livelsberger, a 37-year-old Army veteran, allegedly rented a Cybertruck in Colorado Springs, where he resides, [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=9ba36646f19443a2bbc00f2f25cc8899&_e=xcAYH3nh3j32I1a2wofVJ-UHmiefPHrUE8LtpfjkHmWMj1S1SnBajjaIYJgw2JYW32l0eIbBbwYn6G-aLP3ZtlJRFd2YSFl0lnNcj3OohFZHU17CvMKnMlyhURE7BIq8cy9gtgzYSjH0GVfOEXPXv9XVcuialpUajzGivBYMl7MziBiLodOad4R5KC0SSmfrSiUZyA-meqdtlnPLHEAx3lewj1_45cvdNf3wBNExensnwLRpmTfQqeRmWpJnXOEVyfQvSiNHkNVBUrGaHVMW3jQ2k4K-yoxt5Zp59mIs-K_GoHOvxUMgXJc1iRMYrbAFRZghmmDswd2pYInTJ7p_kuirp2U7SZXRNImUIdZZCwo%3D)

## Using Prayer to Confront the Evil That Men Do – RedState
The horror of New Orleans on New Year’s Eve 2024 and the attempted horror of Las Vegas on New Year’s Day 2025 are sobering reminders that there is evil present in the world. The atrocities are barbed notifications to those of us who believe that while love is the highest calling, hate resides in [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=9ba36646f19443a2bbc00f2f25cc8899&_e=xcAYH3nh3j32I1a2wofVJ-UHmiefPHrUE8LtpfjkHmUUJ3m3PFBaVX5xx1c6K88IAf_h248WZ6urVs1yFCGlBcrefg4FTzjZP0LZHBTU1W40HEs4udOtkP7eoLnmxgVQVMb-890tz-xIFxIK3tS0TZPHuRnGd6QR0_dQtOqfgDMR9910ccXNCKj0dx4uzotqjw-gWpAN-wJBdche2X7RyJuIPogaSWyHb0NeK-xLI3qHzhbGlvFmywbrgfhCitdNqoeKSn6ydOZ-8O6kAcKRqCtKxuZk2S0LvAxRkUGmj_g%3D)

The Library of Congress recently announced the latest National Film Registry finalists, and those 25 movies will now be preserved for posterity, bringing the total to 900 films through the class of 2024. But I have some bad news: the new entry in the "Sonic the Hedgehog" franchise is [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=9ba36646f19443a2bbc00f2f25cc8899&_e=xcAYH3nh3j32I1a2wofVJ-UHmiefPHrUE8LtpfjkHmVgBAgdfAiXVrGBohjY8kFQVTliY0WqhB9UYhHOguNwwdctbMDeufOScMTj_dWyp3jDGdU2nZxeGvTFcAo-S9b3KRVnafkwPVONjuA4jwtsYoshxUbYdbQ5kKfEO1f9RFdYss8QgG9Sm-wbLZFSDNes106j2ZpxrXSKp1Yvzuxs_ukOZIyF5tKS4lD5iFyPb9kEhMMbJeqdIOIYmaxvvEUpRMZAylHgRhT9b949KeBh1D4RcuUDmp2sZk1Nmc15FhLfA0djSel-1vukpROlWL-HXuiaos-Q-XKANpV0dpuxMQ%3D%3D)

I'm so excited for this new door of opportunity for me to walk in my purpose of educating and engaging those within my sphere of influence.
[Listen in](https://substack.com/redirect/73e5263c-714a-422c-937d-46dba7b21ee5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), starting this Saturday, January 4th, at 10am. I will be bringing the heat, along with Truth, laughter, and logic.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/73e5263c-714a-422c-937d-46dba7b21ee5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
According to Nielsen Rating, Philadelphia is the 9th largest media market in the nation. [WPHT Audacy](https://substack.com/redirect/73e5263c-714a-422c-937d-46dba7b21ee5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is the #1 talk radio station in this market. The station covers most of the Mid-Atlantic states, including PA, NJ, DE, & MD. The population of Philadelphia is roughly 4.7M people. The Philadelphia station has a Nielsen rating of 2.9%. The monthly impression count of over 2M listeners reflects the avg # of people listening in the Philadelphia market **only** during a 1-hour program. (This number does NOT include Mid-Atlantic states: NJ, DE, MD, and areas outside of Philadelphia).

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

name: Ryoko Wifi
subject: Never lose signal again with portable Wi-Fi
body:
This amazing device acts as a wireless modem by creating a Wi-Fi network around itself using 4G LTE.
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19580/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/4ba9fc0a63695e6eae98ad66bdc7f0faabf65964). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19580/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/4ba9fc0a63695e6eae98ad66bdc7f0faabf65964?message_id=IjcyNmMzOWIwLWFiNzMtMDEzZC03OWUyLTE2MWRiYTI2Mzk3OUBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).

| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19580/6374453/fb14b3f64aedeeb5061e46d662b4626c7304530a/4ba9fc0a63695e6eae98ad66bdc7f0faabf65964)

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19580/6374453/6ce869e32a7f5350f0e5417ed24109580590c29d/4ba9fc0a63695e6eae98ad66bdc7f0faabf65964)
---
|
---
| | Hey, Did you know that it's now possible to take the internet with you wherever you go this summer? **Muama Ryoko is a pocket sized router that gives you insanely fast Wi-Fi** connection anywhere you travel. This amazing device acts as a wireless modem by creating a Wi-Fi network around itself using 4G LTE. **[YES, I WANT TO ORDER MY MUAMA RYOKO TODAY](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19580/6374453/fb14b3f64aedeeb5061e46d662b4626c7304530a/4ba9fc0a63695e6eae98ad66bdc7f0faabf65964)** No more paying high fees for internet usage or not having internet at all. Now your family can enjoy the benefits of wireless internet wherever they go. **The Muama Ryoko** lets you stay connected to the internet even in the mountains. ⟩Connect up to 10 devices to extremely fast Wi-Fi wherever you travel. ⟩No contract needed and No hidden charges just an amazing deal. ⟩Superfast internet speeds up to 150Mbs. **[SEND ME MY MUAMA RYOKO PORTABLE WIRELESS MODEM](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19580/6374453/fb14b3f64aedeeb5061e46d662b4626c7304530a/4ba9fc0a63695e6eae98ad66bdc7f0faabf65964)** With summer quickly approaching, there's no better time to start forming your travel plans. But don’t wait too long, this is a limited time offer as supplies are running low. **Get your Muama Ryoko portable internet today.**
---
|
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19580/6374453/fb14b3f64aedeeb5061e46d662b4626c7304530a/4ba9fc0a63695e6eae98ad66bdc7f0faabf65964)

name: Patriots for Border Security
subject: Take the Poll!
body:
Help Prioritize Trump’s First 100 Days on Border Security

Help Prioritize Trump’s First 100 Days on Border Security

| | |
* * *
---
|
* * *
---
| | Friend, **Never forget:**
_**In his first 100 days, Joe Biden took 94 executive actions on immigration, leaving our borders wide open, prioritizing illegal migrants over American citizens, and putting our communities at risk.**_ Under Biden, it wasn’t just a failure – _it was a strategy to dismantle our American way of life._ **But those days are behind us. ** Now, under President Trump’s leadership, we are committed to reversing the damage and restoring order at the border. But to succeed, we need your input and your support.
[**_Take our official Border Security Poll now to help prioritize the administration's next steps in the first 100 days. >>>_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm9sauuc8fhvntbruuk64p5opt1vcb7o14vg8uho_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3gm1p72cth2bs)

# [Attack in NOLA, more misinformation](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=153979111&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzOTc5MTExLCJpYXQiOjE3MzU4MzEyNDgsImV4cCI6MTczODQyMzI0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fi0NHqPqVhsJR0OwHFEnJqKrTF7zcm8Q9SyGw5Gc8BM)

| Jan 2

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/752f81e4-8b21-4a45-89ee-36e9d81aa53f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My patience has worn thin with the the media's inability or unwillingness to hold those who deliberately spread false information during and after a crisis.
When MAGA pundits invented wild conspiracies about the Thanksgiving car wreck at New York's [Rainbow Bridge last year,](https://substack.com/redirect/eb2a670f-bf89-4500-9ad5-89d098ad163a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) they terrorized the entire country. Sitting US Senators blamed the country's southern border with Mexico and by extension Joe Biden. Others claimed violent extremism motivated an attack. In reality, a middle-aged white man speeding while drunk crashed his car. That was it.
The same set of, er, _characters_ showed up again when a cargo ship wrecked into Baltimore's [Key Bridge earlier this year](https://substack.com/redirect/5631530d-8699-4abd-9c83-30aad81bfa43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), falsely claiming the software had been hacked, the ship had been intentionally run into the bridge, even inventing lies about the ship's captain to smear Biden and Democrats.
Yesterday, a deadly attack in New Orleans became fodder once again for the reality-challenged electorate and their cult leaders.
A man drove a[ Ford F-150 Lightning](https://substack.com/redirect/3b353fc1-2132-401f-a691-6543e16a0f9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into a crowd of New Year's Eve patrons on Bourbon Street in New Orleans at about 3 am on January 1. The man entered through a Canal Street roadblock in a major intersection in the city as festivities closed out.
A shoot-out ensued and the man was killed. At least 15 people have been killed, and dozens more are still being treated in area hospitals.
As I've written about and discussed extensively in the past, information during a breaking-news situation might not be complete or correct. It's important to wait until more information becomes available before making accusations...

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1011?refcode=email-20250102_v&akid=7459%2E5885482%2EnBmc-2 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — Elon Musk,
Donald Trump, the billionaire class, and the entire MAGA extremist GOP are
all aligned on their primary goal: slash Medicare and Social Security and
slash taxes for the mega-rich.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20830?t=1060&akid=7459%2E5885482%2EnBmc-2 ][IMG]

The only way we will win this battle against Musk and Trump is if we first
change the narrative. Bernie’s doing just that by calling out the
Trump-Musk Oligarchy AND pointing out that Medicare for All is actually
the way to save on healthcare costs in America.

Instead of slashing the Medicare and Social Security so many people rely
on, we should get rid of the deadly and expensive for-profit insurance
middlemen. Instead of slashing taxes for the rich, we should be raising
taxes on the ultra-wealthy to fund M4A and expanded Social Security
benefits.

We’re mounting critical campaigns right now to oppose the Trump-Musk
agenda, but we can only do it with small-dollar donations right now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250102nd&akid=7459%2E5885482%2EnBmc-2 ]Stand with Bernie & Our Revolution right now with an urgent contribution
towards our campaigns to stop Musk’s cuts and get loud about Medicare for
All! Bernie’s changing the narrative and he needs a movement behind him.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250102nd&akid=7459%2E5885482%2EnBmc-2 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250102nd&akid=7459%2E5885482%2EnBmc-2 ]CHIP IN $22

Musk and Trump’s agenda centers on cutting things Americans need (like
Social Security, Medicare, public education, labor protections, and much
more) — and giving away billions to wealthy elites and giant corporations.

Musk will continue threatening lawmakers in Congress with well-funded
primary challenges if they don’t do what he wants. We have to show that
the people will not bend to the will of Trump and Musk, even as Trump
brags about CEOs “bending the knee” to him.

Our mass movement and Bernie’s megaphone for Medicare for All, progressive
economic policies, and a working-class agenda is the most powerful
opposition to the Trump-Musk agenda. We need your help to be in the
strongest position to take on these campaigns.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250102nd&akid=7459%2E5885482%2EnBmc-2 ]We’re in an existential fight and we need our grassroots donors with us
right now. Can you make a donation to help us fight Trump-Musk? Our
campaigns are relying on the resources our movement can provide today.

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

body:
This is my promise to you.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99736032/520714202/985656371?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.02_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2JkNTM3Ni0xZWM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBxFnDUHvsKQKsmnqJAq7GAIJ2yM-kMKmqPQCYEDIb4=) Peter, it’s Emilia. As we kick off 2025, I wanted to take a moment and reach out personally to let you know what serving Northeast Ohio – _my beloved hometown_ – means to me. I’ll explain more in a moment, but first: [**I am fighting everyday to deliver impactful and lasting change for our community. But I’m going to need your help to ensure that an extreme Republican doesn’t flip this seat red and reverse all the progress we’ve made in the past three years. Is there any amount you can please pitch in to keep fighting for OH-13?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99736033/520714203/985656371?&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.02_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2JkNTM3Ni0xZWM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBxFnDUHvsKQKsmnqJAq7GAIJ2yM-kMKmqPQCYEDIb4=) | [**PITCH IN**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99736034/520714204/985656371?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.02_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2JkNTM3Ni0xZWM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBxFnDUHvsKQKsmnqJAq7GAIJ2yM-kMKmqPQCYEDIb4=)

**I know how hard the people of Northeast Ohio work. I’ve seen it all my life.**
But growing up in Akron, I quickly learned that working families throughout our community aren’t given the same opportunities or a level playing field that others enjoy.
That’s exactly why I entered a career in public service, Peter: **To change the status quo.** That’s why I worked across the aisle in the Ohio Statehouse to fight for higher wages, working and middle-class tax cuts, and other legislation that would put more money in the pockets of Northeast Ohioans. That’s why, in 2022, I ran for – and won – one of the most competitive U.S. House seats in the country. And that’s why last year, I decided to run for re-election to continue delivering for our community.
_Our community deserves an advocate on the federal level_ – someone who isn’t afraid to stand up to people who are standing in the way of progress; someone who will advocate for our jobs, healthcare, and our freedoms; and someone who will work to make the day to day a little bit easier. **And that’s exactly what I’m trying to do, every day, as your Congresswoman.**
Peter, my promise to you is that I’ll always strive to be that type of leader, and that I’ll never stop fighting for the community I love. **_And when it comes to fighting for Northeast Ohio, I’m only just getting started._**
[**It is the honor of my life to serve OH-13 in Congress. But with Republicans controlling the House, Senate, and White House, I’m going to need your help to ensure I can keep pushing for progress in Washington. Please, is there any amount you can pitch into our people-powered campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99736038/520714205/985656371?&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.02_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2JkNTM3Ni0xZWM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBxFnDUHvsKQKsmnqJAq7GAIJ2yM-kMKmqPQCYEDIb4=)

Thank you so much. It’s an honor to have you on this team.
_Emilia_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

FROM REVOLUTION TO REPUBLIC

The Cottage Meetings for TEENS!!!

Tuesdays starting January 28, 2025

11amPT/ 12pmMT/ 1pmCT/ 2pmET

Just in time to introduce our BRAND-NEW, HIGH SCHOOL CREDIT EARNING CURRICULUM, veteran Cottage Meeting Hostess Tami Hirsch is
presenting Moms for America’s classic Cottage Meetings but for TEENS! Based on Kimberly Fletcher’s original, foundational program,
Revolution to Republic is an interdisciplinary course that, using American history and classic literature, will explore the
overarching theme of freedom and liberty and why principles of representative government, individual rights, and religious
freedom, the foundational values of the United States expressed in the Declaration of Independence and the United States
Constitution, are worthy of protection and propagation. This is one series that you and your family won't want to miss!

clean_body: Don't miss our inspiring lineup of webinars to kickstart your goals and fuel your inspiration for 2025! t If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] Don't miss our exciting lineup webinars to kick off 2025! And read to the end for a special scholarship opportunity for your student! [] [] RAISING SERVANT LEADERS Monday, January 13, 2025 9amPT/ 10amMT/ 11amCT/ 12pmET Have you ever wondered how to infuse your homeschooling with intention and purpose? There's no better time than January to tackle this so join Homeschool Mom2Mom host, Liz Ackerman, as she welcomes Audrey Rindlisbacher, the Mission-Driven Mom, to find the answers you're looking for! Get your new year off to the best start! Register - RAISING SERVANT LEADERS [] [] [] YOU Can Be a Cottage Meetings Hostess! Here's Why You Should Tuesday, January 14, 2025 11amPT/ 12pmMT/ 1pmCT/ 2pmET Ever wonder why, how, and if YOU should be a Cottage Meetings Hostess? In this webinar, a panel of new and seasoned hostesses will share their whys, their experiences, and how it has impacted their lives and how it could impact yours as well! Be prepared to be inspired and to TAKE ACTION! Register - COTTAGE MEETINGS HOSTESS [] [] [] FROM REVOLUTION TO REPUBLIC The Cottage Meetings for TEENS!!! Tuesdays starting January 28, 2025 11amPT/ 12pmMT/ 1pmCT/ 2pmET Just in time to introduce our BRAND-NEW, HIGH SCHOOL CREDIT EARNING CURRICULUM, veteran Cottage Meeting Hostess Tami Hirsch is presenting Moms for America’s classic Cottage Meetings but for TEENS! Based on Kimberly Fletcher’s original, foundational program, Revolution to Republic is an interdisciplinary course that, using American history and classic literature, will explore the overarching theme of freedom and liberty and why principles of representative government, individual rights, and religious freedom, the foundational values of the United States expressed in the Declaration of Independence and the United States Constitution, are worthy of protection and propagation. This is one series that you and your family won't want to miss! Register - COTTAGE MEETINGS FOR TEENS [] [] COMING IN MARCH! Ever wonder how you can help your child shift from "I can't" to "I will!"? In From Victim to Victor, Sarah Hernholm, Founder of WIT [] , host of the "DO WIT" podcast, 3x TEDx speaker [] and FORBES [] contributor, will share her inspiring journey of transforming obstacles into opportunities, and provide easy ways to help your family do the same. And for current scholarship competitions and opportunities, click HERE [ reach out directly to Sarah [sarah@doingwit.org]. BOOKMARK THIS PAGE! 👇👇👇👇👇 [] [] LIKE WHAT WE DO? Your tax-deductible gift to Moms for America® will help support us in our mission to Empower Moms, Promote Liberty, and Raise Patriots! DONATE TODAY [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Becky Edwards
subject: Happy New Year from Governing Group!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
body:
As we reflect on a successful 2024, we look forward to your support in 2025! | | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=f461a1b6ef&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
| | | | | Dear Friend,
As we begin a new year, we want to take a moment to say thank you for being part of the Governing Group community in 2024. Your support has been instrumental in proving that civility, integrity, and good governance still resonate with voters.
**What We Achieved Together** This year,**25 of our endorsed candidates won their elections** , including in highly competitive races across Utah. These victories aren’t just numbers—they represent a clear shift toward leaders who prioritize collaboration, thoughtful policy, and getting things done for their communities.
Your support helped us:
* Provide essential campaign resources, like strategy, outreach tools, and on-the-ground guidance.

* Elevate candidates who reject political division and embrace progress-driven leadership.

* Build a growing coalition of voters and leaders committed to moving Utah forward.

**Looking Ahead** As we enter 2025, our work is far from done. Governing Group is ready to:
* **Expand our reach** by recruiting and supporting more exceptional candidates.

* **Strengthen campaigns** with the tools, resources, and coaching needed to win.

* **Set a new standard** for civility in politics—where leadership is defined by action, not rhetoric.

Your continued support is the key to building on this momentum.
**You Make the Difference** This progress is only possible because of you. Every contribution, every share on social media, and every voice in support of civility brings us closer to a better political future for Utah.
[**If you can, please consider donating to help us kickstart 2025 with the resources we need to continue this work.**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=eea7990dbc&e=6484bb6dd5)
Thank you for being part of this movement. Together, we’re showing Utah—and the nation—that politics can be better, and it starts with leaders who care about real solutions.
With gratitude,Governing Group

name: New PA Project Education Fund
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
Fellow activist,

Happy New Year!

We wanted to reach out and say how thankful we are to you for your support this past cycle and for helping us hit our end-of-year fundraising goal.
As we kick off the new year, we are taking the time to reflect on our work over the last three years and are grateful for the overwhelming support of people like you who believe in our mission and are in this for the long run.

We were founded as a voting rights organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making.

Thanks to your support, the New PA Project Education Fund, along with the affiliated New Pennsylvania Project, have assisted 48,000 Pennsylvanians in registering to vote and making their voices heard at the ballot box, and we are just getting started.

We know our work continues and we are thankful to have you by our side as we look towards 2025 and beyond.

Cheers,

Team NPPEF

The New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) is a non-partisan organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making.

Will you support us with a contribution today?

DONATE NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nppef_eoy_match/?refcode=EM_C_250102newyear_N_NPPEF_5_NG_N_PT

Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
New PA Project Education Fund
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States
The New PA Project Education Fund is a qualified 501(c)(3) tax-exempt organization and donations are tax-deductible to the full extent allowed under the law.

name: Maxine Dexter
subject: How I got to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
Tomorrow, I will be sworn in

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99740234/520723138/577006200?amount=25&refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzMxYTIwNTUtMjNjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2dtrBGzWdrv9ZdloIsjGlZ5e5LYS-VtOmo0unx3WYE4=)
Hi Peter,

Tomorrow, I will be sworn in to represent the people of Oregon’s Third Congressional district. I am deeply honored and ready to get to work for you.

As I reflect on my journey to Congress, I’m overwhelmed with gratitude. Growing up in the Pacific Northwest, life wasn’t always easy—financial struggles and a tumultuous home environment shaped my early years. But thanks to the strength of my community, I found mentors, support, and opportunities that changed my life.

At 16, I got my first union job at Albertsons. The wages, benefits, and job security I had as a UFCW member helped me become the first in my family to graduate from college. From there, I pursued my passion for healthcare, earning my medical degree and building a career as a physician in Portland.

But my journey didn’t stop there. I’ve seen firsthand the challenges Oregonians face—from the housing crisis to the opioid epidemic, from attacks on reproductive rights to rising costs of living. Those experiences inspired me to step up, first as a state legislator and now as your Congresswoman-elect.

I know I didn’t get here alone. Your support made this possible. Whether you knocked on doors, donated, or simply believed in me, you’ve been part of this journey every step of the way. And I’m so deeply grateful for it.

[**Now, before I’m sworn in, I need your help again. Can I count on you to step up once more and make a donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99740236/520723143/577006200?amount=50&refcode=MD_FR_2025.01.02_story_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzMxYTIwNTUtMjNjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2dtrBGzWdrv9ZdloIsjGlZ5e5LYS-VtOmo0unx3WYE4=)
****[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99740238/520723145/577006200?amount=50&refcode=MD_FR_2025.01.02_story_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzMxYTIwNTUtMjNjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2dtrBGzWdrv9ZdloIsjGlZ5e5LYS-VtOmo0unx3WYE4=)****
---
Thank you for believing in me and for being part of this movement. Together, we’ve already accomplished so much, and I know the best is yet to come.

clean_body: Tomorrow, I will be sworn in | = Hi Peter, Tomorrow, I will be sworn in to represent the people of Oregon’s Third Congressional district. I am deeply honored and ready to get to work for you. As I reflect on my journey to Congress, I’m overwhelmed with gratitude. Growing up in the Pacific Northwest, life wasn’t always easy—financial struggles and a tumultuous home environment shaped my early years. But thanks to the strength of my community, I found mentors, support, and opportunities that changed my life. At 16, I got my first union job at Albertsons. The wages, benefits, and job security I had as a UFCW member helped me become the first in my family to graduate from college. From there, I pursued my passion for healthcare, earning my medical degree and building a career as a physician in Portland. But my journey didn’t stop there. I’ve seen firsthand the challenges Oregonians face—from the housing crisis to the opioid epidemic, from attacks on reproductive rights to rising costs of living. Those experiences inspired me to step up, first as a state legislator and now as your Congresswoman-elect. I know I didn’t get here alone. Your support made this possible. Whether you knocked on doors, donated, or simply believed in me, you’ve been part of this journey every step of the way. And I’m so deeply grateful for it. = **=** Thank you for believing in me and for being part of this movement. Together, we’ve already accomplished so much, and I know the best is yet to come. With gratitude, Maxine Dexter | Paid for by Maxine for Congress PO Box 12209, Portland, OR 97212 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: The vote for House speaker is tomorrow. Tell Democrats to not give him a single vote
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell House Democrats not to give Johnson any votes for speaker. Let him fail.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb85401fa-3e1e-44e8-b3a0-e4d73bba2641/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0ca3dc0-018d-43ad-b9d4-828e9f0293e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Speaker Mike Johnson could lose that top job when the House votes on January 3rd. If he loses as few as two Republican votes, it could be enough to deny him a necessary majority. [**Tell Democrats to let Johnson fail.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37780a93-0d7e-4364-823a-9cf50c39ea06/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In the last session, Democrats often provided essential "yes" votes for specific critical legislation supported by Johnson, to offset Republican defections. And there was generally a reasonable argument for that in cases where failure would have been catastrophic (shutting down the government, for example). But Johnson has been a terrible speaker, almost always doing the bidding of the right-wing extremists, and rarely seeking compromise, even though the House is nearly evenly split between Republicans and Democrats. If Johnson is short on votes, there will be tremendous pressure on Democrats to provide enough to put Johnson over the line. And they should resist it. [**Tell House Democrats not to give Johnson any votes for speaker. Let him fail.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28bf63e8-f5e6-4a36-a524-231739b689bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

_Over the last 8 years, we 've worked our butts off.

**[But now, Democrats are plotting to take back 2 Florida House Seats, and we need to secure the resources to stop them!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmhhbs46vepo77u0ejh5cu3to6i868gn6er063k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3im4pb4c1h2bs "But now, Democrats are plotting to take back 2 Florida House Seats, and we need to secure the resources to stop them!")**_

Let's win this thing,

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Liberty Report
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkbFu5CAQhp8Gd1gwYJMtXERyXCW5011xJcIwtpEAW4B3dW9_2ijZa1POfNI_M9_8edNvxgef1ncTcVhC1rnoZPTmQ6ABb75Qd3UaGHSUccpAi8YNjF-clA0OXInuSSipWLMNXHbCcpwVKGORzRfoLDBhYOkWvnDV-OGewzgD3oNi0Eronvqez7xX88X0M5HMBMy1XTKi26NJLvgZc_2b8dhzbe0emzBstR6FiGcCE4GpoD0zuva-cnEmYIvuJDA9agLTjLRuSBefS6V1pytW-uCFJrxRS8v_g2nBSsRULBEjY7KX7wwkvPJu_DG-vPwm0J816rKf2SIR45H3cqCtPq2fKKLzZyRixGh8-GxaEw_j10TEaMvHLO2u7gvuqWKqRIw_n-n0-ot-uWry4I6bD8GXXhHJ1nvih4n6zYddB_gXAAD__0HanfQ) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkbFu5CAQhp8Gd1gwYJMtXERyXCW5011xJcIwtpEAW4B3dW9_2ijZa1POfNI_M9_8edNvxgef1ncTcVhC1rnoZPTmQ6ABb75Qd3UaGHSUccpAi8YNjF-clA0OXInuSSipWLMNXHbCcpwVKGORzRfoLDBhYOkWvnDV-OGewzgD3oNi0Eronvqez7xX88X0M5HMBMy1XTKi26NJLvgZc_2b8dhzbe0emzBstR6FiGcCE4GpoD0zuva-cnEmYIvuJDA9agLTjLRuSBefS6V1pytW-uCFJrxRS8v_g2nBSsRULBEjY7KX7wwkvPJu_DG-vPwm0J816rKf2SIR45H3cqCtPq2fKKLzZyRixGh8-GxaEw_j10TEaMvHLO2u7gvuqWKqRIw_n-n0-ot-uWry4I6bD8GXXhHJ1nvih4n6zYddB_gXAAD__0HanfQ)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkbFu5CAQhp8Gd1gwYJMtXERyXCW5011xJcIwtpEAW4B3dW9_2ijZa1POfNI_M9_8edNvxgef1ncTcVhC1rnoZPTmQ6ABb75Qd3UaGHSUccpAi8YNjF-clA0OXInuSSipWLMNXHbCcpwVKGORzRfoLDBhYOkWvnDV-OGewzgD3oNi0Eronvqez7xX88X0M5HMBMy1XTKi26NJLvgZc_2b8dhzbe0emzBstR6FiGcCE4GpoD0zuva-cnEmYIvuJDA9agLTjLRuSBefS6V1pytW-uCFJrxRS8v_g2nBSsRULBEjY7KX7wwkvPJu_DG-vPwm0J816rKf2SIR45H3cqCtPq2fKKLzZyRixGh8-GxaEw_j10TEaMvHLO2u7gvuqWKqRIw_n-n0-ot-uWry4I6bD8GXXhHJ1nvih4n6zYddB_gXAAD__0HanfQ)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkbFu5CAQhp8Gd1gwYJMtXERyXCW5011xJcIwtpEAW4B3dW9_2ijZa1POfNI_M9_8edNvxgef1ncTcVhC1rnoZPTmQ6ABb75Qd3UaGHSUccpAi8YNjF-clA0OXInuSSipWLMNXHbCcpwVKGORzRfoLDBhYOkWvnDV-OGewzgD3oNi0Eronvqez7xX88X0M5HMBMy1XTKi26NJLvgZc_2b8dhzbe0emzBstR6FiGcCE4GpoD0zuva-cnEmYIvuJDA9agLTjLRuSBefS6V1pytW-uCFJrxRS8v_g2nBSsRULBEjY7KX7wwkvPJu_DG-vPwm0J816rKf2SIR45H3cqCtPq2fKKLzZyRixGh8-GxaEw_j10TEaMvHLO2u7gvuqWKqRIw_n-n0-ot-uWry4I6bD8GXXhHJ1nvih4n6zYddB_gXAAD__0HanfQ) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkbFu5CAQhp8Gd1gwYJMtXERyXCW5011xJcIwtpEAW4B3dW9_2ijZa1POfNI_M9_8edNvxgef1ncTcVhC1rnoZPTmQ6ABb75Qd3UaGHSUccpAi8YNjF-clA0OXInuSSipWLMNXHbCcpwVKGORzRfoLDBhYOkWvnDV-OGewzgD3oNi0Eronvqez7xX88X0M5HMBMy1XTKi26NJLvgZc_2b8dhzbe0emzBstR6FiGcCE4GpoD0zuva-cnEmYIvuJDA9agLTjLRuSBefS6V1pytW-uCFJrxRS8v_g2nBSsRULBEjY7KX7wwkvPJu_DG-vPwm0J816rKf2SIR45H3cqCtPq2fKKLzZyRixGh8-GxaEw_j10TEaMvHLO2u7gvuqWKqRIw_n-n0-ot-uWry4I6bD8GXXhHJ1nvih4n6zYddB_gXAAD__0HanfQ)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkbFu5CAQhp8Gd1gwYJMtXERyXCW5011xJcIwtpEAW4B3dW9_2ijZa1POfNI_M9_8edNvxgef1ncTcVhC1rnoZPTmQ6ABb75Qd3UaGHSUccpAi8YNjF-clA0OXInuSSipWLMNXHbCcpwVKGORzRfoLDBhYOkWvnDV-OGewzgD3oNi0Eronvqez7xX88X0M5HMBMy1XTKi26NJLvgZc_2b8dhzbe0emzBstR6FiGcCE4GpoD0zuva-cnEmYIvuJDA9agLTjLRuSBefS6V1pytW-uCFJrxRS8v_g2nBSsRULBEjY7KX7wwkvPJu_DG-vPwm0J816rKf2SIR45H3cqCtPq2fKKLzZyRixGh8-GxaEw_j10TEaMvHLO2u7gvuqWKqRIw_n-n0-ot-uWry4I6bD8GXXhHJ1nvih4n6zYddB_gXAAD__0HanfQ) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f2993d665414c048ab773f434ecfbee&_e=_x_c2QPTmNRgXfJWVHTdF0t6pfynkG08F2M1u5AEQUavejtXFzW7jKP5SO9s0sqUDcIrOK-c34jN1R6gxmX1FSB77pE_wpMp3ye8LiizrCIS-CfZ_AuNcLUzPseJI6CcICSSWS1h0TBNDr2bBPAElc1LGr35q9ruxKK0bWQE4ixhFRZRMw_SrSc8wVVvyqMFvuAFLh8f1Wim3p4unoXTzkaq3LnjrNVblEtOEf0Pri-4earpF25UKLHnRXfAxTs8mYvDwUfuDWn1V01dqi_b2nqtOj24sHnByuBA7y27r0I9H59ALvcQpQKzTi865O2bARYWAEvEN5ElcnWmdoJoC1EyJGL7jrTJUn8FLw5OVuPIV-EPRMHF1Cf_yM4b967JxatM1VQZYFZkKIEgXayNQw%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**

clean_body: My final chance to save my home... They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me. | Dear Friend, I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you. Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration. This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my final chance to save my home. Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th. During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s truly important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that eternal “heavenly treasures” await us. The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession. I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions. "For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? " (Mark 8:36) As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Hi Peter,
The first year of the incoming Trump administration will pose immediate threats to the care agenda, and **will require our persistent action** to ensure that our health care is protected and our community members are safe.
President-elect Donald Trump intends to make significant cuts to taxes that fund Medicaid and Social Security, and is already launching attacks against immigrants who have worked hard to build their lives and support their families in this country.
Our community of caregivers and allies would be seriously set back by these policy changes, which would be disastrous for the low-income families that rely on federally-funded critical programs for elderly and disability care the most.
**But, Peter, we have withstood the challenges of a Trump administration before, and we will do it again.**

clean_body: Sign the care agenda pledge today! Hi Peter, The first year of the incoming Trump administration will pose immediate threats to the care agenda, and will require our persistent action to ensure that our health care is protected and our community members are safe. President-elect Donald Trump intends to make significant cuts to taxes that fund Medicaid and Social Security, and is already launching attacks against immigrants who have worked hard to build their lives and support their families in this country. Our community of caregivers and allies would be seriously set back by these policy changes, which would be disastrous for the low-income families that rely on federally-funded critical programs for elderly and disability care the most. But, Peter, we have withstood the challenges of a Trump administration before, and we will do it again. ************** In these uncertain times, we know that finding strength in community is vital. Together, we will protect the care agenda and our community.** Thank you for standing with us. Care in Action

clean_body: | | | Oh boy... Trump has just nominated Devin Nunes, the CEO of Truth Social, to an intelligence role. Yes, you heard that right! This isn't about what's best for our national security—it's about rewarding Nunes for his relentless efforts to undermine the Trump-Russia investigation. It's cronyism at its worst, and it's happening right before our eyes. We need your help to fight back against this onslaught of corruption. Every dollar you donate will go toward our ad and billboard campaign, aimed at taking back Congress and stopping Trump from further eroding the very foundations of our country. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** This is yet another blatant example of Trump selling out our country for his own gain. He's not just bending the rules; he's shattering them, putting personal loyalty over the well-being of our nation. Nunes continues to help Trump spin the ridiculous narrative of himself as a victim of some “deep state” conspiracy. Our democracy is hanging by a thread, and we cannot sit idly by. Let's stand up for what's right! -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. Sign on NOW to support NPR >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20858?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250102-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250102-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&akid=19223%2E9716520%2EYMO-Ol)**

Team, Republicans and Elon Musk are _already_ retaliating against institutions that won't fall in line behind Trump **\-- and now they're planning to _DEFUND_ NPR!**

It's clear: Trump and his administration will go after ANY media institution that dares to provide accurate, non-biased reporting to the American people.

**We can't stay silent while Musk tears down long-trusted sources of critical information and reporting, so we've launched an URGENT Live Petition to prove where Americans stand.** But right now, your signature isn't on our list!

**Please add your name right away:****[Sign on to back NPR against Musk's revenge attacks >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20858?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250102-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250102-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&akid=19223%2E9716520%2EYMO-Ol)**

Team DSCC

name: David Hogg
subject: Time to get back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
Friend, **It’s taken me a few days for me to figure out what to say about the election without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next.** After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — **nothing would have changed.** Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 and passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times. This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either. Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge: We helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads. Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the GOP’s supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom. We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature. We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los Santos to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockley to be the youngest member of the Ohio House. Of course, these victories are bittersweet against the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them. Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and together with Serve America, we're ready to help even more young leaders succeed. [**Will you split a $20 donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America to help us recruit, train, and elect the next generation of progressive champions?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99742157/520729232/-150563143?refcode=250102_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQ1ZDFhNy0yOGM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IcxVp2YHZypnkv-S6CQSag81Ily4inBZ8sQK51thO-0=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99742158/520729233/-442632316?refcode=250102_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQ1ZDFhNy0yOGM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IcxVp2YHZypnkv-S6CQSag81Ily4inBZ8sQK51thO-0=) Hope is the most powerful force any movement can have. Thankfully, it is the one thing Donald Trump can’t take from us – the only way he truly wins is if we give up hope. I’m not. I know you won’t either. Thank you to everyone who has shown their support of our work. By joining forces with Serve America, we're building an even stronger movement to elect young progressive leaders. [**Will you chip in $20 now, split between our organizations, to help us continue this vital work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99742159/520729234/-150563143?refcode=250102_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQ1ZDFhNy0yOGM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IcxVp2YHZypnkv-S6CQSag81Ily4inBZ8sQK51thO-0=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99742160/520729235/-442632316?refcode=250102_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQ1ZDFhNy0yOGM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IcxVp2YHZypnkv-S6CQSag81Ily4inBZ8sQK51thO-0=) In service, David Hogg

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SdEVrZ-871qU4o1F46r7ww~~/AARclAA~/RgRpWVjuP0SpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ydWR5LWdpdWxpYW5pLWZyZWVkb20tZnVuZC03OWEzYWRmYS8wMTEzMzkxODllZTU1NzkwLz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDEyMjcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGM9VUNOLTIwMjUwMTAyJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9UldfQiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQVcDc3BjQgpnZYfDdmetK0RZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SdEVrZ-871qU4o1F46r7ww~~/AARclAA~/RgRpWVjuP0SpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ydWR5LWdpdWxpYW5pLWZyZWVkb20tZnVuZC03OWEzYWRmYS8wMTEzMzkxODllZTU1NzkwLz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDEyMjcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGM9VUNOLTIwMjUwMTAyJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9UldfQiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQVcDc3BjQgpnZYfDdmetK0RZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.

The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.

**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b399ee60b8c4964a8168bf2866c705e&_e=ncrnin8f8b5kZncdsHtvneCKXze1RNjvZL3pVzNnNbvdE52b9u_HMIxJVUA8FDRr7Ek8E8GGTfcWsXm5xV09jZeOdeX_XhZknzx7SC44RcQYvKgPv0DRajeeP_TNmlHTQjhc2UY05YVdkRjJxrghOjkSfK2wyO_MXnR-IgNa8pJPO8HMYlZqwEJIjTi3UiP4Rg_aRECRcEFEMUeVH5myXuZ2gVhUZea19wctOPdq3vy4INKDN2Xk3SJ0vCqlklVsgITWd6BopJzQYgWySmXZQPMcVCBJXaZX91dcm0b0YKVKBFPs70qgGqOKHtdxFc4FP9Ec_K5-owGEfzaF7zd-85vdIEMys16XnSIpJDeWlAiqCaWfPSoxg-PddXHUeJY_0ZzXGCgQzT6D7gyDxDSz4MGBfIo6YJLUGnEBo9rUkvkowm8KH6AWzBazwVE6VycA) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b399ee60b8c4964a8168bf2866c705e&_e=ncrnin8f8b5kZncdsHtvneCKXze1RNjvZL3pVzNnNbvdE52b9u_HMIxJVUA8FDRr7Ek8E8GGTfcWsXm5xV09jZeOdeX_XhZknzx7SC44RcQYvKgPv0DRajeeP_TNmlHTQjhc2UY05YVdkRjJxrghOjkSfK2wyO_MXnR-IgNa8pJPO8HMYlZqwEJIjTi3UiP4Rg_aRECRcEFEMUeVH5myXuZ2gVhUZea19wctOPdq3vy4INKDN2Xk3SJ0vCqlklVsgITWd6BopJzQYgWySmXZQPMcVCBJXaZX91dcm0b0YKV1E9_X4jcJNrIfCpGhBTdGHBp_Wgyiia6RRf_vc18fdyNN9HaVBdz80qkV_GxemwK41A8T7IhTQCT9i1QlGIsr3xwoHsHJhe2o7xddbDQhvkwtxigz2lK2RbUFq3quZ0VP5z_fh_N8P6mbzGzNs35d)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b399ee60b8c4964a8168bf2866c705e&_e=ncrnin8f8b5kZncdsHtvneCKXze1RNjvZL3pVzNnNbvdE52b9u_HMIxJVUA8FDRr7Ek8E8GGTfcWsXm5xV09jZeOdeX_XhZknzx7SC44RcQYvKgPv0DRajeeP_TNmlHTQjhc2UY05YVdkRjJxrghOjkSfK2wyO_MXnR-IgNa8pJPO8HMYlZqwEJIjTi3UiP4Rg_aRECRcEFEMUeVH5myXuZ2gVhUZea19wctOPdq3vy4INKDN2Xk3SJ0vCqlklVsgITWd6BopJzQYgWySmXZQPMcVCBJXaZX91dcm0b0YKVM2pUXzajcQnfX5-NQmAMWozXzPVLv8wCEWwJgamoMpO4QVykwrici9WHe21O4ZAjwntxJ32UwKXTbOZADCbBtnuJqGyNJxsEY2iRcUyzRCqY-fSV2euf91vK36yMDzXmtxjD5ePoSBDaYyKirOSfF),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b399ee60b8c4964a8168bf2866c705e&_e=ncrnin8f8b5kZncdsHtvneCKXze1RNjvZL3pVzNnNbvdE52b9u_HMIxJVUA8FDRr7Ek8E8GGTfcWsXm5xV09jZeOdeX_XhZknzx7SC44RcQYvKgPv0DRajeeP_TNmlHTQjhc2UY05YVdkRjJxrghOjkSfK2wyO_MXnR-IgNa8pJPO8HMYlZqwEJIjTi3UiP4Rg_aRECRcEFEMUeVH5myXuZ2gVhUZea19wctOPdq3vy4INKDN2Xk3SJ0vCqlklVsgITWd6BopJzQYgWySmXZQPMcVCBJXaZX91dcm0b0YKXvd98kOZi_i0FgN8volJsPLyMORreLjcU4d1NbMCLH4yOnpeLqEXwvgUoOljKQgnRMcMd43iPKX_IN6nz1tKlsyXLwr1yxEQA_4CFoDV_XIP7v51bJR2lEGcR3ZGy76lza4ekTYllTT20dj40xiI2r) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b399ee60b8c4964a8168bf2866c705e&_e=ncrnin8f8b5kZncdsHtvneCKXze1RNjvZL3pVzNnNbvdE52b9u_HMIxJVUA8FDRr7Ek8E8GGTfcWsXm5xV09jZeOdeX_XhZknzx7SC44RcQYvKgPv0DRajeeP_TNmlHTQjhc2UY05YVdkRjJxrghOjkSfK2wyO_MXnR-IgNa8pJPO8HMYlZqwEJIjTi3UiP4Rg_aRECRcEFEMUeVH5myXuZ2gVhUZea19wctOPdq3vy4INKDN2Xk3SJ0vCqlklVsgITWd6BopJzQYgWySmXZQPMcVCBJXaZX91dcm0b0YKVG1kEcJJvIZiOI1cAt1fC4HXJC22JVay3en02a2XyFtbtcSfPIgaBO6LpY851AMBSYT6v5YCosgfdin9sEPLlOxMPs8HuLK4BhKk49vk-Skcsjb2WDd1By0br06fR0TfiiAHo91nxB3caAsfgdEfNw)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b399ee60b8c4964a8168bf2866c705e&_e=ncrnin8f8b5kZncdsHtvneCKXze1RNjvZL3pVzNnNbvdE52b9u_HMIxJVUA8FDRr7Ek8E8GGTfcWsXm5xV09jZeOdeX_XhZknzx7SC44RcQYvKgPv0DRajeeP_TNmlHTQjhc2UY05YVdkRjJxrghOjkSfK2wyO_MXnR-IgNa8pJPO8HMYlZqwEJIjTi3UiP4Rg_aRECRcEFEMUeVH5myXuZ2gVhUZea19wctOPdq3vy4INKDN2Xk3SJ0vCqlklVsgITWd6BopJzQYgWySmXZQPMcVCBJXaZX91dcm0b0YKWfDWjvSq0wYoCbeN2-0In6YboQTWmqC1S_OXoOiF5s4tO2LquHpk-vR67Mh-TUP2hRhcjXbFMGtPHc_kq6M_Ouh1y0BF9K5yaOcYeHoihV6keOfRkuipmxmnZxjP3xLjqGft_n4_XLm5DcpQ5bQN8p) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: Happy New Year, 2025 General Assembly Session, New City Council, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
