Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want "SEVERE" sanctions against me.
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e43f30fa52e64a74af014ef2d5c5c65e&_e=UpqA1k4XcPVR7JyHOgJ8RyCHZ6gCvjmw9--n8U0fNs0mc_XN8ZmErSgRioT0ESIbLK0OXURo-ISxyMSYgDMA7Fv6cxWwrWoebKxHTaqIlCEZ91xKk13OFKdRk-EzfJSCCr0oKpa74YcVhhMt_EpKZ1PbtRzxnM_95s00rlIdcZFAvlEBnBaoJDP8_XB3sQryGsqUFx56TWSc6-fw5qpJT80nA6U8L6WY6Kriibmj9OCUNQjzMcCwjDNzZWuoqVBigBenpNU68UFefIBCzAQq3AG2P7LS3e0hKekj84S59kN6UM1IYYXg2ufB5S9HZRYc6-h3MfRo5y-2LdYEIDx7cpvQJ7PbPRt0DF6Peu5QgP-PqQSnmQw07BtD5FNma-2-fFRkmokvyHwQhJH-WE_MLQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn't want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 - just days before President Trump's inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there's no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what's _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go - homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ "heavenly treasures" await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I 'd rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I 'm asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e43f30fa52e64a74af014ef2d5c5c65e&_e=UpqA1k4XcPVR7JyHOgJ8RyCHZ6gCvjmw9--n8U0fNs0mc_XN8ZmErSgRioT0ESIbLK0OXURo-ISxyMSYgDMA7Fv6cxWwrWoebKxHTaqIlCEZ91xKk13OFKdRk-EzfJSCCr0oKpa74YcVhhMt_EpKZ1PbtRzxnM_95s00rlIdcZFAvlEBnBaoJDP8_XB3sQryGsqUFx56TWSc6-fw5qpJT80nA6U8L6WY6Kriibmj9OB774ubLluRRzMC94bOnShyZ4G5ywU-deqCZzKgOEOxqTEy-tJf25wKM4OU-ngLUH2rXsgfJQpobUw-DjV3FvE2Jp7SoS2q1QRaPAD9MwxawjNXleRzgby5Z6vK_JKSty-zWLjj1Zq8Xs0VQ8nPaXpAsehvozJxG_L3gBCIiq6jQw%3D%3D)

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Democrats are stepping up. Will you be one of them?
body:
Peter, our records show that your Democratic Membership requires activation.
Will you activate your membership before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025membership?refcode=010125_2]

Democrats are depending on this team to help protect our progress, take back the Senate, and stop Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda.
But according to official records, your 2025 Democratic Membership is still pending. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025membership?refcode=010125_2]
This grassroots community has always been the backbone of our successes—helping Democrats secure majorities, pass transformative policies, and stand strong against Republican obstruction.
But now, Trump’s allies have seized back power and are preparing to spend MILLIONS to hold onto control.
That’s why we’re reaching out to you directly, Peter. Will you activate your membership and join this history-making grassroots team? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025membership?refcode=010125_2]

body:

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b33edce7a5744b5a3016affffb1d6ff&_e=-CfMQnRwkOeT8YKUyq7L-NCxBblOnG8jxCy7jw1VTZm-snUzNEdPqs7UeOuFry9qy6nhpcSxwO9la1ceqCUtPIF6RQtlUHsYFgwbulBKsxBS2Jm-2JULz8WmsiwVZiQXyhIfHoV3Pu3kAnPX4jKWCYQhFEtnGKsY1xbPnPfQzEL5M62CP1v6GckIUxq9xwACKkGQq-VrebqGh3qyUubfCpNb2hvevuE2MDWxSTXb-g2SWTzdI5XMM2-UpcyurQRAaCXcF4hLfqO8jiv2tBkBd9Aj_hLTyNvyZfIjKb5fcZ9UiomsJf0QnZJJdlrtRcJdOxT7VqFMcl1_doC7FtJstQQsQGG5YLL0AktohrzSxMR-rSYpwYC7Q5-BvsdQ6jrQc9hKyQ4ybdgWlVT7rjtDOQ-GmsN_FUh_9gyxKAZEiUTsC6zO1q_FbHMwIboJWdto) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b33edce7a5744b5a3016affffb1d6ff&_e=-CfMQnRwkOeT8YKUyq7L-NCxBblOnG8jxCy7jw1VTZm-snUzNEdPqs7UeOuFry9qy6nhpcSxwO9la1ceqCUtPIF6RQtlUHsYFgwbulBKsxBS2Jm-2JULz8WmsiwVZiQXyhIfHoV3Pu3kAnPX4jKWCYQhFEtnGKsY1xbPnPfQzEL5M62CP1v6GckIUxq9xwACKkGQq-VrebqGh3qyUubfCpNb2hvevuE2MDWxSTXb-g2SWTzdI5XMM2-UpcyurQRAaCXcF4hLfqO8jiv2tBkBd9Aj_hLTyNvyZfIjKb5fcZ9NaJWc3L2KKOKXZDkHDbaehzmYZy9hOhWngz14-DL7m9mYly6p-Bs7f_LZthStBMY-GgVQTXjdIiaOfBVn69o0gYVp2enMZ27fpuFlKporAeZOCFHIa7ZXRJ8v8psD_emrtNuznstcHuUJC735vix4)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b33edce7a5744b5a3016affffb1d6ff&_e=-CfMQnRwkOeT8YKUyq7L-NCxBblOnG8jxCy7jw1VTZm-snUzNEdPqs7UeOuFry9qy6nhpcSxwO9la1ceqCUtPIF6RQtlUHsYFgwbulBKsxBS2Jm-2JULz8WmsiwVZiQXyhIfHoV3Pu3kAnPX4jKWCYQhFEtnGKsY1xbPnPfQzEL5M62CP1v6GckIUxq9xwACKkGQq-VrebqGh3qyUubfCpNb2hvevuE2MDWxSTXb-g2SWTzdI5XMM2-UpcyurQRAaCXcF4hLfqO8jiv2tBkBd9Aj_hLTyNvyZfIjKb5fcZ9Ks5e7PD-21UHDxpwrg0faMK2tN-xzkRT2VGJbmvu-xdquGkxoMfpMtBaRatXkzi2aFpTVFDfiebws2Fa-pC5ejiuP5hYuGCS8neF0pLAAtFCKljdzahqFcQtMEM4AQHHHBCITd4Tnqk6gQUNQrGQv),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b33edce7a5744b5a3016affffb1d6ff&_e=-CfMQnRwkOeT8YKUyq7L-NCxBblOnG8jxCy7jw1VTZm-snUzNEdPqs7UeOuFry9qy6nhpcSxwO9la1ceqCUtPIF6RQtlUHsYFgwbulBKsxBS2Jm-2JULz8WmsiwVZiQXyhIfHoV3Pu3kAnPX4jKWCYQhFEtnGKsY1xbPnPfQzEL5M62CP1v6GckIUxq9xwACKkGQq-VrebqGh3qyUubfCpNb2hvevuE2MDWxSTXb-g2SWTzdI5XMM2-UpcyurQRAaCXcF4hLfqO8jiv2tBkBd9Aj_hLTyNvyZfIjKb5fcZ80_eUKtUD8O74U6xMMyd393V8iKS059mDH3nzybV3_ApuWwRE-Xb9o_QmVgOR1LXrhCTdkZwbsLxjNo2SfemDFctxuwyfYXqqvz236QMtZmBB6-UQfhfKwScQ2ZUsqW5WAGPi3mm0_zIcN41ipejrU) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b33edce7a5744b5a3016affffb1d6ff&_e=-CfMQnRwkOeT8YKUyq7L-NCxBblOnG8jxCy7jw1VTZm-snUzNEdPqs7UeOuFry9qy6nhpcSxwO9la1ceqCUtPIF6RQtlUHsYFgwbulBKsxBS2Jm-2JULz8WmsiwVZiQXyhIfHoV3Pu3kAnPX4jKWCYQhFEtnGKsY1xbPnPfQzEL5M62CP1v6GckIUxq9xwACKkGQq-VrebqGh3qyUubfCpNb2hvevuE2MDWxSTXb-g2SWTzdI5XMM2-UpcyurQRAaCXcF4hLfqO8jiv2tBkBd9Aj_hLTyNvyZfIjKb5fcZ8hypGztaa_mncxxD16BTg57LLZFRPPwDWW-FizDARnhu37YpyGwb8H0JGAS_M-vTcftDosDhAqqDr0tz1lJTz-ost8isy0PT37tEyy_lfj8er-_pIauoCBVVGYQmuagEWJ-ZA3b6ybhZ56P6GNSAxA)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas man identified as suspect in deadly New Orleans truck attack,** " Texas Tribune's **Jasper Scherer** -- "Federal authorities said a Texas man was behind the wheel of a pickup truck that plowed into a crowd of New Year's revelers in New Orleans' French Quarter early Wednesday, killing at least 15 people and injuring dozens more.

The FBI identified the suspect as **Shamsud-Din Jabbar** , a 42-year-old U.S. citizen and Army veteran who lived in north Houston, public records show. After ramming into the crowd, Jabbar crashed the truck and opened fire on police, injuring two officers before he was fatally shot by law enforcement, FBI officials said.

Inside Jabbar's truck -- a Ford pickup that "appears to have been rented" -- was an Islamic State flag, weapons and a potential improvised explosive device, according to an FBI statement. The agency said it is investigating the slaughter as "an act of terrorism" and looking into how Jabbar gained possession of the vehicle. An FBI official said the agency believes Jabbar may have been working with accomplices, though none had been identified by Wednesday afternoon.

Lt. Gov.**Dan Patrick** confirmed that Jabbar "has been living in the Houston area." In a statement, the FBI's Houston office said it was "conducting law enforcement activity" with the Harris County Sheriff's Office near the intersection of Hugh Road and Crescent Peak Drive, the north Houston intersection where Jabbar's most recent known address was located.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/fbe9c8f8-434a-43d4-a804-70e0a169b804?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"This activity is related to this morning's New Orleans attack, but due to the ongoing nature of the investigation, no further information can be provided," the FBI statement read, noting that officials had secured the area and would be on site for several hours.

New Orleans Police Superintendent **Anne Kirkpatrick** said the act was intentional. Jabbar sped down Bourbon Street "at a very fast pace" and was "trying to run over as many people as he could," the police chief said, calling Jabbar "hell-bent on creating the carnage and the damage that he did."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/fbe9c8f8-434a-43d4-a804-70e0a169b804?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The city was set to host the Sugar Bowl -- a college football playoff quarterfinal matchup between Georgia and Notre Dame -- later Wednesday evening. The game was postponed until Thursday.

Gov. **Greg Abbott** said he had been briefed by Texas Department of Public Safety officials and was working with law enforcement "at every level to ensure we know exactly what happened," with "a special focus to ensure no one in Texas faces any safety threat."" ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas man identified as suspect in deadly New Orleans truck attack, " Texas Tribune's Jasper Scherer -- "Federal authorities said a Texas man was behind the wheel of a pickup truck that plowed into a crowd of New Year's revelers in New Orleans' French Quarter early Wednesday, killing at least 15 people and injuring dozens more. The FBI identified the suspect as Shamsud-Din Jabbar , a 42-year-old U.S. citizen and Army veteran who lived in north Houston, public records show. After ramming into the crowd, Jabbar crashed the truck and opened fire on police, injuring two officers before he was fatally shot by law enforcement, FBI officials said. Inside Jabbar's truck -- a Ford pickup that "appears to have been rented" -- was an Islamic State flag, weapons and a potential improvised explosive device, according to an FBI statement. The agency said it is investigating the slaughter as "an act of terrorism" and looking into how Jabbar gained possession of the vehicle. An FBI official said the agency believes Jabbar may have been working with accomplices, though none had been identified by Wednesday afternoon. Lt. Gov.Dan Patrick confirmed that Jabbar "has been living in the Houston area." In a statement, the FBI's Houston office said it was "conducting law enforcement activity" with the Harris County Sheriff's Office near the intersection of Hugh Road and Crescent Peak Drive, the north Houston intersection where Jabbar's most recent known address was located. "This activity is related to this morning's New Orleans attack, but due to the ongoing nature of the investigation, no further information can be provided," the FBI statement read, noting that officials had secured the area and would be on site for several hours. New Orleans Police Superintendent Anne Kirkpatrick said the act was intentional. Jabbar sped down Bourbon Street "at a very fast pace" and was "trying to run over as many people as he could," the police chief said, calling Jabbar "hell-bent on creating the carnage and the damage that he did." The city was set to host the Sugar Bowl -- a college football playoff quarterfinal matchup between Georgia and Notre Dame -- later Wednesday evening. The game was postponed until Thursday. Gov. Greg Abbott said he had been briefed by Texas Department of Public Safety officials and was working with law enforcement "at every level to ensure we know exactly what happened," with "a special focus to ensure no one in Texas faces any safety threat."" Lt. Gov.**Dan Patrick** confirmed that Jabbar "has been living in the Houston area." In a statement, the FBI's Houston office said it was "conducting law enforcement activity" with the Harris County Sheriff's Office near the intersection of Hugh Road and Crescent Peak Drive, the north Houston intersection where Jabbar's most recent known address was located.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/95adb004-5d35-42a6-8fcc-89d4a0216cc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"This activity is related to this morning's New Orleans attack, but due to the ongoing nature of the investigation, no further information can be provided," the FBI statement read, noting that officials had secured the area and would be on site for several hours.

New Orleans Police Superintendent **Anne Kirkpatrick** said the act was intentional. Jabbar sped down Bourbon Street "at a very fast pace" and was "trying to run over as many people as he could," the police chief said, calling Jabbar "hell-bent on creating the carnage and the damage that he did."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/95adb004-5d35-42a6-8fcc-89d4a0216cc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The city was set to host the Sugar Bowl -- a college football playoff quarterfinal matchup between Georgia and Notre Dame -- later Wednesday evening. The game was postponed until Thursday.

Gov. **Greg Abbott** said he had been briefed by Texas Department of Public Safety officials and was working with law enforcement "at every level to ensure we know exactly what happened," with "a special focus to ensure no one in Texas faces any safety threat."" ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas man identified as suspect in deadly New Orleans truck attack, " Texas Tribune's Jasper Scherer -- "Federal authorities said a Texas man was behind the wheel of a pickup truck that plowed into a crowd of New Year's revelers in New Orleans' French Quarter early Wednesday, killing at least 15 people and injuring dozens more. The FBI identified the suspect as Shamsud-Din Jabbar , a 42-year-old U.S. citizen and Army veteran who lived in north Houston, public records show. After ramming into the crowd, Jabbar crashed the truck and opened fire on police, injuring two officers before he was fatally shot by law enforcement, FBI officials said. Inside Jabbar's truck -- a Ford pickup that "appears to have been rented" -- was an Islamic State flag, weapons and a potential improvised explosive device, according to an FBI statement. The agency said it is investigating the slaughter as "an act of terrorism" and looking into how Jabbar gained possession of the vehicle. An FBI official said the agency believes Jabbar may have been working with accomplices, though none had been identified by Wednesday afternoon. Lt. Gov.Dan Patrick confirmed that Jabbar "has been living in the Houston area." In a statement, the FBI's Houston office said it was "conducting law enforcement activity" with the Harris County Sheriff's Office near the intersection of Hugh Road and Crescent Peak Drive, the north Houston intersection where Jabbar's most recent known address was located. "This activity is related to this morning's New Orleans attack, but due to the ongoing nature of the investigation, no further information can be provided," the FBI statement read, noting that officials had secured the area and would be on site for several hours. New Orleans Police Superintendent Anne Kirkpatrick said the act was intentional. Jabbar sped down Bourbon Street "at a very fast pace" and was "trying to run over as many people as he could," the police chief said, calling Jabbar "hell-bent on creating the carnage and the damage that he did." The city was set to host the Sugar Bowl -- a college football playoff quarterfinal matchup between Georgia and Notre Dame -- later Wednesday evening. The game was postponed until Thursday. Gov. Greg Abbott said he had been briefed by Texas Department of Public Safety officials and was working with law enforcement "at every level to ensure we know exactly what happened," with "a special focus to ensure no one in Texas faces any safety threat."" body:
Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22704%2E4449941%2Ejwohib)
---
Hello,

Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists after Trump made that one of the priorities for his first day.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond.** Our data for your state is incomplete without your responses.

* **TOP NEWS**

“**Texas man identified as suspect in deadly New Orleans truck attack,** ” Texas Tribune's **Jasper Scherer** — “Federal authorities said a Texas man was behind the wheel of a pickup truck that plowed into a crowd of New Year’s revelers in New Orleans’ French Quarter early Wednesday, killing at least 15 people and injuring dozens more.

The FBI identified the suspect as **Shamsud-Din Jabbar** , a 42-year-old U.S. citizen and Army veteran who lived in north Houston, public records show. After ramming into the crowd, Jabbar crashed the truck and opened fire on police, injuring two officers before he was fatally shot by law enforcement, FBI officials said.

Inside Jabbar’s truck — a Ford pickup that “appears to have been rented” — was an Islamic State flag, weapons and a potential improvised explosive device, according to an FBI statement. The agency said it is investigating the slaughter as “an act of terrorism” and looking into how Jabbar gained possession of the vehicle. An FBI official said the agency believes Jabbar may have been working with accomplices, though none had been identified by Wednesday afternoon.

Lt. Gov.**Dan Patrick** confirmed that Jabbar "has been living in the Houston area." In a statement, the FBI's Houston office said it was "conducting law enforcement activity" with the Harris County Sheriff's Office near the intersection of Hugh Road and Crescent Peak Drive, the north Houston intersection where Jabbar's most recent known address was located.

Thank you for reading as a FREE subscriber. » Become a PAID subscriber for $7mo or $70/yr and SAVE TIME and be BETTER INFORMED. We hope you had a wonderful holiday. | “If something of importance is known in Texas, Matt knows it. With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed.” – Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) | AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . » Read this morning 's (free) edition . > SUBSCRIBE HERE: . ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) | TOP NEWS “Texas man identified as suspect in deadly New Orleans truck attack, ” Texas Tribune's Jasper Scherer — “Federal authorities said a Texas man was behind the wheel of a pickup truck that plowed into a crowd of New Year’s revelers in New Orleans’ French Quarter early Wednesday, killing at least 15 people and injuring dozens more. The FBI identified the suspect as Shamsud-Din Jabbar , a 42-year-old U.S. citizen and Army veteran who lived in north Houston, public records show. After ramming into the crowd, Jabbar crashed the truck and opened fire on police, injuring two officers before he was fatally shot by law enforcement, FBI officials said. Inside Jabbar’s truck — a Ford pickup that “appears to have been rented” — was an Islamic State flag, weapons and a potential improvised explosive device, according to an FBI statement. The agency said it is investigating the slaughter as “an act of terrorism” and looking into how Jabbar gained possession of the vehicle. An FBI official said the agency believes Jabbar may have been working with accomplices, though none had been identified by Wednesday afternoon. Lt. Gov.Dan Patrick confirmed that Jabbar "has been living in the Houston area." In a statement, the FBI's Houston office said it was "conducting law enforcement activity" with the Harris County Sheriff's Office near the intersection of Hugh Road and Crescent Peak Drive, the north Houston intersection where Jabbar's most recent known address was located. » "This activity is related to this morning's New Orleans attack, but due to the ongoing nature of the investigation, no further information can be provided," the FBI statement read, noting that officials had secured the area and would be on site for several hours. New Orleans Police Superintendent Anne Kirkpatrick said the act was intentional. Jabbar sped down Bourbon Street “at a very fast pace” and was “trying to run over as many people as he could,” the police chief said, calling Jabbar “hell-bent on creating the carnage and the damage that he did.” » The city was set to host the Sugar Bowl — a college football playoff quarterfinal matchup between Georgia and Notre Dame — later Wednesday evening. The game was postponed until Thursday. Gov. Greg Abbott said he had been briefed by Texas Department of Public Safety officials and was working with law enforcement “at every level to ensure we know exactly what happened,” with “a special focus to ensure no one in Texas faces any safety threat.”" | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. | [ ](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUksuK3DoURb9GnqmQjh6WBx40GN8bSHdCaMjQSNZRtUCWjaxKU38fXOVAphlpr81C75-v06uNKebrm12wD6lMZZ_mfZ_yfF03WuOCdMe809s2AQNFGacMJtH4nvHOS9lgz1uhjJRas-ajZwZkK11rUXPlmOiEMEGGzmmU2jPdxP6Yh3EGvJUdExcVWMsVaCYM46bTRDKbsNRLKIh-XWz2KTos9V5wW0u9zOvSpP6j1m0n4oXASGDccb4VvHzGXNAfBoExr6V-0NmWNcVsacHt5lKcbaabLfVOYEQQwVGjQtDUKyWRugBGUMONAyLGHbOfoidiwGVybTdj13GOYg6MW6Gl4cqZjikC-laXqc5EDOPXH_TPCQlou1ROxMDVMwMRA5xZEDEo9szycNgJ6iGdoB_WCe1TO8k8vZO6p3jQemwk2LQjAb2sGe-TWxf3V1mO-yoxX4kYarkdlUfrU8x4LMEJKPGiOgIK2PfXx_D-7e3Lf_-_E9BN6f32GVOKu26JZNfFxvR4lvovX-hXD78DAAD__2pQvXA) Fellow Conservative, As Executive Director of the NCGOP, I'm writing to you today with an **[urgent update](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUksuK3DoURb9GnqmQjh6WBx40GN8bSHdCaMjQSNZRtUCWjaxKU38fXOVAphlpr81C75-v06uNKebrm12wD6lMZZ_mfZ_yfF03WuOCdMe809s2AQNFGacMJtH4nvHOS9lgz1uhjJRas-ajZwZkK11rUXPlmOiEMEGGzmmU2jPdxP6Yh3EGvJUdExcVWMsVaCYM46bTRDKbsNRLKIh-XWz2KTos9V5wW0u9zOvSpP6j1m0n4oXASGDccb4VvHzGXNAfBoExr6V-0NmWNcVsacHt5lKcbaabLfVOYEQQwVGjQtDUKyWRugBGUMONAyLGHbOfoidiwGVybTdj13GOYg6MW6Gl4cqZjikC-laXqc5EDOPXH_TPCQlou1ROxMDVMwMRA5xZEDEo9szycNgJ6iGdoB_WCe1TO8k8vZO6p3jQemwk2LQjAb2sGe-TWxf3V1mO-yoxX4kYarkdlUfrU8x4LMEJKPGiOgIK2PfXx_D-7e3Lf_-_E9BN6f32GVOKu26JZNfFxvR4lvovX-hXD78DAAD__2pQvXA)** on our efforts to support President-elect Trump and our Republican candidates in the 2026 midterms. With [RNC Chair Michael Whatley](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUksuK3DoURb9GnqmQjh6WBx40GN8bSHdCaMjQSNZRtUCWjaxKU38fXOVAphlpr81C75-v06uNKebrm12wD6lMZZ_mfZ_yfF03WuOCdMe809s2AQNFGacMJtH4nvHOS9lgz1uhjJRas-ajZwZkK11rUXPlmOiEMEGGzmmU2jPdxP6Yh3EGvJUdExcVWMsVaCYM46bTRDKbsNRLKIh-XWz2KTos9V5wW0u9zOvSpP6j1m0n4oXASGDccb4VvHzGXNAfBoExr6V-0NmWNcVsacHt5lKcbaabLfVOYEQQwVGjQtDUKyWRugBGUMONAyLGHbOfoidiwGVybTdj13GOYg6MW6Gl4cqZjikC-laXqc5EDOPXH_TPCQlou1ROxMDVMwMRA5xZEDEo9szycNgJ6iGdoB_WCe1TO8k8vZO6p3jQemwk2LQjAb2sGe-TWxf3V1mO-yoxX4kYarkdlUfrU8x4LMEJKPGiOgIK2PfXx_D-7e3Lf_-_E9BN6f32GVOKu26JZNfFxvR4lvovX-hXD78DAAD__2pQvXA) recently revealing that President-elect Trump will play a "**[significant](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUksuK3DoURb9GnqmQjh6WBx40GN8bSHdCaMjQSNZRtUCWjaxKU38fXOVAphlpr81C75-v06uNKebrm12wD6lMZZ_mfZ_yfF03WuOCdMe809s2AQNFGacMJtH4nvHOS9lgz1uhjJRas-ajZwZkK11rUXPlmOiEMEGGzmmU2jPdxP6Yh3EGvJUdExcVWMsVaCYM46bTRDKbsNRLKIh-XWz2KTos9V5wW0u9zOvSpP6j1m0n4oXASGDccb4VvHzGXNAfBoExr6V-0NmWNcVsacHt5lKcbaabLfVOYEQQwVGjQtDUKyWRugBGUMONAyLGHbOfoidiwGVybTdj13GOYg6MW6Gl4cqZjikC-laXqc5EDOPXH_TPCQlou1ROxMDVMwMRA5xZEDEo9szycNgJ6iGdoB_WCe1TO8k8vZO6p3jQemwk2LQjAb2sGe-TWxf3V1mO-yoxX4kYarkdlUfrU8x4LMEJKPGiOgIK2PfXx_D-7e3Lf_-_E9BN6f32GVOKu26JZNfFxvR4lvovX-hXD78DAAD__2pQvXA)** " role in supporting our GOP candidates in the upcoming elections, we need your help now more than ever. There's an [_important message_](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUksuK3DoURb9GnqmQjh6WBx40GN8bSHdCaMjQSNZRtUCWjaxKU38fXOVAphlpr81C75-v06uNKebrm12wD6lMZZ_mfZ_yfF03WuOCdMe809s2AQNFGacMJtH4nvHOS9lgz1uhjJRas-ajZwZkK11rUXPlmOiEMEGGzmmU2jPdxP6Yh3EGvJUdExcVWMsVaCYM46bTRDKbsNRLKIh-XWz2KTos9V5wW0u9zOvSpP6j1m0n4oXASGDccb4VvHzGXNAfBoExr6V-0NmWNcVsacHt5lKcbaabLfVOYEQQwVGjQtDUKyWRugBGUMONAyLGHbOfoidiwGVybTdj13GOYg6MW6Gl4cqZjikC-laXqc5EDOPXH_TPCQlou1ROxMDVMwMRA5xZEDEo9szycNgJ6iGdoB_WCe1TO8k8vZO6p3jQemwk2LQjAb2sGe-TWxf3V1mO-yoxX4kYarkdlUfrU8x4LMEJKPGiOgIK2PfXx_D-7e3Lf_-_E9BN6f32GVOKu26JZNfFxvR4lvovX-hXD78DAAD__2pQvXA) about the midterms that you need to see - it's critical that you read it before it expires. [**https://secure.winred.com/north-carolina-republican-party/e23fb-85ff6-d554e-bf283-818b2**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUksuK3DoURb9GnqmQjh6WBx40GN8bSHdCaMjQSNZRtUCWjaxKU38fXOVAphlpr81C75-v06uNKebrm12wD6lMZZ_mfZ_yfF03WuOCdMe809s2AQNFGacMJtH4nvHOS9lgz1uhjJRas-ajZwZkK11rUXPlmOiEMEGGzmmU2jPdxP6Yh3EGvJUdExcVWMsVaCYM46bTRDKbsNRLKIh-XWz2KTos9V5wW0u9zOvSpP6j1m0n4oXASGDccb4VvHzGXNAfBoExr6V-0NmWNcVsacHt5lKcbaabLfVOYEQQwVGjQtDUKyWRugBGUMONAyLGHbOfoidiwGVybTdj13GOYg6MW6Gl4cqZjikC-laXqc5EDOPXH_TPCQlou1ROxMDVMwMRA5xZEDEo9szycNgJ6iGdoB_WCe1TO8k8vZO6p3jQemwk2LQjAb2sGe-TWxf3V1mO-yoxX4kYarkdlUfrU8x4LMEJKPGiOgIK2PfXx_D-7e3Lf_-_E9BN6f32GVOKu26JZNfFxvR4lvovX-hXD78DAAD__2pQvXA)
This message is too **[important](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUksuK3DoURb9GnqmQjh6WBx40GN8bSHdCaMjQSNZRtUCWjaxKU38fXOVAphlpr81C75-v06uNKebrm12wD6lMZZ_mfZ_yfF03WuOCdMe809s2AQNFGacMJtH4nvHOS9lgz1uhjJRas-ajZwZkK11rUXPlmOiEMEGGzmmU2jPdxP6Yh3EGvJUdExcVWMsVaCYM46bTRDKbsNRLKIh-XWz2KTos9V5wW0u9zOvSpP6j1m0n4oXASGDccb4VvHzGXNAfBoExr6V-0NmWNcVsacHt5lKcbaabLfVOYEQQwVGjQtDUKyWRugBGUMONAyLGHbOfoidiwGVybTdj13GOYg6MW6Gl4cqZjikC-laXqc5EDOPXH_TPCQlou1ROxMDVMwMRA5xZEDEo9szycNgJ6iGdoB_WCe1TO8k8vZO6p3jQemwk2LQjAb2sGe-TWxf3V1mO-yoxX4kYarkdlUfrU8x4LMEJKPGiOgIK2PfXx_D-7e3Lf_-_E9BN6f32GVOKu26JZNfFxvR4lvovX-hXD78DAAD__2pQvXA)** to wait - every minute counts in our fight to win your community for President Trump and our Republican candidates. name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2PdyG9NV3U3Hh85ygpwBrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpWWqCP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDEwMlcDc3BjQgpnZRjSdme2M3E6UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2PdyG9NV3U3Hh85ygpwBrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpWWqCP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDEwMlcDc3BjQgpnZRjSdme2M3E6UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2PdyG9NV3U3Hh85ygpwBrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpWWqCP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDEwMlcDc3BjQgpnZRjSdme2M3E6UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2PdyG9NV3U3Hh85ygpwBrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpWWqCP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDEwMlcDc3BjQgpnZRjSdme2M3E6UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2PdyG9NV3U3Hh85ygpwBrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpWWqCP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDEwMlcDc3BjQgpnZRjSdme2M3E6UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2PdyG9NV3U3Hh85ygpwBrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpWWqCP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDEwMlcDc3BjQgpnZRjSdme2M3E6UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

body:
You won't believe what RNC Chair Michael Whatley just revealed about President-elect Trump's plan to support our GOP candidates in 2026...

| [ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NzVeX42mJdFlIn2l54dOmg~~/AARclAA~~~) Fellow Conservative, As Executive Director of the NCGOP, I'm writing to you today with an **[urgent update](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NzVeX42mJdFlIn2l54dOmg~~/AARclAA~~~)** on our efforts to support President-elect Trump and our Republican candidates in the 2026 midterms. With [RNC Chair Michael Whatley](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NzVeX42mJdFlIn2l54dOmg~~/AARclAA~~~) recently revealing that President-elect Trump will play a "**[significant](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NzVeX42mJdFlIn2l54dOmg~~/AARclAA~~~)** " role in supporting our GOP candidates in the upcoming elections, we need your help now more than ever. There's an [_important message_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NzVeX42mJdFlIn2l54dOmg~~/AARclAA~~~) about the midterms that you need to see - it's critical that you read it before it expires. [**https://secure.winred.com/north-carolina-republican-party/e23fb-85ff6-d554e-bf283-818b2**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NzVeX42mJdFlIn2l54dOmg~~/AARclAA~~~)
This message is too **[important](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NzVeX42mJdFlIn2l54dOmg~~/AARclAA~~~)** to wait - every minute counts in our fight to win your community for President Trump and our Republican candidates. I **[urge](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NzVeX42mJdFlIn2l54dOmg~~/AARclAA~~~)** you to take action today. Thank you for your continued support, Fellow Conservative. **Sincerely,**

name: COURIER
subject: There’s still time to give your feedback, Peter
body:
It’s your last chance to complete our 2024 election debrief survey

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99747048/520745111/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjE0ODc2YTItMzJjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hIQeeOtnpaDEk7bdXL9k6daG0YTWnhAtEe0RcQE3IAw=&emci=63c8678e-25c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=f14876a2-32c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=14016711)
Peter –
As Trump prepares to take office, COURIER is gearing up to fight back against the right-wing media machine that delivered him the presidency.
Recently, we asked COURIER supporters to share their thoughts on the 2024 election and the state of the media. The results are in, and one thing is clear: **progressives want a bold alternative to the failing mainstream media and the MAGA misinformation machine.**
If you haven’t yet shared your thoughts, it’s not too late. Your voice is critical to shaping COURIER’s strategy for 2025.
**[Take the Survey Now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99747049/520745112/1446928366?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjE0ODc2YTItMzJjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hIQeeOtnpaDEk7bdXL9k6daG0YTWnhAtEe0RcQE3IAw=&emci=63c8678e-25c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=f14876a2-32c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=14016711)**
Here’s what other COURIER supporters have said so far:
* **45%** get their news online, through email newsletters, or on social media.
* **38%** graded mainstream media’s Trump coverage “D” or “F.”
* **91%** believe progressives aren’t doing enough to counter the right’s lies.

**We need to know where you stand.** Do you agree? Your perspective is essential as we work to build a winning strategy to combat Trump’s propaganda machine and defend democracy.
**[Take the Survey and Chip In!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99747050/520745114/1446928366?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjE0ODc2YTItMzJjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hIQeeOtnpaDEk7bdXL9k6daG0YTWnhAtEe0RcQE3IAw=&emci=63c8678e-25c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=f14876a2-32c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=14016711)**
Together, we can build the progressive media network this moment demands. Thank you for being part of this critical mission.
The COURIER Team

clean_body: It’s your last chance to complete our 2024 election debrief survey Peter – As Trump prepares to take office, COURIER is gearing up to fight back against the right-wing media machine that delivered him the presidency. Recently, we asked COURIER supporters to share their thoughts on the 2024 election and the state of the media. The results are in, and one thing is clear: progressives want a bold alternative to the failing mainstream media and the MAGA misinformation machine. If you haven’t yet shared your thoughts, it’s not too late. Your voice is critical to shaping COURIER’s strategy for 2025. Here’s what other COURIER supporters have said so far: 45% get their news online, through email newsletters, or on social media. 38% graded mainstream media’s Trump coverage “D” or “F.” 91% believe progressives aren’t doing enough to counter the right’s lies. We need to know where you stand. Do you agree? Your perspective is essential as we work to build a winning strategy to combat Trump’s propaganda machine and defend democracy. Together, we can build the progressive media network this moment demands. Thank you for being part of this critical mission. The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ce2ac54be3df4ca49e1847fa49413487&_t=Ozq8TyBSKjtthTive_kkhwPRWDoGiIoTcxKpPwMUFyDdUe_D-4vtoKicOWJpEqQYA39jgi1Rc_Mn4ZrVRjqnXXwHCddoyTfnmRPAY67_zdnuznaxmSt2mabeG41JvWp0)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ce2ac54be3df4ca49e1847fa49413487&_e=8qvVUxNBt8RS-h8AhtekLkN6VHhmEydsHRcShYbzQMoTjzRHTN6NLV3pQrNEJ7-IZ9X8GkB6vNdcEjLz1CJ3jG1q_WL6X0qMptaz6M0nDyjKdG-EYB5IWcjkCUcHGMRufCZWJkboZxTu-aDpVAK0PjnmlPE7xHvdpi50VkoG2Ph6508Vek-t_fZ0_i2_t9OZgOpHstWUlCXSE1J2LQd19bFX-N7Leanm7gVLjxv-nHUNcxHOQF2at6VicgqT9qaX8ArFi1orORcWfxPb1EsRxqpznKYx0_OR_ApeUPGtuzF7XS_Qm7S3bUClV-D-JsLnelYgZMi6X7nanWuc3WcAwmXwTH9a4FGqvI6EZionPu2_Spa25h-IZPfsrRRd7cKo)

| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ce2ac54be3df4ca49e1847fa49413487&_e=8qvVUxNBt8RS-h8AhtekLkN6VHhmEydsHRcShYbzQMoTjzRHTN6NLV3pQrNEJ7-I4zwRZoJpDAi4Opv07CuC63mQ48WQIQWGnhiOlM2PtyRUdISgPmv1f3_WdizWk7f8_cscKw2Fk7NLIz4Ndy4EE9EQDgS06WFCm1HmJu5Bb0zc_8cuIqDK3yDZYN-RS9vwkmTaMy5cYKth31T-jLRZ-6YW45T6FpE1gBjdILLFEJW8GJi85V2Os2NFUxmrcT1QsEKMQ4pbh1JOiLqcnilTmFjRQjrrT1uhABJBUukJJ79vHVgfulzTNTiPPwplj6RdR8QBJwrp1Pp5Hwjx0TkI47PL7tU3KtYneMx_LTRCWOJC2WrB8hJR-u1MMOmuoMsG)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ce2ac54be3df4ca49e1847fa49413487&_e=8qvVUxNBt8RS-h8AhtekLkN6VHhmEydsHRcShYbzQMoTjzRHTN6NLV3pQrNEJ7-I4zwRZoJpDAi4Opv07CuC63mQ48WQIQWGnhiOlM2PtyRUdISgPmv1f3_WdizWk7f8_cscKw2Fk7NLIz4Ndy4EE9EQDgS06WFCm1HmJu5Bb0zc_8cuIqDK3yDZYN-RS9vwkmTaMy5cYKth31T-jLRZ-6YW45T6FpE1gBjdILLFEJVE77nLiZgl88C-jV1nW72xxM39BQKOkLKPYXZN2dGZ7AbWoaGyyyMm6Os2e_UFDJHapkeKnPlQZ6Kdp9LddrBflCxuIGWFem1ElugHvG2Y5a3xrgokRapeXJW06gmFaNnsILGg2Ifh5WRmnfTmP0tX)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=557d6844842a417eb86384456ef7d54d&_e=9PVjc94l0wi5luhJUlj1uEx1XzBPnl2ab0acHtaH5a5Glhj-TjfDJaEELfn4j8pf3T-fpnoxh2Ncylj6rJqAih8y0BONn24iMn6Q-5Zm7SZ07vNYnY6DtHCIkx7I8kLH33YlxEWu-szBgz-VQBLKuHOpgM6WKfwXrVVDe5Z21bi7VXe1RUMFxs2DVf4GShwWEpS4lH5ITjigZTeKRRytBIA_ah0rPCYz3gCiBQRfg2lhUVkkUjigzoxjHhD4Jix8-ZmIMYzeSzF-5icN-qwAQABFochh-4LtccGO-xLwiQ1vpZcH2Egz8AyNowua3dLClsuLWRq0UNPu54zwwQ_YweIUtY1uXkdSj4CBki0oVEmaW0jp8VOd9pPV4SpDAKAjn1tcXisEsrDhKC5pl5eqTceFe60ltXvh-ThPZcT0vY8-ZDbRn4jav5egtBRHpH_p) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=557d6844842a417eb86384456ef7d54d&_e=9PVjc94l0wi5luhJUlj1uEx1XzBPnl2ab0acHtaH5a5Glhj-TjfDJaEELfn4j8pf3T-fpnoxh2Ncylj6rJqAih8y0BONn24iMn6Q-5Zm7SZ07vNYnY6DtHCIkx7I8kLH33YlxEWu-szBgz-VQBLKuHOpgM6WKfwXrVVDe5Z21bi7VXe1RUMFxs2DVf4GShwWEpS4lH5ITjigZTeKRRytBIA_ah0rPCYz3gCiBQRfg2lhUVkkUjigzoxjHhD4Jix8-ZmIMYzeSzF-5icN-qwAQABFochh-4LtccGO-xLwiQ17dqJHjw_6CU8-rK7JpHnkJGkRmyODm6_WYx_9m5sb5QmbHiRrWVB3qvjMi18GRDeQuEugIvAWRdkWA6pnNhkwIzYgs3I1V7sfzbFW_dRLPHCsGD-fLyG7DesWDJTq3CjGg6DSrlGnpNXhl1EJU7IF)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=557d6844842a417eb86384456ef7d54d&_e=9PVjc94l0wi5luhJUlj1uEx1XzBPnl2ab0acHtaH5a5Glhj-TjfDJaEELfn4j8pf3T-fpnoxh2Ncylj6rJqAih8y0BONn24iMn6Q-5Zm7SZ07vNYnY6DtHCIkx7I8kLH33YlxEWu-szBgz-VQBLKuHOpgM6WKfwXrVVDe5Z21bi7VXe1RUMFxs2DVf4GShwWEpS4lH5ITjigZTeKRRytBIA_ah0rPCYz3gCiBQRfg2lhUVkkUjigzoxjHhD4Jix8-ZmIMYzeSzF-5icN-qwAQABFochh-4LtccGO-xLwiQ3htzkG0_v_nSq1-yH9krFFue52uuQs_A_5RXrsy0VFoFdFQ4448bfuqzM4XQyLjMFBZy2RnM5D9HOqSK_2WaWr9jCysz_9mGklOjSJv8-5M7WXQ9iWXSUEYm4Laa4GOV80PVRX45grFZJM902oklJA),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=557d6844842a417eb86384456ef7d54d&_e=9PVjc94l0wi5luhJUlj1uEx1XzBPnl2ab0acHtaH5a5Glhj-TjfDJaEELfn4j8pf3T-fpnoxh2Ncylj6rJqAih8y0BONn24iMn6Q-5Zm7SZ07vNYnY6DtHCIkx7I8kLH33YlxEWu-szBgz-VQBLKuHOpgM6WKfwXrVVDe5Z21bi7VXe1RUMFxs2DVf4GShwWEpS4lH5ITjigZTeKRRytBIA_ah0rPCYz3gCiBQRfg2lhUVkkUjigzoxjHhD4Jix8-ZmIMYzeSzF-5icN-qwAQABFochh-4LtccGO-xLwiQ1bnxFj4A1_wsLV8t3jngb8lhRbmLzn6hw6a2fax3AoPWahX6PqydNjeGD1OkOwRcbBXOU75mNE9H0lB_K2V9PYXPLPgdgc1Lq0b5TVDL8p2-X7D-yevE1oDiBWpmsDt57x_dad4s58VfCBzgL0s9Qv) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=557d6844842a417eb86384456ef7d54d&_e=9PVjc94l0wi5luhJUlj1uEx1XzBPnl2ab0acHtaH5a5Glhj-TjfDJaEELfn4j8pf3T-fpnoxh2Ncylj6rJqAih8y0BONn24iMn6Q-5Zm7SZ07vNYnY6DtHCIkx7I8kLH33YlxEWu-szBgz-VQBLKuHOpgM6WKfwXrVVDe5Z21bi7VXe1RUMFxs2DVf4GShwWEpS4lH5ITjigZTeKRRytBIA_ah0rPCYz3gCiBQRfg2lhUVkkUjigzoxjHhD4Jix8-ZmIMYzeSzF-5icN-qwAQABFochh-4LtccGO-xLwiQ1ZM9oHflR-IE0eAE2PgE_3PmaiPt6mcOHKppMifC1Ehcs6byJMD8214EWlEqzTtpDpVIRwU1tSWVpzJKPFWLl3BqhWDSeWO2YZHwoYHqb4spevcp4ijye9SNn429-ShKFIw7tgCow-d7nmb4pY1vsw)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=557d6844842a417eb86384456ef7d54d&_e=9PVjc94l0wi5luhJUlj1uEx1XzBPnl2ab0acHtaH5a5Glhj-TjfDJaEELfn4j8pf3T-fpnoxh2Ncylj6rJqAih8y0BONn24iMn6Q-5Zm7SZ07vNYnY6DtHCIkx7I8kLH33YlxEWu-szBgz-VQBLKuHOpgM6WKfwXrVVDe5Z21bi7VXe1RUMFxs2DVf4GShwWEpS4lH5ITjigZTeKRRytBIA_ah0rPCYz3gCiBQRfg2lhUVkkUjigzoxjHhD4Jix8-ZmIMYzeSzF-5icN-qwAQABFochh-4LtccGO-xLwiQ1hGfYSFR5zb1V6O0LBUwU2gvznfD5TqvjbDINi-S9raQWbxLR1q8HmsKnsYc22o-y7hfWdpqLrx5Di2Q79ZVS-dI8yL9Oi_XNcz2Bki4svd8K_HedGVa63S7NtGdESB1LKmL8XC5S1Z7laBPVJ7c-G) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
There’s only one thing we can do to keep Trump in check...
| Look, Republicans may be in control of the House, Senate, White House, and even Supreme Court...

**_But there’s still _one thing_ we can do to keep Trump in check:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20250102_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=18344%2E878179%2EtI-vjH) **[URGENT ACTION REQUIRED: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20250102_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=18344%2E878179%2EtI-vjH)** | [**15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TODAY: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20250102_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=18344%2E878179%2EtI-vjH)

**We can still stop Trump from causing irreparable damage over the next 4 years,_but we must act FAST:_**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18344%2E878179%2EtI-vjH). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18344%2E878179%2EtI-vjH).**

| | | If you believe in **“Taking America Back”** with President Donald Trump in 2024, then you need this massive statement-making fixed blade knife.

The BIG Trump Knife is [laser-etched on a stainless steel blade with a waving American Flag and a stainless steel half-guard keeps your fingers from slipping.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19577/6374453/615e90acb6c04ea20a91584aff7d0fd8a85c4bdd/d3ab4d1de1502ec6b10336a78465162af75fe7c0)

The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry.

Let Folks Know Where You Stand**

body:

|

_Over the last 8 years, we 've worked our butts off.

Dear Peter,
---
When Donald J. Trump is inaugurated as our 47th President of the United States, he will already be facing a _$486 MILLION_ witch hunt against him in the state of New York.
---
**_Fox News_ : “New York AG James says she won’t drop civil fraud case against Trump”**
---
And every day that passes, President Trump will incur a _$112,000 daily fine_ , as Tish James continues her legal warfare to bleed the President of the United States dry.
---
**Not only is James ignoring the _REAL_ crimes taking place all over New York, she’s choosing to weaken the President at a time when our nation is in serious decline.**
---
Radical Leftists like Tish James do not care about seeing America succeed and prosper. They only care about seeing their political enemies destroyed.
---
Our Republic cannot survive if our justice system continues to be hijacked by legal warfare and political vengeance.
---
There is only one solution – _and that is to FIRE Tish James from her position as Attorney General._
---
**I am running to fire Tish James and end the politicization of the Office of Attorney General – but to take on the massive New York special interests who have weaponized our legal system, I’m going to need support from grassroots patriots like _YOU_ all across America.**

subject: A personal thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=nQ3CBD7ssfcXkVt59d%2BEUoTUQFeNimqp%2FbeXv7LKm%2BJstjvsHDuhJmaNEDCTq04Mro3Z0lSfkL5Esk7DORA5jvaHCExT492MK54bB%2Fdj%2FxN5JJX3DFbSQBOG6leghfjw3PbJprXZH3nvJ45zljm1nVV1%2Bdt8pvtWO3pNVTHTE3wg674O28367MREla4gRaKxbUKIs5vrpJ%2BQbgQTrMoWcKyhNy87bjf4OWJzGS%2F2j9kwpknpKVHaCSEMM0ZSdQXq4z53WeuoC1lchwf6UkQKtNtXfDcZo7F0kiHEnDvIm26b814D42mcJ6mRRQTpulFQjxCoY5CL%2Fx%2BqCSt4tQ%2FR3NS5KGVdfEiP20M2emf9O1Ua0OK2%2Br6cQjw1PhfzXTn2tNgxjPP16lRlIG7%2Fw%2Fdr0ZdZjVrTJSm2%2FcNXvS2yjJo4x4sLOcF6jf2tYrr7hzSV]

# [#]
Happy New Year! 🎉

I wanted to reach out to you and extend a personal thank you for lending your support as we approached our make or break year-end fundraising deadline on Tuesday night.

Thanks to you and the help of people all across California’s 25th and beyond, I’m proud to share that we successfully hit our fundraising goal.

As we kick off 2025, laying the groundwork for our campaign to succeed as we enter a Republican trifecta in Washington is more important than ever — and meeting goals like this one are exactly how we do it.

We’ve got our work cut out for us in the days ahead, and there’s simply too much at stake to slow down for even a second.

But for now, thank you for standing with me. Only together can we create a future of compassion, prosperity, and progress, and may your 2025 be just the same.

Sincerely,

Raul

P.S. If you didn’t get to chip in before our year-end deadline but want to support our fight for progress in Congress, consider donating here today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-jan25?amount=]
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

body:
Here’s to a strong 2025! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99750363/520754494/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzE1MDIwMi0zOWM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7g7yTFMNRH7dh19WJCxpW5FtIl-OAdVeKtzx1p0U7K4=&emci=07050ee8-fabe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=3c150202-39c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

As we wrap up December and look toward the new year, I want to take a moment to express _just_ how grateful I am for you.

Thanks to your support, we’ve reached our fundraising goal! I could not be more proud of what we’ve accomplished together. Your belief in our work, your energy, and your commitment to this grassroots movement have put us in a strong position heading into 2025.

**With your help, we’re ready to take on the challenges ahead and continue fighting for the people of WA-08. Together, we’ve made a real difference for people across Washington, and I’m excited to keep moving forward with you by my side every step of the way in the 119th Congress!**

Wishing you a happy, healthy, and hopeful 2025 – here’s to a new year full of progress, determination, and the continued fight for what’s right.

With heartfelt gratitude,

Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2cf8679fe7a645beb3fb75a69a165496&_e=QRhDtTXmvhxWTGszgPy-toSCo8k6Emh2vjkhbQoCuEgm5I4BgLg1AMJngtjHwCh7s5Q1n3oDaSDuSP6GRj8NRNwn8Y7M_3lvkzN7AptWaL9-sQwYRQ_VJUkRrY036L9EL3gNAaRKnqKV4XCee1wA7AXydSNsNSgeTwnQTTE8enKuPpY0LqCplyl-clk9VSPtkmWj-fdfbs-x-ZqqBVXp0HfxVE89yVVYP6l-7jGP4Ys1q75cfgAx-8hC9c4QoRXRxfZUegRy6J6Fi21U-1ct1yYifzWNvu32M8ZtDkb-aIwuwSU_jbvLI-KoYfMQIGbWB8JvOhcppg0-jtPjAw2rLXhtkv3AZfjwPpoc9ZFiadW3pLtaxaWAMJ5NYkxRk-7vatAvWhdodqeX0gnEGojMN5At4uzHF6e5dEgmBGuJqhs%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2cf8679fe7a645beb3fb75a69a165496&_e=QRhDtTXmvhxWTGszgPy-toSCo8k6Emh2vjkhbQoCuEgm5I4BgLg1AMJngtjHwCh7s5Q1n3oDaSDuSP6GRj8NRNwn8Y7M_3lvkzN7AptWaL9-sQwYRQ_VJUkRrY036L9EL3gNAaRKnqKV4XCee1wA7AXydSNsNSgeTwnQTTE8enKuPpY0LqCplyl-clk9VSPtkmWj-fdfbs-x-ZqqBVXp0HfxVE89yVVYP6l-7jGP4Ys1q75cfgAx-8hC9c4QoRXRix8YI5FR_Gq7zUfr6groqypzcy2bjZRAJbMMRCmx3XAwv_sMPAUB4nCK-HQTaQoJHxqijvu_5Bj1IOPP61AkHHX8FX0lzR4X-Sxgq9fbCFnm2GErJzhwhDZA9AyGYhWcL09QG0RGtQkXvVL-2J9lDIal9xgM5htNYymdKwsCfz8%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2cf8679fe7a645beb3fb75a69a165496&_e=QRhDtTXmvhxWTGszgPy-toSCo8k6Emh2vjkhbQoCuEgm5I4BgLg1AMJngtjHwCh7s5Q1n3oDaSDuSP6GRj8NRNwn8Y7M_3lvkzN7AptWaL9-sQwYRQ_VJUkRrY036L9EL3gNAaRKnqKV4XCee1wA7AXydSNsNSgeTwnQTTE8enKuPpY0LqCplyl-clk9VSPtkmWj-fdfbs-x-ZqqBVXp0HfxVE89yVVYP6l-7jGP4Ys1q75cfgAx-8hC9c4QoRXR_7oniVh-hM6B3sAMUxJDFXz_D2dOSyFFUh9W-ETzdEg7hsAHPn1qUxutraBt_nx3qoHJ3jG9H9h1jol-XYK69ZHmLfKvxvAPHT3mCfDrKyKCB8YwuxXxaeR9oWpo_X1RSP9jR0oV0ECEwuW0VlSN4oAJrP1b3Be5A2zwSMgMKO8%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include: **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2cf8679fe7a645beb3fb75a69a165496&_e=QRhDtTXmvhxWTGszgPy-toSCo8k6Emh2vjkhbQoCuEgm5I4BgLg1AMJngtjHwCh7s5Q1n3oDaSDuSP6GRj8NRNwn8Y7M_3lvkzN7AptWaL9-sQwYRQ_VJUkRrY036L9EL3gNAaRKnqKV4XCee1wA7AXydSNsNSgeTwnQTTE8enKuPpY0LqCplyl-clk9VSPtkmWj-fdfbs-x-ZqqBVXp0HfxVE89yVVYP6l-7jGP4Ys1q75cfgAx-8hC9c4QoRXR6Q7wx-_5gPaqEct__v6PKuvEqiF50DgwtWoJ26vS2bLYIxH6wTxyg9FMAoxDCpZtBHIx0vHcZVwK0qZck62zRqYX1h6tAu5bYjSww15F7BStlhAWJZrSKk7Xha6UHGzgiYCANfRaxos-3392Cxn-ysC2fDj6cnxX3kKFdm8h2cM%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

| | | | | | | **I'm writing to you today with some troubling news... **

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0dfeaa7ce0c945b3a4dcdc240ec77fd5&_e=ZsAHTg_wBRMdpN7eWiByypOA0yKE-zeohvzDFsmm9-j7eomvn_id5OGbrYYE9NTBzAAr-YE4X1MdhaW41mrzXEMPH4iw55XEVwEugZSF16Z5v5Svafyw4U-KkWjlUK2EPL-pVIIhpEe8FvQNLc6h0xS3W1KSVeddm-6VX6yU6El4jM-iKvO_DctjJkEmp-QrzCoT4mNinrhubZMvaHw1towoZkk4bSMNpleknonriNQoWkPDqWPE39a3ryN9NgRbAmPTvvkVjw1PnXFXN2tPqP57fM6y6DBX03B3nabRBEGt6IUKaASs2fK8FHCcr-AcoQDJ4nDVcKR-g74l97OWlSxSRmbYLWHiHRCT5JtsNVQ%3D)
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0dfeaa7ce0c945b3a4dcdc240ec77fd5&_e=ZsAHTg_wBRMdpN7eWiByypOA0yKE-zeohvzDFsmm9-j7eomvn_id5OGbrYYE9NTBzAAr-YE4X1MdhaW41mrzXEMPH4iw55XEVwEugZSF16Z5v5Svafyw4U-KkWjlUK2EPL-pVIIhpEe8FvQNLc6h0xS3W1KSVeddm-6VX6yU6Elp4U5OVON541r93oNbGhrLjcPD_GN_QUDn7O2JtFioK7ux4gAGXTzn3vVvL2b3NGgQ0Q0gE2EqUTzlBvP-L_iA_F9lxAl8ZlVsSxuH4ZgSylqSQQ6_aeECkRt2EOkAa3x9INNrBK0O8A53pVRbv38JNxAvAOZ5ukscBhVBvyR4eUaMzkSS8nlGPOdzbugbY9QXSkJ44G3corDp2aREnETm)

This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0dfeaa7ce0c945b3a4dcdc240ec77fd5&_e=ZsAHTg_wBRMdpN7eWiByypOA0yKE-zeohvzDFsmm9-j7eomvn_id5OGbrYYE9NTBzAAr-YE4X1MdhaW41mrzXEMPH4iw55XEVwEugZSF16Z5v5Svafyw4U-KkWjlUK2EPL-pVIIhpEe8FvQNLc6h0xS3W1KSVeddm-6VX6yU6EmwKAOQEFetdZlEZQywjdKpRuEp8IUg3xYQj7bKueAPB74hgWpM_0n9QOMRgHZl5hNT3xw0H2b_bMPszLmCJRxZkk2WSyEZxituG1UiO9IixDdXF4BXG_qOWCDmq1wG2fTnMcynIB83yvL8Ds9USf01CFth9EPwtHo2aMhHBvu1eFmMrJKpuFzMkL36snyiphc%3D)

Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. **[I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 to support the mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount >>>](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0dfeaa7ce0c945b3a4dcdc240ec77fd5&_e=ZsAHTg_wBRMdpN7eWiByypOA0yKE-zeohvzDFsmm9-j7eomvn_id5OGbrYYE9NTBzAAr-YE4X1MdhaW41mrzXEMPH4iw55XEVwEugZSF16Z5v5Svafyw4U-KkWjlUK2EPL-pVIIhpEe8FvQNLc6h0xS3W1KSVeddm-6VX6yU6Ellae9tleupc9Kmy4dF52nI0f7dJVBcNTEjQWZ7KMG1YhKEBBXZr9d3CRGIvA3p59SZs-xNaVj8W-6Fmx9MKUbHHFCxiG5xfPCJmoaq-8AQ3dtlL98ATw8JDrbHunEP48Z5hGaj0NehuFjNVZ7jqZV9msZuMmq0YEu_8YVNrK1sU8VdGS1qVU9wKX96O8exP3Y%3D)**

Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important?

If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are _**desperate**_ to hear the unfiltered truth.

**This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for:**

* Free market capitalism
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles.

Young people need an alternative.

The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more.

I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below:

[Donate $10](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0dfeaa7ce0c945b3a4dcdc240ec77fd5&_e=ZsAHTg_wBRMdpN7eWiByypOA0yKE-zeohvzDFsmm9-j7eomvn_id5OGbrYYE9NTBzAAr-YE4X1MdhaW41mrzXEMPH4iw55XEVwEugZSF16Z5v5Svafyw4U-KkWjlUK2EPL-pVIIhpEe8FvQNLc6h0xS3W1KSVeddm-6VX6yU6Elqu2xDeGuSGBZg6qhrqZPIcsqTUomuGs5u-UWVTGr0mJW1Rz6utcSNLIbBP8jCzxRqoQBMiQ1MFKboyR0YxItze5ccHSAHA2ZigSEg0hOpclCeYqx-dLrQlNCYC6jEh8My1XRAs6338r3Jq4C-7t7KL1eefrtB36WCE9n4iQQnsbEPWXYubEwH2sKQzBvkOfwW7T6LKjkzD9hUmBDg5tTU)

[Donate ANY Amount](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0dfeaa7ce0c945b3a4dcdc240ec77fd5&_e=ZsAHTg_wBRMdpN7eWiByypOA0yKE-zeohvzDFsmm9-j7eomvn_id5OGbrYYE9NTBzAAr-YE4X1MdhaW41mrzXEMPH4iw55XEVwEugZSF16Z5v5Svafyw4U-KkWjlUK2EPL-pVIIhpEe8FvQNLc6h0xS3W1KSVeddm-6VX6yU6EkgISHthkFJOMYfme6o917Hm9wisWm3bKKZTeBYl63jZlAuu8WXnsjnTVzUgFREO-OQHL1gT7Kda-5eCAUkGJijcHusW_h46I-Z9m_QWQuZZ7nn9fkg1_ow9WX1Hf57y52CEh1V628IMpphADQBQ7Zs6KHwZ7UxaG83Ts-niwdAIL0iBI5_oZ6NCa-d0OjzYhM%3D)

You may be surprised, but when young people hear Ayn Rand's message of entrepreneurship, refusing to be a victim, and personal achievement, they are inspired and want to learn more.

Yes, politics are important. But politics are downstream from culture. And culture is downstream from philosophy. The Atlas Society is on the frontlines of fighting in the philosophical culture war, which may determine the fate of the country's future.

We CANNOT give up the culture or give up young people.

This is more important than a campaign or a single election.

You and I must invest in reaching young people with this message.

Please don't wait to take action.

My goal is to raise this $25,000 ASAP within a 48-hour period. Can I count on you to make a donation?

name: Team Pramila
subject: With a new year comes new opportunities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Medicare for All. Paid leave. Getting Big Money out of politics. This is what we’re fighting to make a reality in 2025 and beyond.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250102-4638-footer&t=1&akid=4638%2E420207%2ENgQlbC)
Happy New Year, Peter! 🥳
On behalf of our entire team, we wanted to take a moment to say _thank you_ for everything you did to support our progressive movement in 2024.
Last year we experienced some serious setbacks, but with a new year comes new opportunities to make our vision for the future a reality.
Medicare for All. Paid leave. Getting Big Money out of politics. _This_ is what we’re fighting to make a reality in 2025 and beyond.
Pramila is more determined than ever to hold MAGA Republicans accountable and organize our party around a bold, populist, working class agenda that lifts up ALL people, everywhere.
**We can’t wait to see what we can accomplish this year with you by our side. Thank you again for your continued support of our progressive movement.**
Together,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250102-4638-footer&t=2&refcode2=4638_420207_NgQlbC&akid=4638%2E420207%2ENgQlbC)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

We can’t wait to see what we can accomplish this year with you by our side. Thank you again for your continued support of our progressive movement. Together, Team Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Without you, this pro-voter movement would not be entering the new year ready to take on new challenges and attempts to undermine our elections and our right to vote. **In 2025, this work couldn’t be more important.** Voter intimidation and suppression tactics will be on the rise.
