With President Biden’s presidency coming to an end, I think we can all agree that he will be leaving behind an _amazing_ legacy.

✅ He created millions of jobs for Americans
✅ He capped prices on life-saving prescription drugs
✅ He pushed past partisan politics to create a united vision of our country

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: National Referendum on Religious Liberty
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=e9127e7fae8a4d64937ca5d6ff559064&_t=pr5qSqA2HeOPrk4MfGsyJxsm5eF1A0kCpYAR33FF0JJRwrrERgxcRK1RyZCBCNlxpjk-zj3UMj6jzK8Rz9w0zj7QFGY8P80dZqkx1NkRSg7_-WYP_Cqg1Kh172DV3Qxz)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=e9127e7fae8a4d64937ca5d6ff559064&_e=fDvbesWrgSPyGIhbvtw1DSPwB2mv7M1ChTfm7QoK7zFKKzgfzyKh-MVWOSR10x63WJHPHN_i4yFqfqQfzsv7zRj67PyhXpUNUmCyytfyabMH6MUs4ANY_mqtpBPXIAxxm3JYeYcdcBOOZ7sX6lJorwyD_BM6kiFRPTVLSZM2xo32G6TGc9LTp_8iIME3Jt6j7C3EGjelckhdGTB_7dF194ynZvZ7sUkLxvHnPwQPMKuInMzVfYzpQMKBH3nIhclpd7Qeds-4csN9jxfY7pEVhsa0oc90gPLZwkmd4wLgWTZPqVoIOB5OGTBd0qQeruj66Djp_RRkGTlSY7BX7S7ck6D7n1DXdoBHtkrZ4W6TKehu2xeLV6dpKEVoSwYvpr3zuuvC_Gyie6wbgxTsQeA4QA%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,

You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty.

Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=e9127e7fae8a4d64937ca5d6ff559064&_e=fDvbesWrgSPyGIhbvtw1DSPwB2mv7M1ChTfm7QoK7zFKKzgfzyKh-MVWOSR10x63WJHPHN_i4yFqfqQfzsv7zRj67PyhXpUNUmCyytfyabMH6MUs4ANY_mqtpBPXIAxxm3JYeYcdcBOOZ7sX6lJorwyD_BM6kiFRPTVLSZM2xo32G6TGc9LTp_8iIME3Jt6j7C3EGjelckhdGTB_7dF194ynZvZ7sUkLxvHnPwQPMKuInMzVfYzpQMKBH3nIhclp7ypjKfieI1T1AbbfzuCVX_0IMrxC2bxTQwZP-dMsb_rPqx85qqZUgdTd_ALka3Nhb2KbvewkCWGN6fOVUy4qz_5ZvvA19BQfl19ywECFEvAY-FT1pFiO-5EuXRTzL6g94myRIf0G0_Q3xrAVmVvqgQ%3D%3D)

Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."**

Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion."

These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties.

You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course.

**The first step is ...EDUCATION.**

Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.**

These efforts include:

* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.**

I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=e9127e7fae8a4d64937ca5d6ff559064&_e=fDvbesWrgSPyGIhbvtw1DSPwB2mv7M1ChTfm7QoK7zFKKzgfzyKh-MVWOSR10x63WJHPHN_i4yFqfqQfzsv7zRj67PyhXpUNUmCyytfyabMH6MUs4ANY_mqtpBPXIAxxm3JYeYcdcBOOZ7sX6lJorwyD_BM6kiFRPTVLSZM2xo32G6TGc9LTp_8iIME3Jt6j7C3EGjelckhdGTB_7dF194ynZvZ7sUkLxvHnPwQPMKuInMzVfYzpQMKBH3nIhclpLdy_3I8-pm5L9oZKFcOM6X1qU5FS4F6tFONXQH7cMGRtl-CNGhLTJs0v7pyTxCMapSH0qsTjqtTEAzdZmYq8ZXHBXwz1KnAhGqBudcXgvRPY0Gs88wCARPRQRfIB857RWUC-PloRwAnX1MKXgS3rOA%3D%3D)

Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

name: Voter Action Project Polling
subject: Post-election survey: Fraud concerns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010225_2&amount=25]
WaPo - The truth about election fraud: It’s rare [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/WaPo_TruthElectionFraudRare.png]
As the 2022 midterm elections got underway, many Americans, in particular those who identify as Republicans, were increasingly fearful that the outcome will be affected or even determined by election fraud.
Thousands of poll watchers were dispatched. Drop boxes were under surveillance. A Fox News poll conducted recently still found that 55 percent of those surveyed were extremely or very concerned about voter fraud despite lacking any evidence of fraud. Among self-identified Republicans, nearly three-quarters said they were that concerned.
Team: Are you worried about voter fraud?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=010225_2&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=010225_2&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010225_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010225_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010225_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010225_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo [] WaPo - The truth about election fraud: It’s rare [] As the 2022 midterm elections got underway, many Americans, in particular those who identify as Republicans, were increasingly fearful that the outcome will be affected or even determined by election fraud. Thousands of poll watchers were dispatched. Drop boxes were under surveillance. A Fox News poll conducted recently still found that 55 percent of those surveyed were extremely or very concerned about voter fraud despite lacking any evidence of fraud. Among self-identified Republicans, nearly three-quarters said they were that concerned. Team: Are you worried about voter fraud? By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded: YES [] NO [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Peter, I wanted to reach out today to send you a personal message.
I hope you’ll take the time to read until the end.
[**I’m so incredibly grateful for all your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99751322/520757727/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250102_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDkwMWUyZi0zZGM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aI7fsdo-eQi_yja6EZC-Ag1_9Hy8HNF748iDUVr6BUU=)
In 2024, House Democrats gave it our all, running aggressive, forward-looking and people-centered campaigns.
House Democrats netted two additional seats and expanded our diverse Caucus, weakening the already chaotic and extreme GOP majority to the narrowest in approximately 100 years.
That is unprecedented in a so-called presidential wave election.
Hundreds of thousands of people like you knocked doors, made phone calls, signed postcards and supported our incredible candidates.
[**I’m humbled by what we accomplished.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99751323/520757728/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250102_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDkwMWUyZi0zZGM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aI7fsdo-eQi_yja6EZC-Ag1_9Hy8HNF748iDUVr6BUU=)
[_**Now is the time to get to work. We can finish what we started and take back the House. We can’t win without your help and we must get an early start to lay the foundation for victory. That is why I opened my 2025 Democratic Membership Drive earlier than ever before. It would mean so much to me if you’d chip in any amount to help Democrats push back against far-right extremism and win back the House majority >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99751324/520757729/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250102_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDkwMWUyZi0zZGM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aI7fsdo-eQi_yja6EZC-Ag1_9Hy8HNF748iDUVr6BUU=)

There’s an urgency to this moment, Peter.
Extreme MAGA Republicans want to criminalize abortion, decimate Social Security and Medicare and weaponize our justice system.
Democrats are ready to rise to the challenge, fight for economic justice in every zip code and get big things done for the American people.
I’m so proud that my 2025 Democratic Members include:
– Small business owners who want to build economic opportunities
– Teachers who want to ensure that every child receives a first-class education
– Parents and grandparents who want to build a better future for their loved ones
...and there’s still time for you to join them, Peter.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats.

Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1cd146921e2f4d6b9fd343871bdae59d&_e=aqNDPWrANV9uzLP6jWBkULClVdXZqWwxX0cItLFNawRUNuOeIR4AC8FJWCuoqYuT11oc96zO6Ia3fg7D8eN8OJZhCwadTYrUgOnbixVt1PGmcv2Cz20JOQi-iKu6SOboTQhYvyOyQVwMEKccLRFyNuG9jeAigGKHVzNcXw61z6Jn5HUdqdXf__eGV0sw1wAoiorWRFicIlja191xEho7B_BjGCaoYczslHzEm2ctRpxnyKwPiCzSHAg39eRrY9oDy3mH2NUKbo7ZJsE5PCtzyr0-MpSBrf5i7HT4AHRuWsQkqree--wb-5LbLzrkMpC8BSuHtXkChoQKw1iQi6KskIj2_10RqQOlm4wyqjnumn4p__isk0LoT7OnvIsiot3qX3jCOVUM2vFLX4EwlKJH1Q%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1cd146921e2f4d6b9fd343871bdae59d&_e=aqNDPWrANV9uzLP6jWBkULClVdXZqWwxX0cItLFNawRUNuOeIR4AC8FJWCuoqYuT11oc96zO6Ia3fg7D8eN8OJZhCwadTYrUgOnbixVt1PGmcv2Cz20JOQi-iKu6SOboTQhYvyOyQVwMEKccLRFyNuG9jeAigGKHVzNcXw61z6Jn5HUdqdXf__eGV0sw1wAoiorWRFicIlja191xEho7B_BjGCaoYczslHzEm2ctRpz-bsRq3NTAdOcPqqhpZQNocIvvq3X7sgdjX21Irl0j6PxlggDL5N8lP4S0hRN2DMDNilmEU_kcus9WhsrXbP81M3_5cABTb_RuLr29Sq7D3KyB3ibYtM6t1_Q9kr51IMEX6eH2KRPRAzenSylKG6XyQqveNnfRUMF0E37aGYnjSQ%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."

clean_body: Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth.| | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0a6c9450b7ae4e9f818b3ec3e052b4d8&_e=-OquNbUutwTb2b2M5PHt03ImDozfbYd7CG_QJX4cT6-uKgPMxPFWoKLwO0um1rGM0rAwsGuDduVkgqcxtwO7PUSVuJt5QuFzlGi-fVT64MBzhk4bzxyJvFSDkqoG0hVn2qAgjq00wI0pbfVWnlNiqFRBFK4StWvCuUC6QoqujD-KxRZ8RssmcNznBWjfdE-Y4C4qEoEZWfnNpwK3MupsAwlQ0D724Wk6R3oVV6vHekQ_NAze2xTD0ZstY0CImVWj-BQ4jvRtSgkPtL36KBB1J45f49J0DX_yvZiUdtGxl4fxhGJhbHk9sYzzimJpOhKlF3RTFw_rhysi6r3DbHx8cd3IKtnSH1BCa3DdfFlk7yRMKJcZe6xigENW6Fyw6TJ1_gNIcPL_rt65V0D6iAu9Lw%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0a6c9450b7ae4e9f818b3ec3e052b4d8&_e=-OquNbUutwTb2b2M5PHt03ImDozfbYd7CG_QJX4cT6-uKgPMxPFWoKLwO0um1rGM0rAwsGuDduVkgqcxtwO7PUSVuJt5QuFzlGi-fVT64MBzhk4bzxyJvFSDkqoG0hVn2qAgjq00wI0pbfVWnlNiqFRBFK4StWvCuUC6QoqujD-KxRZ8RssmcNznBWjfdE-Y4C4qEoEZWfnNpwK3MupsAwlQ0D724Wk6R3oVV6vHekQ_NAze2xTD0ZstY0CImVWjCfvlyxgIXpC_B03WtmCEFTm0m8utSO8v3GnHwfUkkYC1OjvtP1eAlq_clmZoDviAKilI8MEj_1pLsYrB4GG58kSUfUGhXvVfKKC6093vcL3xK_aOQyLKWeDEwI86VMgC4QH6xQxr4L-54PpwFGKXRg%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0a6c9450b7ae4e9f818b3ec3e052b4d8&_e=-OquNbUutwTb2b2M5PHt03ImDozfbYd7CG_QJX4cT6-uKgPMxPFWoKLwO0um1rGM0rAwsGuDduVkgqcxtwO7PUSVuJt5QuFzlGi-fVT64MBzhk4bzxyJvFSDkqoG0hVn2qAgjq00wI0pbfVWnlNiqFRBFK4StWvCuUC6QoqujD-KxRZ8RssmcNznBWjfdE-Y4C4qEoEZWfnNpwK3MupsAwlQ0D724Wk6R3oVV6vHekQ_NAze2xTD0ZstY0CImVWjeCzTQ4QTTB8yDRUPYcTX0CnrW2yUvJmpQTpX-sIkOr31FdT6jAgtf2wdt3T0lXa2kbrS3oJvCHntHRQJAm94wP_MrAl4HfhBFuEkbiWJmnedJI71Rz1Oe4Fp6m07yf65jeBbGZEzSkTStGdrXy6JRw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against.| | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Here’s to building on this momentum and continuing our fight for common-sense leadership, justice, and progress in 2025. I couldn’t be more proud to have you fighting by my side.

Happy New Year, and thank you for being part of this team!

Wesley

| Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to personally thank you for your incredible support over the past year. The end of December marked one of our most critical fundraising deadlines yet, and thanks to your generosity, we not only met but exceeded our goal!

Because of people like you, we are entering 2025 in a strong position, ready to tackle the challenges ahead. I can confidently say that we’re prepared for what’s to come, and we couldn’t have done it without you.

This year is a big one for us, and I truly feel your support every step of the way. I’m grateful to have you alongside us as we build momentum and get closer to November!

Thank you once again for being a vital part of this campaign.

Gratefully,
Abigail

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/magas-exploit-atrocity-to-incite?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

The New Year began with tragic news out of New Orleans, where a U.S. Army veteran drove his truck into a crowd of celebrants, killing at least 14 people. It is a horrific act of violence, one that should unite us in grief and a search for justice. Instead, it has become yet another opportunity for right-wing media and politicians to fan the flames of division with misinformation and bigotry. Sadly, corporate media is piling on, adding to the uncertainty and disinformation. It is imperative we clarify the facts at hand, and move forward united against injustice. **Let 's Address This.**
**We need all hands on deck in 2025 to stand against fascism and disinformation. I invite you to join our movement for justice as a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hPda8Eiak_JjSZmLEKqK-Fzm6fxbV9yf3l3yd-bF3Dc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153961939)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8de47328-161f-4393-9c61-d7da67468118?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## The False Narrative Is Born
Before any facts were confirmed, Fox News and other right-wing outlets immediately blamed immigrants, pushing a false narrative to stoke outrage. For example, this statement, "_The truck used in the New Orleans terrorist attack entered the U.S. through the southern border in November, 2024_ " is complete propaganda. Not one word of it is true. Yet, Fox News ran with it anyway.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fa42625e-7eac-4f71-87e2-b3189ca3d294?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And while Fox finally retracted their false statement several hours later, the damage was done. Donald Trump had latched on to the lie, claiming it vindicated his claims about immigrants over the past several years. He amplified the disinformation to his massive platform.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1c0457d7-6e5d-4f79-9e55-5544e17f0249?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The facts didn't matter to Trump, and still do not matter as he has refused to retract his statement. What mattered was weaponizing the tragedy to fuel anti-immigrant hysteria. As a result, Trump sycophants with millions of followers piled on, claiming the attack was due to our "_open border_." Never mind that [undocumented crossings are at 4-year-lows](https://substack.com/redirect/c4f7a87b-55a7-45b5-9c2f-24b5572dcd88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and are lower now than at the end of Trump's term. The below tweet was deleted with no retraction, apology, or acknowledgment that he flat out lied.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/490a1af1-78b4-4c20-bace-47ccc1d95be2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As an aside, this is also why I detest when Democrats try to 'out-Republican' Republicans. Despite the Biden administration restricting immigration and preventing undocumented immigration more effectively than did Trump, the narrative from the right is still "Democrats have open borders." Instead, Democrats should lead from the front with a productive immigration policy that makes immigration easier, more streamlined, and more economically beneficial to everyone. But I digress. Soon, propaganda notwithstanding, the facts did eventually come to light, and the right wing narrative had to find a new target.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hPda8Eiak_JjSZmLEKqK-Fzm6fxbV9yf3l3yd-bF3Dc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153961939)
## The False Narrative Finds A New Target
We soon learned that the attacker was not an immigrant. He did not enter from the southern border. He was not foreign to the United States. He was a U.S. citizen born and raised in Texas. What's more, he was an Army veteran, having served 10 years.
Thus, when the anti-immigrant narrative fell apart, the right's narrative shifted seamlessly to blaming Muslims, deploying Islamophobic tropes to maintain their manufactured outrage. Trump, who falsely blamed immigrants at on January 1, now less than 24 hours later suddenly falsely blamed Muslims and Islam on January 2.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad5b907d-41b1-4e1c-b2fa-f9e4a53feae0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And Trump's lackeys, likely knowing Trump would shift with the wind, had already followed suit. Known racist, Trump ally, and MAGA politician Randy Fine described it as a "worldwide Muslim problem." Suddenly, one person's violent acts represent 1.6 billion Muslims worldwide. Imagine the rightful outrage of someone described it as "the worldwide Jewish problem?" We would rightly condemn such grotesque antisemitism. But when it comes to similar anti-Muslim bigotry, it is celebrated.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/57cb5991-9e89-4c10-aec1-9e3bc7226076?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Joining Fine was Trump policy crony Stephen Miller, [whose own uncle has well described](https://substack.com/redirect/7954082b-da54-48e7-9aa7-7625efb0282a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his extremism:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/79e511f4-8cb5-4442-9aae-be2f2be8114c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
These are the people writing America's domestic and foreign policy over the next for years, with an impact that will no doubt last for decades. Fortunately, we have a free press, with the Constitutionally protected right to hold those in power accountable. Indeed, we would hope that legacy media would stand as the fourth estate against this misinformation, disinformation, and outright bigotry. Unfortunately, the harsh reality demonstrates to the contrary, as legacy media piled on to the disinformation.
## Corporate Media Remains Complicit
Legacy media, including outlets like _The New York Times_ , joined the fray, amplifying the right-wing pivot instead of holding Trump and his allies accountable for their lies. For example, rather than having the courage to call out Trump's lie as a flat out lie, the New York Times uses the sanitized "_falsely suggested_ " phrase. Apparently, New York Times editors don't know the word "lie" exists.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/58fa7309-4d43-4399-b79b-0eee6cf9b21a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Not content with refusing to hold Trump accountable for dangerous lies, the New York Times piled on with actual disinformation. For example, they added that officials are trying to determine if the New Orleans suspect had ties to terrorist groups. To be sure, investigating potential motivations is important. However, the sub headline highlighted below then alleges this attack is connected to Israel's genocide in Gaza and Lebanon--a completely unsubstantiated claim.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d11dd694-515d-4fd1-8d56-26ede4ec47c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The entire article discusses Russia, Syria, Iraq, and Afghanistan -- but provides zero evidence of anything to do with Gaza or Lebanon. Yet, if one were to only read the headline, they would walk away with the assumption that somehow Palestinians and Lebanese are responsible for this attack. This dehumanization is devastating, especially from an outlet as massive as the New York Times. Unsurprisingly, right wing propagandists quickly latched on to this unverified conclusion and openly aligned Palestinians with ISIS--again, without any evidence. This will only result in more disinformation and hate against American Muslims.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b7acb6f2-5b32-47e1-a6e3-a97413a6b0f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The deliberate move by western media to lump all Muslims together as one big group--despite vast differences in nationality, ethnicity, politics, and geography--is another form of accepted casual racism that leads to ignorance, disinformation, and bigotry.
Sadly, this cycle of propaganda is depressingly familiar. A tragedy occurs, facts are ignored, and the right-wing outrage machine kicks into high gear, targeting marginalized groups for political gain. When the truth emerges, the goalposts shift, and the blame is redirected to a different marginalized--but never toward their own narrative of division, and never towards finding actual solutions to the problems we face.
## We Can Counter This Disinformation
It is important to understand two things.
One, we are witnessing a snapshot of what we will see with increasing regularity over the next four years at least. This disinformation makes us less safe, less secure, and less united. And the capitulation of corporate media further undermines our democracy and national security.
And two, we are not helpless to stop this disinformation. A counter narrative based on facts and truth exists--if we invest in it. This is why independent voices are critical. In the face of propaganda and misinformation, we need voices that prioritize facts, accountability, and justice over sensationalism and fear-mongering. The right-wing media complex thrives on manipulating tragedies for its agenda, but we must refuse to let lies and bigotry overshadow the truth. This is why I launched _Let 's Address This_, and why I hope to continue to earn your trust and support.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hPda8Eiak_JjSZmLEKqK-Fzm6fxbV9yf3l3yd-bF3Dc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153961939)
## Conclusion
This horrific attack in New Orleans is a tragedy. My deepest prayers for the families of the victims, and my sorrow for the harm caused to our country. I am hopeful the authorities are able to thoroughly investigate the circumstances leading up to this atrocity, and work to prevent future such attacks by holding all those potentially responsible accountable.
But just as no honest person would blame all Christians for Timothy McVeigh's horrific Oklahoma City bombing that killed 169 innocent people, no honest person can blame all Muslims for the New Orleans attack that killed 14 innocent people. Indeed, using this tragedy to spread hate against immigrants and Muslims dishonors the victims and perpetuates the cycles of division and misinformation that tear our communities apart. Let us demand better--from our elected officials, our media, and ourselves. Truth matters, and we cannot let it drown under the noise of hate and propaganda.
**Join our movement by becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hPda8Eiak_JjSZmLEKqK-Fzm6fxbV9yf3l3yd-bF3Dc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153961939)

If you are a paid subscriber, gift a subscription to a loved one.

---|---|---

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: I’m a dairy farmer, not a career politician...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
The North Country doesn’t need another career politician who isn’t even from our district and is just using us to further their political ambitions.

| Peter,

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a dairy farmer.**

I know what it’s like to get up for work at 3:30 am, trudge through feet of snow to feed my herd, and make difficult decisions to keep my farm afloat while providing for my family and employees. That’s exactly why I decided to run for Elise Stefanik’s seat and why I’m asking for your support today.

[_**This is the closest House majority ever, so this race presents a real opportunity—and the work we do in the early days of the campaign will play a vital role in our success. Can I count on you to split $25 between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us prepare for this special election and flip NY-21 blue?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99751538/520758388/634970978?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1NDE5YmZkLTNmYzktZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c5K4taccQP6wVXKk4n40Uvw55givWb78uWMca72vReo=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99751539/520758389/922168981?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1NDE5YmZkLTNmYzktZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c5K4taccQP6wVXKk4n40Uvw55givWb78uWMca72vReo=)
---
The North Country doesn’t need another career politician who isn’t even from our district and is just using us to further their political ambitions. Now more than ever, we need a leader who understands the issues families face on a daily basis. In Congress, my sole focus will be to deliver results for the North Country and tackle these issues, but I need your help to get there.

[_**This special election is our first opportunity to fight back and flip a seat, so we need all hands on deck. Will you split $25 between Fight for Progress and me to join our team and help us start our campaign off strong?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99751540/520758390/922168981?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1NDE5YmZkLTNmYzktZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c5K4taccQP6wVXKk4n40Uvw55givWb78uWMca72vReo=)

Friend,
HAPPY NEW YEAR!!! We made it to 2025, and I’m excited for what this year holds.
First off, I want to say THANK YOU.
The holiday season is tough for fundraising, but thanks to you, we finished the year strong. And that’s going to set us up for the challenging year ahead.
Tomorrow, I’ll be sworn in as your Congresswoman, ready to take your priorities to Washington — and I’m not taking no for an answer.
And Friend, I’m so glad to have you by my side on this historic day.
Thank you again, and I hope you have a prosperous and very Happy New Year! 🎇
With gratitude,
Lateefah

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: America desperately needs to hear this message
body:
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=857fef02864444f19bf4d2fd7fc7e37a&_e=04Pvy7OnEzNdMidwL1q3nFwbSQWii4-D4JGtIM8SU9mIrWYYVprB7R727MSoyoD-Mzl5TU8VX6_KoEo1RS69dlTCiPrfN-KLUW1EQPpz1YXGpx9e_H2FA3N2l_omO0zDya845lAMtSVyChiRuP5gnDKPKlDxoh_oKWEvMSmRBFMlmt-bWaivJAYpSM9m5qGojHPdjihfDa9MBulXCMnXMbtfLroeBQ4rtV0RjaPRKnsh1tR7sYOSJvVoBoiVVsszaUT8TaPONCOW7KDNSkUxFGrPjainS5NNGw0TGnAYQJW-pgENGxS-F_11STB0iAzSx-j8OdDd60E3t8JaRySVx6w1x6NaISAO1cyFbtuUFvA%3D)
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=857fef02864444f19bf4d2fd7fc7e37a&_e=04Pvy7OnEzNdMidwL1q3nFwbSQWii4-D4JGtIM8SU9mIrWYYVprB7R727MSoyoD-Mzl5TU8VX6_KoEo1RS69dlTCiPrfN-KLUW1EQPpz1YXGpx9e_H2FA3N2l_omO0zDya845lAMtSVyChiRuP5gnDKPKlDxoh_oKWEvMSmRBFN8cMYdtowUYed6aF4H9RiC9aKwu3kVE4lTv5BxaCUZLUDbOGczS5s_5rY9peu7IgUhOLAGoODzmMNFiAPhc5dBdHdHc3p1bzQ7iRz_HKAKoQL6-fyXwwUlZBlIihCp3vZN3J76GfPWmHzwElUdOpG4xWWek_Kt4550_5BfUJGuxxVVkHg3DryoyAK5u7j_8mUemab-qpe00EipCS0moiLD)

This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=857fef02864444f19bf4d2fd7fc7e37a&_e=04Pvy7OnEzNdMidwL1q3nFwbSQWii4-D4JGtIM8SU9mIrWYYVprB7R727MSoyoD-Mzl5TU8VX6_KoEo1RS69dlTCiPrfN-KLUW1EQPpz1YXGpx9e_H2FA3N2l_omO0zDya845lAMtSVyChiRuP5gnDKPKlDxoh_oKWEvMSmRBFNmzcHvtg6WCqqo6K_rhHXtzYZSIGDQ8M9idTp9yUnVBtj8ZT-fgiuMbiZkW7wPN81VYCR3dbDM9ibygnCdpIz_TVPvg8NaBXS-z9C6bKizSVCAx0U3cbVZ8jtzDQKA54vqR9yNEPbdcgkOCqSufTiauMCv6H2SeYNxjbS5XFVbrsaKQh4cInzezMYSUTxMwpeEK93tYUA7y5GHLLZuDaJK)

Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. **[I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 to support the mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount >>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=857fef02864444f19bf4d2fd7fc7e37a&_e=04Pvy7OnEzNdMidwL1q3nFwbSQWii4-D4JGtIM8SU9mIrWYYVprB7R727MSoyoD-Mzl5TU8VX6_KoEo1RS69dlTCiPrfN-KLUW1EQPpz1YXGpx9e_H2FA3N2l_omO0zDya845lAMtSVyChiRuP5gnDKPKlDxoh_oKWEvMSmRBFOSVKQ-4razyBkAJ6p4yAZ0BIm5TqLdJgj-zMGmJbyu9qTcu6UW5fjFWKOZroAR_-H3RPtak4pPvQYYwxJ3tJFPCWHrpAjLxj3jVR45RFMeyHzwWFh31wU2e8d0QWJB8tapEO1GdTE15zFn3eAQICYRkbyhIWszqyzOVbFODpEa-v0I8HKGZu0hDwBK3DtHCImMWlkN0shq-6lYBd474E_V)**

Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important?

If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are _**desperate**_ to hear the unfiltered truth.

**This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for:**

* Free market capitalism
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles.

Young people need an alternative.

The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more.

I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below:

[Donate $10](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=857fef02864444f19bf4d2fd7fc7e37a&_e=04Pvy7OnEzNdMidwL1q3nFwbSQWii4-D4JGtIM8SU9mIrWYYVprB7R727MSoyoD-Mzl5TU8VX6_KoEo1RS69dlTCiPrfN-KLUW1EQPpz1YXGpx9e_H2FA3N2l_omO0zDya845lAMtSVyChiRuP5gnDKPKlDxoh_oKWEvMSmRBFPGeQWpxXvE2zvZpvSh-gjsg31fyQ6Dt6ACEG8LlEpaiMLjcawL-RLflZraFhjdKv18dNsSaOdH_jJ-V1SkiCF6RyV4VZ-khbSeZgp8KhfIs-XuywEsdr0KrHgQ9O-AjEwPEWNAyvBm1e2YM7i_5fSznrEHbzDG0opE58o4YQKX3FzHZmJuJ9F3IPuCfVVxLzKG8I-FXFHNjhVMSqcEF32Q)

clean_body: This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before. No, this isn't about a campaign or an election. I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society. Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends. Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important? If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are desperate to hear the unfiltered truth. This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for: Free market capitalism Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles. Young people need an alternative. The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more. I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below: You may be surprised, but when young people hear Ayn Rand's message of entrepreneurship, refusing to be a victim, and personal achievement, they are inspired and want to learn more. Yes, politics are important. But politics are downstream from culture. And culture is downstream from philosophy. name: Bobby Jindal
subject: The Spectator: Trump’s historic opportunity to make Americans healthy again
body:
Time to put an end to several Biden administration ‘patient-last’ policies| | | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=3c93cc15588f4b129b0cc9caeabcdb28&_e=aHIJvzzzfV7bj4AOvma-oBo5U7EW007v-bXkX-Ng-KgiWSMTeOLqiQ0EWzJqiOraS_cKAqEW_IvlYk1IFEgAdufvGPEFO5Izp7zX5aCaZLzbpoiaR9oQA4EpBrIAAmbfiMMJjJoX4tg2rWXzlxL4jO398ywF-lOJHMGs81dAEsP_-BGIvdqLouoEiuF35ywsjIxw5AuRBZYnQDbUAKNfMQ%3D%3D)
---
Trump’s historic opportunity to make Americans healthy again _Time to put an end to several Biden administration ‘patient-last’ policies_ [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=3c93cc15588f4b129b0cc9caeabcdb28&_e=aHIJvzzzfV7bj4AOvma-oANnQaGO_OX0SRgWCQbrIjR5yIOpXwd4R0FhE_KTQjr1ubAiDTTTFpZOW6rvkI5pb5VSXcEfCCpuRXpm3kvtJlLMBV-3NOWZOFLV4azxsQXcX5_eDCUEX6awJFHrJq_5JHsedE3FuwTSyuXSq0t6JCPLG9c9XbJt2txdMId6nK9OVnXJTDcz-m7FnhleZApHX6EIhBMPYCkA2NlKRHKB6Fo%3D "View More Articles By Bobby Jindal And Charlie Katebi")Bobby Jindal And Charlie Katebi
---
After years of crushing inflation, “woke” priorities and bureaucratic overregulation, Donald Trump and the Republican Party achieved a resounding victory in November. Part of that victory was built upon his promise to challenge the status quo in our healthcare system and to “make America healthy again.” The first step? Ending patient-last policies in Medicare, Medicaid, drug pricing and health insurance that prioritize the health of the healthcare system over the health of patients, driving up the cost of care at the expense of patients and taxpayers. Healthcare is the only market where customers discover the price after consuming a good or service, and these surprising costs are contributing to crushing medical debt. It doesn’t have to be this way. The first Trump administration instituted sweeping changes for patients to protect their right to know their healthcare prices, but the Biden administration caved to big DC interests and hasn’t properly enforced them. This has allowed patient-last practices to flourish; for example, the price of a routine colonoscopy in Wisconsin varies from $88 to $1,940, but a patient doesn’t find out what they’re paying until after the procedure is done and is unable to find the right provider at the right price. It’s not just patients who don’t know the price ahead of time — the employers and unions writing the check for the care are often blocked from getting an itemized receipt of the drugs and treatments that they paid for, which keeps them from being able to negotiate down the costs. Policymakers should ensure that these price transparency rules are enforced and made permanent, making it easier and cheaper to get healthy. **[**Finish reading on TheSpectator.com**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=3c93cc15588f4b129b0cc9caeabcdb28&_e=aHIJvzzzfV7bj4AOvma-oHmUG24s0YoYOBqg3Qlo6zCqvAdvX84fZUXoPxdQwIUMAW288Fgod2eWcLYhSA41Al33YkPMCj_hzlqfKVnniXXqddiwW_NdYMxK1hO6APK5059i250eOcjubg1MeSdcY0ndicuj-E-Hx7zuPFwLa8EO2FHM21q3Dj6z5IoG-hu-nBI3ViikEshoo5zZIT20w8005CDe9mzxypoDqere4jGmUiohsnRMx_mPUBItqLJRD7Kqbg3r_EJVd8Gdxp_9OBh9DfdnVSOn5BHPLPr45ZvPJKYehqYQhheqHfRO20xT)**

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Ringing in the New Year with a baseball stadium full of people on fire for Jesus! 🔥🏟️❤️
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=2b4b05368870461f85fb9ed1cbe1fda5&_e=ynY5DexG9tn6NSH5W3kjxoV_pHQ4z3QZxvYC0m1hxcgh1QcpeqFOtt-COUQud2exF_dnOsrBT2GmpOC7oq3yXMRCazOMbHU9Iaa-ZL0ihcxvIZYfDN8VYx6v1F3nfh15-wios6lGYM8UVHMn1xmmzDqCbDE9tV5bwmz6x-OnhCgvC_oyMKWzJhQSkPV9Wrud_U1qxBfn37oVAGyD0JI407bPrVZTUbCM0NLLCdeqmR5GxuubfQlPSJJb009bnibfuQFBGhY5I507j29p3G8QzduQwlVwlQjw9UDaZLE8CpeCg-EiJcfEBA_WuREQhS2F)
---
Dear Friend,
---
2️⃣0️⃣2️⃣5️⃣ is HERE, and it arrived in the best way possible—in the presence of the Holy Spirit! Thousands of Believers turned a baseball stadium into a house of worship!! We praised, cried out to God, and called on Him to bless this new year and move in _POWER!! _ In addition to the thousands who showed up to worship in person, over TWENTY THOUSAND people watched online!! name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Join our BRAVE brigade!
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---
| |
---
| | Peter, Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Take it from me, Peter, as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, **_you are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children_**. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b966692c5fbd4656ba2ed082fd018ccc&_e=iEaoJVtWHd3k0mb1PCyhiveKXr052Cqcx_MhnxFl67JrJ-bWJr53tTo4gabV5RrkgXZSuMNL9kQVAlL6BDxiSNvdatb9ipTBerqhvCdfoFXG5_1QT7QL15tUwEpCF6iZJJSKhMfdt5XyFlHQTQx_M2TyOOtkdgHboY-iZ_1rE2_xCA8exIpWGh9klXhUHetNmM6jj9P9elGnhtU9_DIUs0plRloZSk9pUmcO_ncUZdeFNlcfMXO8-MDKjgTyCuT_UIuEyay1udugq4UvqPOaKvlWTy04nmeURPqRlBDex-xFseyYlStu3k-O3vZfBWX1b9Fuj8AcBNRV2YH8oDBnRk4nHQz3w68kSBJFYmBKRaWdCbEhiax42hnQZ2mOn-3i)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth.**That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b966692c5fbd4656ba2ed082fd018ccc&_e=iEaoJVtWHd3k0mb1PCyhiveKXr052Cqcx_MhnxFl67JrJ-bWJr53tTo4gabV5RrkgXZSuMNL9kQVAlL6BDxiSNvdatb9ipTBerqhvCdfoFXG5_1QT7QL15tUwEpCF6iZJJSKhMfdt5XyFlHQTQx_M2TyOOtkdgHboY-iZ_1rE2_xCA8exIpWGh9klXhUHetNmM6jj9P9elGnhtU9_DIUs0plRloZSk9pUmcO_ncUZddDPK4wakWUdxJW3iMNKoPkHsn3ywMEpsWzjyleKu5Jza-s6UIQBf9q4K_j7SYnX220mwnJJH1pl3clMJmoXlYIpsZu-jT4MW2LXIPx81KEZm2YFwxE2Mc7EW5p2Z8C2G5QVXZB-U90NtQRjYomkW7X)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b966692c5fbd4656ba2ed082fd018ccc&_e=iEaoJVtWHd3k0mb1PCyhiveKXr052Cqcx_MhnxFl67JrJ-bWJr53tTo4gabV5RrkgXZSuMNL9kQVAlL6BDxiSNvdatb9ipTBerqhvCdfoFXG5_1QT7QL15tUwEpCF6iZJJSKhMfdt5XyFlHQTQx_M2TyOOtkdgHboY-iZ_1rE2_xCA8exIpWGh9klXhUHetNmM6jj9P9elGnhtU9_DIUs0plRloZSk9pUmcO_ncUZdeHTe6RJ92I5c7Nvv5H6DzZRYbgCcXhxfNym-LoiwblVVdo1J9o59756sXx1zNkfazIHjjNROVnWFX4l46rTXr0J5iiMnQPlzIX6GkFfaXEvXHCGbkwz3y2WC_DBo8UdL5NH2euFCdz6O6mNbi6JEYw)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b966692c5fbd4656ba2ed082fd018ccc&_e=iEaoJVtWHd3k0mb1PCyhiveKXr052Cqcx_MhnxFl67JrJ-bWJr53tTo4gabV5RrkgXZSuMNL9kQVAlL6BDxiSNvdatb9ipTBerqhvCdfoFXG5_1QT7QL15tUwEpCF6iZJJSKhMfdt5XyFlHQTQx_M2TyOOtkdgHboY-iZ_1rE2_xCA8exIpWGh9klXhUHetNmM6jj9P9elGnhtU9_DIUs0plRloZSk9pUmcO_ncUZdcJ4m0R3QejukxrqKL7o3nQrETN5BG1gjY7SuZ5bREtshgU1DpwB5BQ0FLbmIkfMIk8tHFNhWMZQ6fYKkjv_iv2c4fkUBSxyxVjpGQsGKnL0ZVb6hQyinJXmcVzDCWoOX1VQ49nYcjohplbRXN09IBk) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b966692c5fbd4656ba2ed082fd018ccc&_e=iEaoJVtWHd3k0mb1PCyhiveKXr052Cqcx_MhnxFl67JrJ-bWJr53tTo4gabV5RrkgXZSuMNL9kQVAlL6BDxiSNvdatb9ipTBerqhvCdfoFXG5_1QT7QL15tUwEpCF6iZJJSKhMfdt5XyFlHQTQx_M2TyOOtkdgHboY-iZ_1rE2_xCA8exIpWGh9klXhUHetNmM6jj9P9elGnhtU9_DIUs0plRloZSk9pUmcO_ncUZdc8hLpEU1VvIU4uPD7iP-oyl9kaZJHjA2JTL-kVbVI8UfVNAeCO7tyub3MmGgNutcVUwR9LlnwCcHryH-yrLwHlMnHhgNCv686RZKtlv0GaM7c96Hqd4q4OGrrl8Je-8wj0Y4ykcigbVZ2xVGwPlt4T)
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b966692c5fbd4656ba2ed082fd018ccc&_e=iEaoJVtWHd3k0mb1PCyhiveKXr052Cqcx_MhnxFl67JrJ-bWJr53tTo4gabV5RrkgXZSuMNL9kQVAlL6BDxiSNvdatb9ipTBerqhvCdfoFXG5_1QT7QL15tUwEpCF6iZJJSKhMfdt5XyFlHQTQx_M2TyOOtkdgHboY-iZ_1rE2_xCA8exIpWGh9klXhUHetNmM6jj9P9elGnhtU9_DIUs0plRloZSk9pUmcO_ncUZdda4rRznI_-aJMBZIvmplG1y3URSOYeS7ZU2GA1bKgYvZ87dHIFjovWDgZuoJV_ilAXnNWtqk6G0mK0WjqriNCzFdBhjztodlJF2I5FRY1pfS1tSzR1beR-lq00Y35A_g_lyNnzAuoCW0wjYPXJT91f)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | [ **DONATE **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b966692c5fbd4656ba2ed082fd018ccc&_e=iEaoJVtWHd3k0mb1PCyhiveKXr052Cqcx_MhnxFl67JrJ-bWJr53tTo4gabV5RrkgXZSuMNL9kQVAlL6BDxiSNvdatb9ipTBerqhvCdfoFXG5_1QT7QL15tUwEpCF6iZJJSKhMfdt5XyFlHQTQx_M2TyOOtkdgHboY-iZ_1rE2_xCA8exIpWGh9klXhUHetNmM6jj9P9elGnhtU9_DIUs0plRloZSk9pUmcO_ncUZdeE-Ni4ShZNRZeUxHYTptmBl1vQvX21liFjZJJHEnPzZ80eHhiRyEoZTlwrY7AswAQheYEWZYd3bjZ4x8BHQ4WwbJKGsQHfmmb0p-ivfpmVNqRyXJc-PtX7JrFpjqPROCe9I5AxT7TGgwWJHZ2DEhzu)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: A jump-start
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Thank you, Peter. Because of
supporters like you, Justice Democrats successfully reached our $100,000
grassroots fundraising goal before 2024 ended.

Now, 2025 is here, and with it comes uncertainty and tough fights ahead.
For many vulnerable communities across the United States, this new year
brings uncertainty. We know that with a Republican trifecta in Washington
and Donald Trump back in the White House, the GOP is gearing up to unleash
its extreme Project 2025 policy agenda that will hurt immigrants, LGBTQ+
people, working families, our environment, and more.

But the greatest antidote for fear is courage—courage to take on the
people and systems that brought us here. This year, we must make big
changes to reshape the Democratic Party from the ground up to be the Party
for-and-by everyday people taking down Republicans and their billionaire
backers.

That means demanding Party leadership cut its ties with far-right
billionaire-funded lobby groups and super PACs like AIPAC and the crypto
industry, building the pressure to overturn Citizens United and affirm
that corporations are NOT people, and recruiting the next generation of
Justice Democrats candidates to run against both Democratic and Republican
incumbents who’ve lost touch with those they were elected to serve.

It’s going to take a lot of work, but if we come together, we can defeat
the odds, strengthen our progressive movement, and put more power into the
hands of working-class people where it belongs.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250102?refcode=em20250102-36284&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36284_1203867_sgOWhu&akid=36284%2E1203867%2EsgOWhu ]We’re gearing up to launch something big this January in preparation
for the 2026 elections. Since our organization directly relies on
contributions from regular people instead of corporate interests, will you
help us get a jump-start on the new year by pitching in $5
today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250102?refcode=em20250102-36284&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36284_1203867_sgOWhu&akid=36284%2E1203867%2EsgOWhu ]Contribute $5

Thanks for all you do — and remember no matter what comes our way in 2025,
we’re in this together.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250102-36284-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36284_1203867_sgOWhu&akid=36284%2E1203867%2EsgOWhu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36284%2E1203867%2EsgOWhu

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5eab20f9a59e420cbe5f0464730ccd1a&_e=LoIY7jd8j5txxN_QpE0PqoMmqb0l9cD2Mf-le5oFNSk4DFMg2zSjb5vea_H9dht2NTTe4oji6kXpvV8aImm97peaBm0a0Dm_T5NNBOY5C9zQg5-QhTtCQLCoF2TkqEW3hsxVXQLErQza4deiusXeTg3HGpO5AvCMlCoJ518fUqnyU5WuUbXpHZLr1CUTW3PDVjn3aprkuyfXn29t07VKvDf-KGfiw7Oh1jqbXDQPek2LoZUbitmkm_8zUOptW5mmxg76rkWSnXiJdNUYeP3rjkPN3NfFj9JYP_htFOwgouYecMV4fRXMYoZVAGI8HBFoMtwosGjebf4MkwZlqQ7JxBbYH7pZzA3r7-dlIPGIKQw%3D)

Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. **[I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 to support the mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount >>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5eab20f9a59e420cbe5f0464730ccd1a&_e=LoIY7jd8j5txxN_QpE0PqoMmqb0l9cD2Mf-le5oFNSk4DFMg2zSjb5vea_H9dht2NTTe4oji6kXpvV8aImm97peaBm0a0Dm_T5NNBOY5C9zQg5-QhTtCQLCoF2TkqEW3hsxVXQLErQza4deiusXeTl7M2H408azf31Ldbcx5C-VPddzrbLZIsDyvRg5ElqhvmKcKd3FZe-AOrMWOcdUVpUzlV4PwXqQfgakrRVBfeCqwBMK__TIzYVy_jClIOcJycQZbYhuolLaZ2LlqpVnKD7PxWGHF8FR5QGoPWXhlvFREGPczd_4ioPxmgqmVJnjd3xPMFfOTiCSebKfe9MPwJXWUqraOhyHyH4aS25QaMBQ%3D)**

Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important?

If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are _**desperate**_ to hear the unfiltered truth.

**This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for:**

* Free market capitalism
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles.

Young people need an alternative.

The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more.

I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below:

You may be surprised, but when young people hear Ayn Rand's message of entrepreneurship, refusing to be a victim, and personal achievement, they are inspired and want to learn more.

Yes, politics are important. But politics are downstream from culture. And culture is downstream from philosophy. The Atlas Society is on the frontlines of fighting in the philosophical culture war, which may determine the fate of the country's future.

We CANNOT give up the culture or give up young people.

This is more important than a campaign or a single election.

You and I must invest in reaching young people with this message.

Please don't wait to take action.

My goal is to raise this $25,000 ASAP within a 48-hour period. Can I count on you to make a donation?

[Here is the link to donate more one time.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5eab20f9a59e420cbe5f0464730ccd1a&_e=LoIY7jd8j5txxN_QpE0PqoMmqb0l9cD2Mf-le5oFNSk4DFMg2zSjb5vea_H9dht2NTTe4oji6kXpvV8aImm97peaBm0a0Dm_T5NNBOY5C9zQg5-QhTtCQLCoF2TkqEW3hsxVXQLErQza4deiusXeTl7M2H408azf31Ldbcx5C-WLPO71pHCaM-t6JpkI_l4fpPPABlxevDX8WPg7TVjL9l9fydaDMe1QtiLvZ6mLx8E7HOTYdw7Y5ICJTubhlCxMTtmhdCOA2YRsEXObXQpDDp3Cn6uTE9bNlgRMsfZhGs7qM8lWvJGv5br3yHqnxhZBe6_6P5EFFFt9E9cTFmBp8qeLmlpzpnkICrU2ru1mlAI%3D)

Kellyanne Conway, Former Senior Counselor to President Trump
