clean_body: This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before. No, this isn't about a campaign or an election. I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society. Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends. Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important? If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are desperate to hear the unfiltered truth. This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for: Free market capitalism Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles. Young people need an alternative. The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more. I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below: - You may be surprised, but when young people hear Ayn Rand's message of entrepreneurship, refusing to be a victim, and personal achievement, they are inspired and want to learn more. Yes, politics are important. But politics are downstream from culture. And culture is downstream from philosophy. The Atlas Society is on the frontlines of fighting in the philosophical culture war, which may determine the fate of the country's future. We CANNOT give up the culture or give up young people. This is more important than a campaign or a single election. You and I must invest in reaching young people with this message. Please don't wait to take action. My goal is to raise this $25,000 ASAP within a 48-hour period. Can I count on you to make a donation? Kellyanne Conway, Former Senior Counselor to President Trump The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible.

subject: It all comes down to Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can’t let Democrats steal it from us

|
---
| | |

name: Katie Porter
subject: Grateful for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39374%2E3422442%2EspUZZx)
Hi, Derek!
I wanted to send you a short note of gratitude today.
As I always say, a goal without a deadline is just a dream. That’s why every time we have a fundraising deadline, I take it seriously.
Thanks to more than 870 grassroots donors from across the country, we reached our end-of-year fundraising goal. Together we will continue to fight to lower costs for families and stand up to special interests in Washington.
I’m so grateful to have your support, Derek!
Thanks again & Happy New Year!
Katie Porter
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250102?refcode=em20250102-39374&refcode2=39374_3422442_spUZZx&akid=39374%2E3422442%2EspUZZx)

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250102-39374&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39374_3422442_spUZZx&akid=39374%2E3422442%2EspUZZx)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39374%2E3422442%2EspUZZx).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: thankful for your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Team,

As we enter 2025, I just wanted to take a moment and thank you for your support.

Having you by my side truly means the world to me. Your grassroots support is what will allow me to continue the fight for lower taxes, lower costs, and protect our Jersey Values as your next Governor. Together we can make New Jersey a place where everyone can afford to live, work, and raise a family.

If you’re able, can you make a donation to help us get my campaign for Governor off the ground in the New Year? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=]

Thank you for your dedication to our mission. With your support, we can make true progress for Jersey.

Grateful to have you by my side.

Yours,

Josh Gottheimer
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. clean_body: [#] Team, As we enter 2025, I just wanted to take a moment and thank you for your support. Having you by my side truly means the world to me. Your grassroots support is what will allow me to continue the fight for lower taxes, lower costs, and protect our Jersey Values as your next Governor. Together we can make New Jersey a place where everyone can afford to live, work, and raise a family. If you’re able, can you make a donation to help us get my campaign for Governor off the ground in the New Year? [=] Thank you for your dedication to our mission. With your support, we can make true progress for Jersey. Grateful to have you by my side. Yours, Josh Gottheimer Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. I hope you had a great New Year’s celebration and got to spend it with the people you care about most. Over the holidays, I felt so lucky to be surrounded by loved ones, and it reminded me of this incredible community we’ve built together. It’s people like you — people who care about the future of our planet, even when the odds are stacked against us — who give this movement strength. And because of your support, we hit our ambitious $25,000 end-of-year goal! Hitting this milestone gives us the foundation to take on the fights that lie ahead. The challenges ahead are big, yes — but together, we’ve proven that when we rise up for what’s right, we can accomplish extraordinary things. Let’s start 2025 with purpose and determination. clean_body: I’m so proud to be in this fight with you. | = Happy New Year! I hope you had a great New Year’s celebration and got to spend it with the people you care about most. Over the holidays, I felt so lucky to be surrounded by loved ones, and it reminded me of this incredible community we’ve built together. It’s people like you — people who care about the future of our planet, even when the odds are stacked against us — who give this movement strength. And because of your support, we hit our ambitious $25,000 end-of-year goal! Hitting this milestone gives us the foundation to take on the fights that lie ahead. The challenges ahead are big, yes — but together, we’ve proven that when we rise up for what’s right, we can accomplish extraordinary things. Let’s start 2025 with purpose and determination. Let’s fight for leaders who put people over polluters, and for a future where every person can thrive on a healthy planet. | = With hope and gratitude, xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Mario Arias, Forward Party
subject: Looking Back, Moving Forward - Coalitions Team Reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
What we learned and where we're going in 2025.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_coalitions&n=1)
---
Thursday, January 02, 2025 | Peter -- Buenas tardes. I’m Mario Arias, and I currently serve as the Allies Manager at the Forward Party. Two years ago, my journey began as a state lead for Nevada, where I had the opportunity to work closely with volunteers and the community, which helped me truly understand the importance of building committees within the Forward Party. Seeing the growth of our movement firsthand, I realized how crucial committees are for empowering people, fostering leadership, and keeping our party connected to communities across the country. As we continue to grow, these committees will be crucial in strengthening our ties to communities and driving our mission forward. **What Went Well** In 2024, we laid the foundation for our movement by launching four committees: the Veterans & Veteran Families Committee, the Women’s Committee, the Black Voters Committee, and the Young Forwardists. These committees are driving progress by creating opportunities for engagement, collaboration, and leadership in communities across the country. Committees play a critical role in ensuring that our party remains inclusive, dynamic, and connected to diverse communities. They provide a path for volunteers and supporters to come together, share ideas, and take action. By focusing on communities that have often been underrepresented, these committees ensure that every voice is heard and that our work reflects the diverse values and experiences of our nation. Each committee has already demonstrated its impact by supporting 15 Forward-endorsed candidates, providing the resources and platforms these leaders need to share their vision. Together, our committees successfully hosted text-banking events that reached over 55,000 voters, ensuring direct engagement with communities. Additionally, they organized candidate forums featuring 15 dynamic leaders, giving voters an opportunity to connect with the people who aim to represent them. The importance of these committees is also reflected in their growth. We’ve seen 380 new committee members eager to contribute their energy and ideas. On social media, committees like the Young Forwardists, Women’s Committee, and Black Voters Committee have amplified their message, reaching a combined 550 followers. This growth demonstrates how these groups inspire action, foster leadership, and build connections that strengthen our movement. [These are our thoughts from 2024, but we want to hear from you! Please head to this link and fill out your thoughts on lessons learned, the direction the party should head in, and projects we should tackle! We will read them all, and we will highlight our top 10, along with the people who submitted them, in early January as our New Years Resolutions.](https://home.forwardparty.com/2024_end_of_year_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_coalitions&n=2) **2025 Projects** Looking ahead, we’re expanding our efforts with new committees, including LGBTQ+, AAPI, Hispanic & Latino, Indigenous, and Disability Committees. These additions will ensure broader representation as we continue building a more inclusive and engaged democracy. Our committees are the heart of this movement, and their work is just getting started. Together, we’re building the Forward Party into a force for change. Thank you for being part of this journey — let’s keep moving forward! If you're still feeling the season of giving, consider donating to Forward this season! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_coalitions&n=3 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_coalitions&n=3)
---
Happy New Year,
Mario Arias
[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_coalitions&n=4)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_coalitions&n=5) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_coalitions&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_coalitions&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_coalitions&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_coalitions&n=9) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. name: Rushern Baker III
subject: Join Us in Supporting Rushern Baker for County Executive – Volunteer With Us!
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93538/images/Yard%20Signs%20%28March%202022%29%20%2815%29.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-1]
Dear Friends and Neighbors,
We’re thrilled to reconnect with you! Whether you’ve supported us before or are considering joining our incredible community of change makers for the first time, we’re excited to invite you to be part of the Rushern Baker for County Executive campaign. This is your chance to make a real difference in our community while having fun and meeting amazing people along the way!
Why Volunteer for Rushern Baker? [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer]
Champion Change:
* Help us share Rushern Baker’s vision for a better, brighter county.
* Be Part of the Movement: Join a passionate team working to create lasting positive impact.
* Feel Empowered: Your time and talents can directly influence the success of this campaign.
What’s Happening?
This campaign is all about connecting with voters, sharing our message, and building excitement for Rushern Baker’s leadership . Whether you’re a seasoned volunteer or new to campaigns, there’s a role for everyone.
How You Can Help:
* Knock on Doors [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer] : Help spread the word about Rushern Baker’s vision.
* Phone Banking [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer] : Reach out to voters and ensure they’re informed and engaged.
* Social Media Outreach [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer] : Share content and help amplify our message online.
No matter how you choose to participate, your involvement will make a difference. Plus, you’ll get to be part of a dynamic team of community-minded individuals who are passionate about progress.
Let’s Make It Happen! [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer]
Sign Up [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer] or learn more about our volunteer opportunities. Don’t wait—our campaign is stronger with YOU on board!
Thank you for stepping up to support this critical campaign. Together, we can make a real impact and ensure a brighter future for our county. We can’t wait to see you back (or welcome you for the first time)!
VOLUNTEER NOW [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer]
Warm regards,
Sherrie Brown
Campaign Volunteer Coordinator
Rushern Baker for County Executive Campaign
P.S. Know someone else who would love to join? Share this email and invite them to be part of this exciting movement!
https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer/ [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer/]
By Authority: Friends of Rushern Baker III, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
Baker for county Executive
9646 Marlboro Pike
Upper Marlboro , MD 20772
United States

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The consequence of a trifecta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010225_4&amount=25]
Truthout: Republicans Plan to Revive Legislative Attacks on Voting Rights [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010225_4&amount=25]
This is the consequence of opponents of voting rights controlling both houses of Congress and the White House, folks:
A key House lawmaker recently made clear in an interview that the vote suppressors plan to push for a pair of their voting-related bills when they take control of both chambers of Congress and the White House this month. They plan to bring forward both the American Confidence in Elections (ACE) Act and the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act.
“ As we look to the new year with unified Republican government, we have a real opportunity to move these pieces of legislation not only out of committee, but across the House floor and into law, ” he said.
The ACE ACT " would nationalize harmful and unnecessary restrictions on voting rights, " while the SAVE Act -- which narrowly passed the House in 2024 and was stopped in the Senate -- requires proof of U.S. citizenship to vote in federal elections, which is something you already need, since non-citizen voting is illegal, and adds onerous verification requirements intended to drive off eligible voters.
Team, we have to be ready to stop these bills and more when the new Congress starts tomorrow. The margins are so thin and every bit helps as we hold our representatives accountable for their votes. Pitch in $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010225_4&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010225_4&amount=25]

subject: It’s time to celebrate 🎉

body:
Tomorrow, George will officially be sworn in.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

clean_body: Tomorrow, George will officially be sworn in. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey Peter, team Latimer here! Tomorrow, George will officially be sworn in to represent New York’s 16th Congressional district in the 119th Congress, and we want to surprise him with a card signed by our campaign’s top supporters. | You’ve been part of this campaign – from when George announced he was running for Congress in December 2023, to winning our primary in June, to our victory on Election Day. None of it would be possible without supporters like you. Now, as George prepares to be sworn into office, – Team Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Sharif Street, Chairman
subject: Thank you for fighting with us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

I just want to thank you for your continued support throughout 2024

I know 2025 seems scary and uncertain, but this past year showed that we are fired up and ready to do something. And we still have a chance to make real progress here in Pennsylvania – from our upcoming state Supreme Court elections to the 2026 midterms.

If we stand together and keep up this momentum, I know we have the resources and energy to fight back against whatever the Trump administration throws our way. Thank you so much for being a part of our team.

Onward,

Sharif Street
Chairman, Pennsylvania Democratic Party

| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2ef46739d5424148adbfdfd45f5c210c&_e=i-zRPIkA7rDQPjM4fRzVRnEbqiSCACE8TWZxV1cXjjExmW_AMuz2_5DnWTQaG-SBREgugw4fNep-nonOvPSoKbsLEhuTPj-rXS5rSUod6uo92x8n_OASZFrMycllGDPlF3oU2WcemcpEQ4LGi1ulVjgyav368yAvC9_LHyBmTjKT7fN03veTYF7317LWHZG2x6kHpSfwFXCRw7PhHjX6HCluaRCncGp_0vP-I4yizbjEFwETXFW3Fn5A9dXwZWDJxQRMuAUFcroAMZ9eooUwUEsDdHtXbBRNWFD4Ysn94Kbx5mdY1KaSodXuocOV9bgrn4z6YgoHmbltyxQtkuNdUTjP3C5Pp8yUni27X5ZNYUBh5QuZcp6VJ_bJDniKwFJJsgkGm2uxXpbfGTQuSIV-qw%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2ef46739d5424148adbfdfd45f5c210c&_e=i-zRPIkA7rDQPjM4fRzVRnEbqiSCACE8TWZxV1cXjjExmW_AMuz2_5DnWTQaG-SBREgugw4fNep-nonOvPSoKbsLEhuTPj-rXS5rSUod6uo92x8n_OASZFrMycllGDPlF3oU2WcemcpEQ4LGi1ulVjgyav368yAvC9_LHyBmTjKT7fN03veTYF7317LWHZG2x6kHpSfwFXCRw7PhHjX6HCluaRCncGp_0vP-I4yizbginB7fxl4HjY3_Q35xvDj1_VFzpBmLbII5rk_kMQTdHxfFYMHgYMAYbqy0dRxIIYpLXa3MlHGxgEDZxis92CP9ySDlJS-0UbIDCm5bWsP3aO2zDju0v-ngnK_WbLpfl1ugLcJsAXKlMo1aQ-2dAZYH83wawuYUvDlyVMY225PSKQ%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."

**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2ef46739d5424148adbfdfd45f5c210c&_e=i-zRPIkA7rDQPjM4fRzVRnEbqiSCACE8TWZxV1cXjjExmW_AMuz2_5DnWTQaG-SBREgugw4fNep-nonOvPSoKbsLEhuTPj-rXS5rSUod6uo92x8n_OASZFrMycllGDPlF3oU2WcemcpEQ4LGi1ulVjgyav368yAvC9_LHyBmTjKT7fN03veTYF7317LWHZG2x6kHpSfwFXCRw7PhHjX6HCluaRCncGp_0vP-I4yizbir6qCPqbtbOHFGZqZyOIBVuiOJ76o9cdQhB0E6SMzK4aGiM1fxmNJLqck3uJxBQwxvh4Hz6Tpri4bY50PWw-0PRes7q3R4nJXZb7xR51wcNUpYIZyvjHNGXQDMPAEZyXMfO0nBt8Qr_SEF__Hf4gkG8Kvs3rJ8lHVJXpdJ3iC-5g%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2ef46739d5424148adbfdfd45f5c210c&_e=i-zRPIkA7rDQPjM4fRzVRnEbqiSCACE8TWZxV1cXjjExmW_AMuz2_5DnWTQaG-SBREgugw4fNep-nonOvPSoKbsLEhuTPj-rXS5rSUod6uo92x8n_OASZFrMycllGDPlF3oU2WcemcpEQ4LGi1ulVjgyav368yAvC9_LHyBmTjKT7fN03veTYF7317LWHZG2x6kHpSfwFXCRw7PhHjX6HCluaRCncGp_0vP-I4yizbh6sa18I4NQv54BU4UQ8OogqmlZ8m8GWMlTozmjhvTkXnLNw6rW2sNTa5Sb0J7H-SxK7lIFyPibp6Vh1pdgVI0-Py1M4h4T1n_KH3kNy7htglZPag2XVHnduiv_7QRujX8kNXy9YyV-WKiSmB1q51Nepu95bjDmr2QAKsE1WXo09Q%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2ef46739d5424148adbfdfd45f5c210c&_e=i-zRPIkA7rDQPjM4fRzVRnEbqiSCACE8TWZxV1cXjjExmW_AMuz2_5DnWTQaG-SBREgugw4fNep-nonOvPSoKbsLEhuTPj-rXS5rSUod6uo92x8n_OASZFrMycllGDPlF3oU2WcemcpEQ4LGi1ulVjgyav368yAvC9_LHyBmTjKT7fN03veTYF7317LWHZG2x6kHpSfwFXCRw7PhHjX6HCluaRCncGp_0vP-I4yizbj65l7AvRI0G51I9TpmZAvFN9hAziExDTAN0C4cYyrc4BBhrtExG0ronSX8r8V0PCJyyEHgrgchxbCt563e-8guIsflzWTFx0Y0hTdU9eOrqTbAV8R8Jl0V42l3wQJ32FL9mZgqNTJRdAVFuPS9Rr7UIRqd997HkwZha-00AbLIQQ%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2ef46739d5424148adbfdfd45f5c210c&_e=i-zRPIkA7rDQPjM4fRzVRnEbqiSCACE8TWZxV1cXjjExmW_AMuz2_5DnWTQaG-SBREgugw4fNep-nonOvPSoKbsLEhuTPj-rXS5rSUod6uo92x8n_OASZFrMycllGDPlF3oU2WcemcpEQ4LGi1ulVjgyav368yAvC9_LHyBmTjKT7fN03veTYF7317LWHZG2x6kHpSfwFXCRw7PhHjX6HCluaRCncGp_0vP-I4yizbj8oCMwPxNF8B1pD5E4nA_jeg9ByzThJ-mzXeXxZSU08ASTH1-pIfmEpEMknPhzneQGyMT2NUZVzpGH4MlM6hqBjzhXlYFmDcYA1faDUwYba8eTX-y2ltRR0qrr6vhrY4zI7PRSVBlN58HnctKmHapHyUtdwL9nogOcL-47HO5Akg%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines

My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Safeguarding democracy is the honor of my life
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=19%2E181023%2EjTsZFt)
Six years ago this week, I was sworn in for my first term as Secretary of State. Safeguarding Michigan’s democracy is the honor of my life.
Every career choice I’ve made has been part of a lifelong mission, my mission: upholding and defending American democracy. I'm ready to continue the hard work of making sure every voice is heard and strengthening our democracy in Michigan in 2025 and beyond.
We’ve got a lot of work to do in this new year to uphold and defend that democracy — and it will take your support to get it done. Let’s Go.
All my best,
Jocelyn
* * *
Before you go... we need your help. Since her 2018 election, Secretary Benson has fought for free and fair elections. She’s on the front lines of defending and strengthening our democracy. **[Will you contribute today to show your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250102-1?refcode=em20250102-1&refcode2=19_181023_jTsZFt&akid=19%2E181023%2EjTsZFt)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250102-1?refcode=em20250102-1&refcode2=19_181023_jTsZFt&akid=19%2E181023%2EjTsZFt)**

CNN republican Scott Jennings fired back when a co-panelist tried to defend Joe Biden's record by dragging Donald Trump.
**[Watch the clash below:](https://substack.com/redirect/4023d655-1a83-4802-ae6f-76070e346d9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4023d655-1a83-4802-ae6f-76070e346d9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/4023d655-1a83-4802-ae6f-76070e346d9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"When (Biden) was asked about his regrets, the fact that he didn't say 'I regret that 13 American service members lost their lives in Afghanistan,' to me that's a disgrace!" Jennings said, visibly upset.
"What's happened since election day, he pardoned his son Hunter!" he continued.
A democrat panelist chimed in, "Trump needs to say 'I'm sorry that a million people died in COVID when I was telling people to shine light in their bodies and take disinfectant."
Jennings snapped back, saying that the characterization of Trump's comments during the early days of the pandemic were "absolutely false!"
Even the shows host Abbey Phillip clarified that Trump was merely speculating about possible treatments at a time when little information was available about the virus.
* * *
# **Conservative speaker GOES OFF on Muslim student who blames America?!!**
Lebanese-American conservative activist **[Brigitte Gabriel EXPLODED at a muslim student](https://substack.com/redirect/f656528f-90e5-4f0e-90b2-6b071b135650?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who asked a question about the way terrorism is handled in America, during a panel Q&A on Benghazi, criticizing the U.S. government's approach to fighting terrorism "with weapons."
"How can we fight an ideological war with weapons?" the student asked.
Gabriel saw right through the intent behind the girl's question and called her right out for it.
"It is time we take political correctness and **[throw it in the garbage where it belongs!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/f656528f-90e5-4f0e-90b2-6b071b135650?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Gabriel exploded.

body:
It’s official: The Cook Political Report is calling the Virginia Governor’s race a TOTAL TOSS-UP
**Peter, it’s official: The Cook Political Report is calling the Virginia Governor’s race a TOTAL TOSS-UP:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84756?refcode=em20250102-8705&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8705%2E614464%2EnkjgXa)

We’ve been saying this for months now, but it’s true: the Virginia Governor’s race is set to be the most competitive statewide race in the country in 2025. We saw what happened here in Virginia and across the country on November 5 – Trump and Republicans made gains in places Democrats led in 2020.
This race is going to draw national attention, and with that comes outside money. We know Republicans are going to pour millions of dollars into this race in order to keep the Governor’s seat red, but Abigail Spanberger knows how to win competitive and tough races, and we know she has what it takes to flip this seat blue.
But we can’t be complacent – we need to build up our infrastructure and prepare now. **[So, can we count on you to split a donation Abigail’s campaign and Heartland Patriots today to make sure she has what she needs to win this TOSS-UP seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84756?refcode=em20250102-8705&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8705%2E614464%2EnkjgXa)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
Thank you, Peter

|
---
Peter, I’m amazed.

First of all, I need to thank you.

I know we’ve bombarded you with emails the last few days, but I have great news: **We hit our 2024 end-of-year goal!**

And since I don’t do a single minute of call time, **this success is fully thanks to grassroots supporters like you.**

I hope you had a wonderful holiday season, and I’m incredibly grateful for your support.

Thank you again,

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Click here to [receive fewer emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99754871/520770732/-250809415?refcode=RTFC_20250102_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzMxY2I4OC01YWM5LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOdg8avbnobJ_jgH8GKVa7oXfrmQ8EtnOi6z31fJrrM=&emci=85f7bb4d-2fc9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=2731cb88-5ac9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=34594689). name: Warrior Mom
subject: Happy New Year from Warrior Mom!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Dear Warriors, As we usher in a brand-new year, I want to take a moment to thank each of you for your unwavering support and commitment. Together, we continue to inspire hope, share knowledge, and empower one another to create meaningful change in our families and beyond. Here’s to an exciting 2025 filled with opportunities for growth, healing, and triumphs!
---
|
---
| **Subscribe and Receive a Special Gift**
---
| I’m thrilled to invite you to join my Substack community, where I share exclusive insights, tips, and personal stories to guide and uplift you on your journey. By subscribing to [Autism Warrior Mom](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=d594bbf837&e=3a42edfdc4), you’ll gain access to valuable content and resources designed to support you every step of the way. As a special thank you, all paid subscribers will receive a free ebook copy of my bestselling book, _Warrior Mom: A Mother's Journey In Healing Her Son with Autism._ Just email me the receipt and receive your free gift. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to dive deeper into my story and learn how to apply my strategies in your own life!
---
| [SUBSCRIBE](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=0c42c7bae0&e=3a42edfdc4 "SUBSCRIBE")
---
|
---
| **Leading the Way as President of Autism Health Inc.**
---
| As the founder and president of Autism Health Inc., I’m dedicated to providing resources and fostering a community that champions health and healing for families navigating autism. Our nonprofit organization is at the forefront of advocating for integrative health solutions and empowering families with the tools they need to thrive. Learn more about our mission and programs by visiting [Autism Health](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=c8e3da1820&e=3a42edfdc4).
---
| [LEARN MORE](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=aa3fb66f64&e=3a42edfdc4 "LEARN MORE")
---
|
---
| **Autism Health Summit: Save 25% Today!**
---
| Mark your calendars for the Autism Health Summit, taking place April 10-13, 2025, at the beautiful Town & Country Resort in San Diego, CA. This life-changing event will feature dynamic speakers, informative workshops, and invaluable networking opportunities. Use promo code **Holiday25** at checkout to receive **25% off your admission ticket** until January 15th. Secure your spot today and join us for this empowering experience!
---
| [BUY TICKET](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=82f7402c79&e=3a42edfdc4 "BUY TICKET")
---
|
---
| **Join Us at The MAHA Inaugural Ball**
---
| Kick off 2025 in style by attending The MAHA Inaugural Ball in Washington DC on **January 20, 2025** , from **7 PM to 11 PM**. This elegant evening promises an unforgettable celebration with live music, dancing, and more. Let’s come together to celebrate our shared passion for advocacy and community. If you're planning to attend and considering private security for yourself or your group, we highly recommend reaching out to our trusted friends and supporters at [SABRE Defense Team](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=f810d1bc38&e=3a42edfdc4) for professional executive protection services.
---
| [ATTEND MAHA BALL](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=0d3882a49d&e=3a42edfdc4 "ATTEND MAHA BALL")
---
| [PRIVATE SECURITY](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=5f42a5297b&e=3a42edfdc4 "PRIVATE SECURITY")
---
|
---
| **Here’s to a Bright and Beautiful Year Ahead**
---
| As we step into 2025, let’s continue to support, uplift, and inspire one another. I’m so grateful for each of you and the collective strength. Together, we can achieve incredible things—one step, one connection, one story at a time. Wishing you a year filled with joy, love, and endless possibilities. Warmly, Tracy Slepcevic
Bestselling Author & Founder of Autism Health Inc.
[www.WarriorMom.com](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=9c98416200&e=3a42edfdc4)
[Subscribe to My Substack](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=6faa780a74&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=a5e7ede37e&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| | [](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=8f2b5af500&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| | [](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=2ee249a958&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| | [](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=a7ec1ca533&e=3a42edfdc4)

[_why did I get this?_](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/about?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=1c80113a5a&e=3a42edfdc4&c=42c1bc4771) [unsubscribe from this list](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=1c80113a5a&t=b&e=3a42edfdc4&c=42c1bc4771) [update subscription preferences](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=1c80113a5a&e=3a42edfdc4&c=42c1bc4771)

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: A personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=UvoVe1y7icOj%2Ff%2FLC%2BjERaw9AMio7fJ44mP%2BKkhX1BbPYV32qmOnHXWAKdsuLrQ804PsWDMOyggewG2RegMprs9cD1kDuEgmaNzwpjd%2B%2BzpY4tKEK%2BuH40Dx7pzJJC3LlFURsxHsxxOSfN0hg9fPQHyrtTQ8cIyhvVFFt7L99cMgmdUhr9hPTvcwhlbH327RqwxPvecnht2BjqR2x0FF4dCwwe97opk6GNKeDfm07D697ds8LGryO1WOslRid65YbPDwSEe9DNK6g8LkfLG7IUmaSCktJMwjEBQ4NVMQrXXue0O8IvtF0gPYZWhbdJwBPjJK1DyHohWMgWebPLz96U0%2BjEaW35oxF4gVEOUhLFYIYoGuhmO%2Bs5DhD1owwTZHNMmnBgHrJmSyDpZaZilgsy7S5Lbtkk5Jwgs%2FUIMv07E%3D)
---
| |
---
Muchas gracias. This past Tuesday marked more than our last day of 2024 — it was the final chance to hit our end-of-year fundraising goal. My team set an ambitious goal of raising **$15,000** before we entered the new year — **_and I’m proud to share that Team Vasquez did just that._** Because of you, we’re laying the groundwork to keep up our fight against MAGA extremism in Washington. Now more than ever, standing united against attacks on our freedoms and our future is critical, and on Tuesday, that’s exactly what we did. It’s what we did to flip NM-02 in 2022, and exactly how we’ve kept it blue for two consecutive terms for the first time in 40 years. Only together can we accomplish great things. Thank you, and happy new year! Un abrazo, Gabe

My team set an ambitious goal of raising $15,000 before we entered the new year — and I’m proud to share that Team Vasquez did just that. Because of you, we’re laying the groundwork to keep up our fight against MAGA extremism in Washington. Now more than ever, standing united against attacks on our freedoms and our future is critical, and on Tuesday, that’s exactly what we did. name: Lexi Schiff
subject: My dad’s big day is tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8253%2E5257348%2E4CSaHR)
Hi Derek — It’s Lexi, Adam’s daughter.
Tomorrow, my dad will be sworn in to a full term as California’s next U.S. Senator. It’s an incredibly proud moment for our family, and I know how much this milestone means to him.
My dad has spent his entire career fighting for the values we all care about: lowering the cost of housing and childcare, strengthening Social Security and Medicare, protecting clean air and water, restoring reproductive rights, and so much more.
But if we’re being honest — it hasn’t been easy. He’s faced a lot of false attacks, smears, and name-calling from Republican leaders. That never stops him from doing his work, but it definitely worries me and my family. Luckily, we have this incredible team supporting him and his work — you make it all so worthwhile.
Now, as my dad prepares to take the oath of office, I know he’s ready to take these fights to the Senate and succeed, delivering for the people of California and the country.
From the start, it’s been the support of people like you that keeps him going. Your commitment to this movement has meant the world to our family, and I want to make sure my dad feels that support as he steps into this new role.
That’s why I want to make tomorrow extra special for him — and I need your help.
**[Will you sign my dad’s swearing-in card to wish him well as he begins this next chapter?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202501-swearingincard.zwv-fZ&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250102_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8253%2E5257348%2E4CSaHR)**

clean_body: | Hi Derek — It’s Lexi, Adam’s daughter. Tomorrow, my dad will be sworn in to a full term as California’s next U.S. Senator. It’s an incredibly proud moment for our family, and I know how much this milestone means to him. My dad has spent his entire career fighting for the values we all care about: lowering the cost of housing and childcare, strengthening Social Security and Medicare, protecting clean air and water, restoring reproductive rights, and so much more. But if we’re being honest — it hasn’t been easy. He’s faced a lot of false attacks, smears, and name-calling from Republican leaders. That never stops him from doing his work, but it definitely worries me and my family. Luckily, we have this incredible team supporting him and his work — you make it all so worthwhile. Now, as my dad prepares to take the oath of office, I know he’s ready to take these fights to the Senate and succeed, delivering for the people of California and the country. From the start, it’s been the support of people like you that keeps him going. Your commitment to this movement has meant the world to our family, and I want to make sure my dad feels that support as he steps into this new role. That’s why I want to make tomorrow extra special for him — and I need your help. I know my dad would be the first to tell you that none of this would have been possible without your support. Let’s fill his card with as many signatures as possible to show him that this incredible community has his back and is as proud of him as I am! Thank you! — Lexi | | 135 E.
